    3                                                module ucie_timeout_timer #(
    4                                                    parameter int SIM_8MS_CYCLES = 80000,
    5                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,
    6                                                    parameter real CLK_PERIOD_NS = 1.0 
    7                                                ) (
    8                                                    input  logic i_clk,
    9                                                    input  logic i_reset,
    10                                                   input  logic i_sim,
    11                                                   input  logic wait_1us,
    12                                                   input  [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_encoding, 
    13                                                   
    14                                                   output logic o_timer_1ms,
    15                                                   output logic o_timer_4ms,
    16                                                   output logic o_timer_8ms,
    17                                                   output logic o_timer_1us,
    18                                                   output logic o_timer_2us
    19                                               );
    20                                                   // ==========================================================================
    21                                                   // Threshold Calculation Logic
    22                                                   // ==========================================================================
    23                                               
    24                                                   // Synthesis thresholds 
    25                                                   localparam int HW_CYCLES_1MS  = int'(1_000_000.0 / CLK_PERIOD_NS);
    26                                                   localparam int HW_CYCLES_4MS  = int'(4_000_000.0 / CLK_PERIOD_NS);
    27                                                   localparam int HW_CYCLES_8MS  = int'(8_000_000.0 / CLK_PERIOD_NS);
    28                                                   localparam int HW_CYCLES_1US  = int'(    1_000.0 / CLK_PERIOD_NS);
    29                                                   localparam int HW_CYCLES_2US  = int'(    2_000.0 / CLK_PERIOD_NS);
    30                                               
    31                                                   // Simulation thresholds 
    32                                                   localparam int SIM_CYCLES_8MS = SIM_8MS_CYCLES;
    33                                                   localparam int SIM_CYCLES_4MS = SIM_8MS_CYCLES / 2;
    34                                                   localparam int SIM_CYCLES_1MS = SIM_8MS_CYCLES / 8;
    35                                                   localparam int SIM_CYCLES_1US = SIM_8MS_CYCLES / 8000; // 1us = 8ms/8000
    36                                                   localparam int SIM_CYCLES_2US = SIM_8MS_CYCLES / 4000; // 2us = 8ms/4000
    37                                                   
    38                                                   // Calculate required bits to hold the max count
    39                                                   localparam CNTR_WIDTH = $clog2(HW_CYCLES_8MS + 1);
    40                                               
    41                                                   logic [CNTR_WIDTH-1:0] CYCLES_1MS, CYCLES_4MS, CYCLES_8MS, CYCLES_2US, CYCLES_1US;
    42                                                   logic [CNTR_WIDTH-1:0] r_counter_1ms, r_counter_4ms, r_counter_8ms, r_counter_2us, r_counter_1us;
    43                                               
    44                                                   // Only the top 6 bits [8:3] identify the FSM state; bits [2:0] are
    45                                                   // sub-state detail that must not reset the timers.
    46                                                   logic [5:0] r_rx_encoding_msb_prev;
    47                                                   logic       w_state_changed;
    48                                               
    49                                                   // Runtime mux between sim and hw thresholds
    50              1                          2         always_comb begin
    51              1                          2             CYCLES_1MS = i_sim ? CNTR_WIDTH'(SIM_CYCLES_1MS) : CNTR_WIDTH'(HW_CYCLES_1MS);
    52              1                          2             CYCLES_4MS = i_sim ? CNTR_WIDTH'(SIM_CYCLES_4MS) : CNTR_WIDTH'(HW_CYCLES_4MS);
    53              1                          2             CYCLES_8MS = i_sim ? CNTR_WIDTH'(SIM_CYCLES_8MS) : CNTR_WIDTH'(HW_CYCLES_8MS);
    54              1                          2             CYCLES_1US = i_sim ? CNTR_WIDTH'(SIM_CYCLES_1US) : CNTR_WIDTH'(HW_CYCLES_1US);
    55              1                          2             CYCLES_2US = i_sim ? CNTR_WIDTH'(SIM_CYCLES_2US) : CNTR_WIDTH'(HW_CYCLES_2US);
    56                                                   end
    57                                                   
    58                                               
    59                                                   // ==========================================================================
    60                                                   // Edge Detection (State Change Logic)
    61                                                   // Only bits [8:3] (top 6) are compared â€” bits [2:0] are sub-state detail
    62                                                   // and must not cause a timer reset.
    63                                                   // ==========================================================================
    64                                                   
    65              1                       1599         always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    66                                                       if (i_reset) begin
    67              1                         48                  r_rx_encoding_msb_prev <= '0;
    68                                                       end else begin
    69              1                       1551                 r_rx_encoding_msb_prev <= o_rx_encoding[8:3];
    70                                                       end
    71                                                   end
    72                                               
    73              1                       1531         assign w_state_changed = (r_rx_encoding_msb_prev != o_rx_encoding[8:3]);
    74                                               
    75                                               
    76                                                   // ==========================================================================
    77                                                   // Counter Logic
    78                                                   // ==========================================================================
    79                                               
    80              1                    2731109         always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    81                                                       if (i_reset) begin
    82              1                         48                 r_counter_1ms <= '0;
    83              1                         48                 r_counter_4ms <= '0;
    84              1                         48                 r_counter_8ms <= '0;
    85              1                         48                 r_counter_1us <= '0;
    86              1                         48                 r_counter_2us <= '0;
    87                                                       end
    88                                                       else if (w_state_changed) begin
    89              1                        764                 r_counter_1ms <= '0;
    90              1                        764                 r_counter_4ms <= '0;
    91              1                        764                 r_counter_8ms <= '0;
    92              1                        764                 r_counter_1us <= '0;
    93              1                        764                 r_counter_2us <= '0;
    94                                                       end
    95                                                       else begin
    96                                                           // 8ms counter â€” wraps after each period
    97                                                           if (r_counter_8ms >= CYCLES_8MS - 1)
    98              1                          1                     r_counter_8ms <= '0;
    99                                                           else
    100             1                    2730296                     r_counter_8ms <= r_counter_8ms + 1'b1;
    101                                              
    102                                                          // 4ms counter â€” wraps after each period
    103                                                          if (r_counter_4ms >= CYCLES_4MS - 1)
    104             1                         11                     r_counter_4ms <= '0;
    105                                                          else
    106             1                    2730286                     r_counter_4ms <= r_counter_4ms + 1'b1;
    107                                              
    108                                                          // 1ms counter â€” wraps after each period
    109                                                          if (r_counter_1ms >= CYCLES_1MS - 1)
    110             1                        215                     r_counter_1ms <= '0;
    111                                                          else
    112             1                    2730082                     r_counter_1ms <= r_counter_1ms + 1'b1;
    113                                              
    114                                                          // 2us counter â€” wraps after each period
    115                                                          if (r_counter_2us >= CYCLES_2US - 1)
    116             1                     136137                     r_counter_2us <= '0;
    117                                                          else
    118             1                    2594160                     r_counter_2us <= r_counter_2us + 1'b1;
    119                                              
    120                                                          // 1us counter â€” wraps after each period
    121                                                          if (wait_1us) begin
    122                                                              if (r_counter_1us >= CYCLES_1US - 1)
    123             1                    ***0***                         r_counter_1us <= '0;
    124                                                              else
    125             1                    ***0***                         r_counter_1us <= r_counter_1us + 1'b1;
    126             1                    2730297                 end else r_counter_1us <= 0;
    127                                                      end
    128                                                  end

    131                                                  // Output Pulse Generation

    56              1                         48                 substates_done   <= 0;
    57                                                       end else if (i_current_state != SBINIT) begin
    58              1                       3408                 current_substate <= WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG;
    59              1                       3408                 substates_done   <= 0;
    60                                                       end else begin
    61                                                           if (current_substate == DONE_HANDSHAKE &&
    62                                                               i_rx_decoding == 9'h09 && i_sb_rx_req) begin
    63              1                         24                     substates_done   <= 1;
    64              1                         24                     current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    65                                                           end else begin
    66              1                         96                     current_substate <= next_substate;
    67                                                           end
    68                                                       end
    69                                                   end
    70                                               
    71                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    72                                                   // RSP / Done handshake register
    73                                                   // RX mirror of TX done_ack: latches when i_sb_rx_done arrives
    74                                                   // (our RSP was accepted by sideband), clears when next i_sb_rx_req comes in
    75                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    76              1                       7032         always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    77                                                       if (i_reset)
    78              1                         48                 done_ack <= 0;
    79                                                       else if (i_sb_rx_done)
    80              1                       2904                 done_ack <= 1;
    81                                                       else if (i_sb_rx_req)
    82              1                       2540                 done_ack <= 0;
    83                                                   end
    84                                               
    85                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    86                                                   // Next-state / output combinational logic
    87                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    88              1                       6383         always_comb begin
    89              1                       6383             o_rx_encoding   = 9'h08;
    90              1                       6383             o_rx_data       = '0;       // FIX 9: was never driven
    91              1                       6383             o_rx_info       = '0;       // FIX 9: was never driven
    92              1                       6383             o_rx_sb_req     = 0;
    93              1                       6383             o_rx_sb_rsp     = 0;
    94              1                       6383             o_rx_sb_done    = 0;
    95              1                       6383             o_train_error   = 0;
    96              1                       6383             o_sb_init_start = 0;
    97              1                       6383             o_done_sbinit_rx = 0;
    98              1                       6383             next_substate   = WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG;
    99                                               
    100                                                      if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    101             1                         10                 o_train_error = 1;
    102             1                         10                 next_substate = WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG;
    103                                                      end
    104                                                      else if (i_current_state == SBINIT) begin
    105                                                          case (current_substate)
    106                                              
    107                                                              // --------------------------------------------------------------
    108                                                              // WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG
    109                                                              // RX waits for TX to send its out-of-reset message (encoding 0x09).
    110                                                              // Encoding held at 0x08 while waiting.
    111                                                              // --------------------------------------------------------------
    112                                                              WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG: begin
    113             1                         48                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h08;
    114                                              
    115                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    116             1                         24                             if (i_rx_decoding == 9'h08) next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    117             1                         24                             else next_substate = WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG;
    118                                                                  end
    119                                                              end
    120                                              
    121                                                              // --------------------------------------------------------------
    122                                                              // DONE_HANDSHAKE
    123                                                              // RX sends RSP to acknowledge the done message from TX.
    124                                                              // --------------------------------------------------------------
    125                                                              DONE_HANDSHAKE: begin
    126             1                         72                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h09;
    127                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    128             1                         72                             o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    129                                              
    130                                                                      if (i_rx_decoding == 9'h09 && i_sb_rx_req) begin
    131             1                         24                                 next_substate    = WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG;
    132             1                         24                                 o_done_sbinit_rx = 1;
    133                                                                      end else begin
    134             1                         48                                 next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    135                                                                      end
    136                                                                  end
    137                                                              end
    138                                              
    139             1                    ***0***                     default: next_substate = WAIT_OUT_OF_RESET_MSG;

    33                                                 logic [2:0] current_substate;  // current substate

    35                                               
    36                                                 logic       done_ack;
    37                                                 logic       substates_done;
    38                                               
    39                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    40                                                 // Local capability register [15:0]
    41                                                 //   Bit layout (from UCIe spec MBINIT.PARAM configuration req Data[15:0]):
    42                                                 //     [15]    : TARR supported             = 0 (not supported)
    43                                                 //     [14]    : Sideband feature extensions = 0 (not supported)
    44                                                 //     [13]    : UCIe-A x32 / UCIe-S x8    = 0
    45                                                 //     [12:11] : Module ID                  = 0
    46                                                 //     [10]    : Clock Phase                = 0 (Differential)
    47                                                 //     [9]     : Clock Mode                 = 0 (Strobe mode)
    48                                                 //     [8:4]   : Voltage Swing              = 5'b00011 (3 = 0.5 V)
    49                                                 //     [3:0]   : Max IO Link Speed          = 4'b0101  (5 = 32 GT/s)
    50                                                 //   => 16'h0035
    51                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    52                                                 // localparam logic [15:0] LOCAL_CAP = 16'h0035;
    53                                               
    54                                                 // logic [15:0] r_local_cap;   // latched at reset; holds fixed capability word
    55                                               
    56                                                 // always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    57                                                 //     if (i_reset)
    58                                                 //         r_local_cap <= LOCAL_CAP;
    59                                                 //     // Capability register is read-only; value never changes after reset
    60                                                 // end
    61                                               
    62                                               
    63                                                 // Local Parameters for states names
    64                                                 localparam MBINIT_PARAM = 4'b0010;
    65                                               
    66                                                 // Local Parameters for states names (PARAM)
    67                                                 localparam CONFIG_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;
    68                                               
    69                                               
    70                                                 // State Memory Logic
    71              1                       3348       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin

    2                                                module ucie_ltsm_rx_mbinit_param #(
    3                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,

    5                                                    parameter INFO_WIDTH     = 16

    19                                               
    20                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_encoding,
    21                                                   output logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_data,
    22                                                   output logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_info,
    23                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_req,
    24                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_rsp,
    25                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_done,
    26                                                   output logic                      o_train_error,
    27                                                   output logic                      o_done_mbinit_param_rx
    28                                               );
    29                                               
    30                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31                                                 // Local parameters
    32                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33                                                 localparam logic [3:0] MBINIT_PARAM = 4'b0010;
    34                                               
    35                                                 localparam logic [2:0] WAIT_CONFIG_REQ = 3'b000;
    36                                                 localparam logic [2:0] CHECK_PARAMETERS = 3'b001;
    37                                               
    38                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    39                                                 // Local max-speed capability register
    40                                                 //   Holds the maximum IO link speed this module supports.
    41                                                 //   Encoding matches UCIe spec "Max Link Speeds" table:
    42                                                 //     4'b0101 = 5 = 32 GT/s
    43                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44                                                 localparam logic [3:0] LOCAL_MAX_SPEED = 4'b0101;  // 32 GT/s
    45                                               
    46                                                 logic [3:0] r_local_max_speed;  // read-only after reset
    47                                               
    48                                                 // Fix: Prevent r_local_max_speed from being inferred as a latch.
    49                                                 //   // Assign it on reset, and assign it explicitly otherwise (hold value).
    50                                                 //   always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    51                                                 //     if (i_reset) r_local_max_speed <= LOCAL_MAX_SPEED;
    52                                                 //     else r_local_max_speed <= r_local_max_speed;
    53                                                 //     // Read-only capability; never changes after reset
    54                                                 //   end
    55                                               
    56                                                 assign r_local_max_speed = LOCAL_MAX_SPEED;
    57                                               
    58                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59                                                 // Internal signals
    60                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61                                                 logic [           2:0] current_substate;
    62                                                 logic [           2:0] next_substate;
    63                                                 logic                  done_ack;
    64                                                 logic                  substates_done;
    65                                               
    66                                                 logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_data_reg;
    67                                               
    68                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    69                                                 // Common speed â€” minimum of partner advertised speed and our local max
    70                                                 // The spec requires the responding module to pick the common (lower) value.
    71                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    72                                                 logic [           3:0] w_common_speed;
    73              1                         50       assign w_common_speed = (i_rx_data_reg[3:0] < r_local_max_speed)
    74                                                                           ? i_rx_data_reg[3:0]
    75                                                                           : r_local_max_speed;
    76                                               
    77                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    78                                                 // State memory
    79                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    80              1                       4874       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    81                                                   if (i_reset) begin
    82              1                         48           current_substate <= WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;
    83              1                         48           substates_done   <= 0;
    84              1                         48           i_rx_data_reg    <= '0;
    85                                                   end else if (i_current_state != MBINIT_PARAM) begin
    86              1                       4658           current_substate <= WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;
    87              1                       4658           substates_done   <= 0;
    88              1                       4658           i_rx_data_reg    <= '0;
    89                                                   end else begin
    90                                                     // Park in CHECK_PARAMETERS when response is accepted so encoding/data
    91                                                     // stay visible until parent MBINIT_PARAM exits (partner may still be finishing).
    92                                                     if (current_substate == CHECK_PARAMETERS && i_sb_rx_done) begin
    93              1                         72             substates_done   <= 1;
    94              1                         72             current_substate <= CHECK_PARAMETERS;
    95                                                     end else begin
    96              1                         96             current_substate <= next_substate;
    97                                                       // Latch rx_data when config REQ arrives so it is stable during CHECK
    98                                                       if (current_substate == WAIT_CONFIG_REQ && i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h10)
    99              1                         24               i_rx_data_reg <= i_rx_data;
    100                                                    end
    101                                                  end
    102                                                end
    103                                              
    104                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    105                                                // RSP / Done handshake register
    106                                                // done_ack latches when i_sb_rx_done (our RSP accepted by sideband)
    107                                                // clears when new i_sb_rx_req arrives
    108                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    109             1                       7032       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    110             1                         48         if (i_reset) done_ack <= 0;
    111             1                       2904         else if (i_sb_rx_done) done_ack <= 1;
    112             1                       2540         else if (i_sb_rx_req) done_ack <= 0;
    113                                                end
    114                                              
    115                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    116                                                // Next-state / output combinational logic
    117                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    118             1                       8880       always_comb begin
    119             1                       8880         o_rx_encoding          = 9'h10;
    120             1                       8880         o_rx_data              = '0;
    121             1                       8880         o_rx_info              = '0;
    122             1                       8880         o_rx_sb_req            = 0;
    123             1                       8880         o_rx_sb_rsp            = 0;
    124             1                       8880         o_rx_sb_done           = 0;
    125             1                       8880         o_train_error          = 0;
    126             1                       8880         o_done_mbinit_param_rx = 0;
    127             1                       8880         next_substate          = WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;
    128                                              
    129                                                  if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    130             1                         10           o_train_error = 1;
    131             1                         10           next_substate = WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;
    132                                                  end else if (i_current_state == MBINIT_PARAM) begin
    133                                                    case (current_substate)
    134                                              
    135                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    136                                                      // WAIT_CONFIG_REQ
    137                                                      // Wait for TX CONFIG_HANDSHAKE REQ (encoding 0x10).
    138                                                      // Acknowledge with o_rx_sb_done; latch i_rx_data in always_ff.
    139                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    140                                                      WAIT_CONFIG_REQ: begin  // i need a response here
    141             1                        144               o_rx_encoding = 9'h10;
    142                                              
    143                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    144                                                          if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h10) begin
    145             1                         24                   o_rx_sb_done  = 1;
    146                                              
    147             1                         24                   next_substate = CHECK_PARAMETERS;
    148                                                          end else begin
    149             1                        120                   next_substate = WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;
    150                                                          end
    151                                                        end
    152                                                      end
    153                                              
    154                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    155                                                      // CHECK_PARAMETERS
    156                                                      // Compare partner's max speed (i_rx_data_reg[3:0]) with our
    157                                                      // local max speed, pick the lower common value, and return it
    158                                                      // in the response data field [3:0].
    159                                                      //
    160                                                      // Response data layout (MBINIT.PARAM configuration resp):
    161                                                      //   [63:16] : Reserved â†’ 0
    162                                                      //   [15]    : TARR negotiated     â†’ 0
    163                                                      //   [14]    : SB feature ext.     â†’ 0
    164                                                      //   [13:11] : Reserved            â†’ 0
    165                                                      //   [10]    : Clock Phase          â†’ 0
    166                                                      //   [9]     : Clock Mode           â†’ 0
    167                                                      //   [8:4]   : Reserved            â†’ 0
    168                                                      //   [3:0]   : Max IO Link Speed   â†’ w_common_speed
    169                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    170                                                      CHECK_PARAMETERS: begin
    171             1                        144               o_rx_encoding = 9'h11;  // 2nd error
    172                                              
    173                                                        // Build response: only [3:0] carries the negotiated speed
    174             1                        144               o_rx_data = {{(DATA_WIDTH - 4) {1'b0}}, w_common_speed};
    175                                              
    176                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    177             1                         72                 o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    178                                              
    179                                                          if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    180             1                         24                   o_done_mbinit_param_rx = 1;
    181             1                         24                   next_substate          = WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;
    182             1                         48                 end else next_substate = CHECK_PARAMETERS;
    183             1                         72               end else next_substate = CHECK_PARAMETERS;
    184                                                      end
    185                                              
    186             1                    ***0***             default: next_substate = WAIT_CONFIG_REQ;

    8                                                    input                             i_reset,
    9                                                    input        [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_decoding,
    10                                                   input        [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_data,
    11                                                   input        [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_info,
    12                                                   input                             i_sb_rx_req,
    13                                                   input                             i_sb_rx_rsp,
    14                                                   input                             i_sb_rx_done,
    15                                                   input                             i_rx_done,
    16                                                   input                             init_train_en,
    17                                                   input        [               3:0] i_current_state,
    18                                                   input                             o_timer_8ms,
    19                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_encoding,
    20                                                   output logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_data,
    21                                                   output logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_info,
    22                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_req,
    23                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_rsp,
    24                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_done,
    25                                                   output logic                      o_train_error,
    26                                                   output logic                      o_done_mbinit_cal_rx
    27                                               );
    28                                               
    29                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30                                                 // Local parameters
    31                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                 localparam logic [3:0] MBINIT_CAL = 4'b0011;
    33                                                 localparam logic [2:0] DONE_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;
    34                                               
    35                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36                                                 // Internal signals
    37                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    38                                                 logic [2:0] current_substate;
    39                                                 logic [2:0] next_substate;
    40                                                 logic       done_ack;
    41                                                 logic       substates_done;
    42                                               
    43                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44                                                 // State memory
    45                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46              1                       3552       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    47                                                   if (i_reset) begin
    48              1                         48           current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    49              1                         48           substates_done   <= 0;
    50                                                   end else if (i_current_state != MBINIT_CAL) begin
    51              1                       3432           current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    52              1                       3432           substates_done   <= 0;
    53                                                   end else begin
    54              1                         72           current_substate <= next_substate;
    55                                                     if (current_substate == DONE_HANDSHAKE && i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h18)
    56              1                         24             substates_done <= 1;
    57                                                   end
    58                                                 end
    59                                               
    60                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61                                                 // RSP / Done handshake register
    62                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63              1                       7032       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    64              1                         48         if (i_reset) done_ack <= 0;
    65              1                       2904         else if (i_sb_rx_done) done_ack <= 1;
    66              1                       2540         else if (i_sb_rx_req) done_ack <= 0;
    67                                                 end
    68                                               
    69                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    70                                                 // Next-state / output combinational logic
    71                                                 // CAL is simple: single DONE_HANDSHAKE substate.
    72                                                 // Wait for TX REQ + encoding 0x18, send RSP, assert done.
    73                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    74              1                       6359       always_comb begin
    75              1                       6359         o_rx_encoding        = 9'h18;
    76              1                       6359         o_rx_data            = '0;
    77              1                       6359         o_rx_info            = '0;
    78              1                       6359         o_rx_sb_req          = 0;
    79              1                       6359         o_rx_sb_rsp          = 0;
    80              1                       6359         o_rx_sb_done         = 0;
    81              1                       6359         o_train_error        = 0;
    82              1                       6359         o_done_mbinit_cal_rx = 0;
    83              1                       6359         next_substate        = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    84                                               
    85                                                   if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    86              1                         10           o_train_error = 1;
    87              1                         10           next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    88                                                   end else if (i_current_state == MBINIT_CAL) begin
    89                                                     case (current_substate)
    90                                               
    91                                                       // --------------------------------------------------------------
    92                                                       // DONE_HANDSHAKE
    93                                                       // Wait for TX REQ with encoding 0x18.
    94                                                       // Send RSP until done_ack (our RSP accepted), then drop.
    95                                                       // Assert done on REQ + 0x18 arrival.
    96                                                       // --------------------------------------------------------------
    97                                                       DONE_HANDSHAKE: begin
    98              1                         96               o_rx_encoding = 9'h18;
    99              1                         96               o_rx_sb_rsp = 1'b1;
    100                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    101             1                         96                 o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    102                                              
    103                                                          if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h18) begin
    104             1                         24                   o_done_mbinit_cal_rx = 1;
    105             1                         24                   next_substate        = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    106                                                          end else begin
    107             1                         72                   next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    108                                                          end
    109                                                        end

    2                                                module ucie_ltsm_rx_mbinit_repairclk #(
    3                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,
    4                                                    parameter DATA_WIDTH     = 64,
    5                                                    parameter INFO_WIDTH     = 16
    6                                                ) (
    7                                                    input                      i_clk,
    8                                                    input                      i_reset,
    9                                                    input [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_decoding,
    10                                                   input [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_data,
    11                                                   input [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_info,
    12                                                   input                      i_sb_rx_req,
    13                                                   input                      i_sb_rx_rsp,
    14                                                   input                      i_sb_rx_done,
    15                                                   input                      i_rx_done,
    16                                                   input                      init_train_en,
    17                                                   input [               3:0] i_current_state,
    18                                                   input                      o_timer_8ms,
    19                                               
    20                                                   // Pattern detection results from RX PHY path (3 clock lane health bits)
    21                                                   input [2:0] i_rx_clk_results,
    22                                               
    23                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_encoding,
    24                                                   output logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_data,
    25                                                   output logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_info,
    26                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_req,
    27                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_rsp,
    28                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_done,
    29                                                   output logic                      o_train_error,
    30                                                   output logic                      o_done_mbinit_repairclk_rx
    31                                               );
    32                                               
    33                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34                                                 // Local parameters
    35                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36                                                 localparam logic [3:0] MBINIT_REPAIRCLK = 4'b0100;
    37                                               
    38                                                 // REPAIRCLK RX substates:
    39                                                 // INIT_HANDSHAKE    : wait for TX INIT REQ (0x20), send RSP
    40                                                 // PATTERN_DETECTION : wait for RX path to finish OR for TX to send result REQ early
    41                                                 // WAIT_RESULT_REQ   : RX done before TX asked â€” hold results, wait for REQ
    42                                                 // SEND_RESP         : send lane health results in o_rx_info[3:0]
    43                                                 // DONE_HANDSHAKE    : wait for TX DONE REQ (0x23), send RSP, assert done
    44                                                 localparam logic [2:0] INIT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;
    45                                                 localparam logic [2:0] PATTERN_DETECTION = 3'b001;
    46                                                 localparam logic [2:0] WAIT_RESULT_REQ = 3'b010;
    47                                                 localparam logic [2:0] SEND_RESP = 3'b011;
    48                                                 localparam logic [2:0] DONE_HANDSHAKE = 3'b100;
    49                                               
    50                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    51                                                 // Internal signals
    52                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53                                                 logic [2:0] current_substate;
    54                                                 logic [2:0] next_substate;
    55                                                 logic       done_ack;
    56                                                 logic       substates_done;
    57                                               
    58                                                 logic [2:0] i_rx_clk_results_reg;
    59                                               
    60                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61                                                 // State memory + result latch
    62                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63              1                       4183       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    64                                                   if (i_reset) begin
    65              1                         48           current_substate     <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    66              1                         48           substates_done       <= 0;
    67              1                         48           i_rx_clk_results_reg <= '0;
    68                                                   end else if (i_current_state != MBINIT_REPAIRCLK) begin
    69              1                       3799           current_substate     <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    70              1                       3799           substates_done       <= 0;
    71              1                       3799           i_rx_clk_results_reg <= '0;
    72                                                   end else begin
    73                                                     // Park in DONE_HANDSHAKE when local side completes (encoding hold until parent exits)
    74                                                     if (current_substate == DONE_HANDSHAKE && i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h24) begin
    75              1                         24             substates_done   <= 1;
    76              1                         24             current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    77                                                     end else begin
    78              1                        312             current_substate <= next_substate;
    79                                               
    80                                                       // Latch detection results when RX path finishes or when TX asks early
    81                                                       if ((current_substate == PATTERN_DETECTION && i_rx_done) ||
    82                                                                   (current_substate == WAIT_RESULT_REQ &&
    83                                                                    i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h22)) // edited
    84              1                         48               i_rx_clk_results_reg <= i_rx_clk_results;
    85                                                     end
    86                                                   end
    87                                                 end
    88                                               
    89                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    90                                                 // RSP / Done handshake register
    91                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    92              1                       7032       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    93              1                         48         if (i_reset) done_ack <= 0;
    94              1                       2904         else if (i_sb_rx_done) done_ack <= 1;
    95              1                       2540         else if (i_sb_rx_req) done_ack <= 0;
    96                                                 end
    97                                               
    98                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    99                                                 // Next-state / output combinational logic
    100                                                //
    101                                                // Encoding map (RX mirrors TX encoding):
    102                                                //   INIT_HANDSHAKE    : 0x20
    103                                                //   PATTERN_DETECTION : 0x21
    104                                                //   WAIT_RESULT_REQ   : 0x22
    105                                                //   SEND_RESP         : 0x22  (result sent in o_rx_info[3:0])
    106                                                //   DONE_HANDSHAKE    : 0x23
    107                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    108             1                       9409       always_comb begin
    109             1                       9409         o_rx_encoding              = 9'h20;
    110             1                       9409         o_rx_data                  = '0;
    111             1                       9409         o_rx_info                  = '0;
    112             1                       9409         o_rx_sb_req                = 0;
    113             1                       9409         o_rx_sb_rsp                = 0;
    114             1                       9409         o_rx_sb_done               = 0;
    115             1                       9409         o_train_error              = 0;
    116             1                       9409         o_done_mbinit_repairclk_rx = 0;
    117             1                       9409         next_substate              = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    118                                              
    119                                                  if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    120             1                         10           o_train_error = 1;
    121             1                         10           next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    122                                                  end else if (i_current_state == MBINIT_REPAIRCLK) begin
    123                                                    case (current_substate)
    124                                              
    125                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    126                                                      // INIT_HANDSHAKE
    127                                                      // Wait for TX REQ + 0x20, send RSP immediately, advance.
    128                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    129                                                      INIT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    130             1                         72               o_rx_encoding = 9'h20;
    131                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    132             1                         72                 o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    133                                              
    134             1                         24                 if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h20) next_substate = PATTERN_DETECTION;
    135             1                         48                 else next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    136                                                        end
    137                                                      end
    138                                              
    139                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    140                                                      // PATTERN_DETECTION
    141                                                      // RX path running pattern detection in background.
    142                                                      // Two exit paths:
    143                                                      //   (a) i_rx_done arrives first â†’ go WAIT_RESULT_REQ, hold results
    144                                                      //   (b) TX sends result REQ (0x22) before i_rx_done â†’ grab results
    145                                                      //       immediately and jump straight to SEND_RESP
    146                                                      // FIX 11: was "i_rx_decoding = 9'h22" (assign not compare)
    147                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    148                                                      PATTERN_DETECTION: begin
    149             1                        144               o_rx_encoding = 9'h21;
    150                                              
    151                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    152                                                          if (i_rx_done) begin
    153                                                            // Results ready, wait for TX to ask
    154             1                         24                   next_substate = WAIT_RESULT_REQ;
    155                                                          end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h21) begin
    156                                                            // TX asked before we finished â€” grab whatever we have now
    157             1                    ***0***                   o_rx_sb_rsp   = 1;
    158             1                    ***0***                   next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    159                                                          end else begin
    160             1                        120                   next_substate = PATTERN_DETECTION;
    161                                                          end
    162                                                        end
    163                                                      end
    164                                              
    165                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    166                                                      // WAIT_RESULT_REQ
    167                                                      // RX finished detection before TX asked. Hold results and wait
    168                                                      // for TX to send result REQ (0x22).
    169                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    170                                                      WAIT_RESULT_REQ: begin
    171             1                         72               o_rx_encoding = 9'h22;
    172                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    173                                                          // Keep RSP asserted so TX knows we're ready
    174             1                         72                 o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    175                                              
    176                                                          if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h22)  // 
    177             1                         24                   next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    178             1                         48                 else next_substate = WAIT_RESULT_REQ;
    179                                                        end
    180                                                      end
    181                                              
    182                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    183                                                      // SEND_RESP
    184                                                      // Send lane health results in o_rx_info[3:0] (4 clock lanes).
    185                                                      // Assert RSP, hold until i_sb_rx_done confirms sideband accepted.
    186                                                      // FIX 16: original used 9'h23 here which belongs to DONE_HANDSHAKE
    187                                                      // FIX 6/7: removed substates_done from comb, handled in ff
    188                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    189                                                      SEND_RESP: begin
    190             1                         96               o_rx_encoding  = 9'h23;
    191             1                         96               o_rx_info[2:0] = i_rx_clk_results_reg;
    192                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    193             1                         96                 o_rx_sb_rsp = 1;
    194                                              
    195             1                         24                 if (i_sb_rx_done) next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    196             1                         72                 else next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    197             1                    ***0***               end else next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    198                                                      end
    199                                              
    200                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    201                                                      // DONE_HANDSHAKE
    202                                                      // Wait for TX DONE REQ (0x23), send RSP, assert done.
    203                                                      // FIX 16: original used 9'h24 here
    204                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    205                                                      DONE_HANDSHAKE: begin
    206             1                         72               o_rx_encoding = 9'h24;
    207                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    208             1                         72                 o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    209                                              
    210                                                          if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h24) begin
    211             1                         24                   o_done_mbinit_repairclk_rx = 1;
    212             1                         24                   next_substate              = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    213                                                          end else begin
    214             1                         48                   next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    215                                                          end
    216                                                        end
    217                                                      end
    218                                              
    219             1                    ***0***             default: next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
