    36                                                   localparam logic [3:0] MBINIT_REPAIRVAL = 4'b0101;
    37                                               
    38                                                   // Same substate structure as REPAIRCLK â€” different encodings and lane bits
    39                                                   localparam logic [2:0] INIT_HANDSHAKE    = 3'b000;
    40                                                   localparam logic [2:0] PATTERN_DETECTION = 3'b001;
    41                                                   localparam logic [2:0] WAIT_RESULT_REQ   = 3'b010;
    42                                                   localparam logic [2:0] SEND_RESP         = 3'b011;
    43                                                   localparam logic [2:0] DONE_HANDSHAKE    = 3'b100;
    44                                               
    45                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46                                                   // Internal signals
    47                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    48                                                   logic [2:0] current_substate;
    49                                                   logic [2:0] next_substate;
    50                                                   logic       done_ack;
    51                                                   logic       substates_done;
    52                                                   logic       i_rx_valid_results_reg;
    53                                               
    54                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55                                                   // State memory + result latch
    56                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    57              1                       4135         always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    58                                                       if (i_reset) begin
    59              1                         48                 current_substate                <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    60              1                         48                 substates_done                  <= 0;
    61              1                         48                 i_rx_valid_results_reg <= '0;
    62                                                       end else if (i_current_state != MBINIT_REPAIRVAL) begin
    63              1                       3775                 current_substate                <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    64              1                       3775                 substates_done                  <= 0;
    65              1                       3775                 i_rx_valid_results_reg <= '0;
    66                                                       end else begin
    67                                                           if (current_substate == DONE_HANDSHAKE &&
    68                                                               i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h2B) begin
    69              1                    ***0***                     substates_done   <= 1;
    70              1                    ***0***                     current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    71                                                           end else begin
    72              1                        312                     current_substate <= next_substate;
    73                                               
    74                                                               if ((current_substate == PATTERN_DETECTION && i_rx_done) ||
    75                                                                   (current_substate == WAIT_RESULT_REQ &&
    76                                                                    i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h2A)) // edited
    77              1                         48                         i_rx_valid_results_reg <= i_rx_valid_results;
    78                                                           end
    79                                                       end
    80                                                   end
    81                                               
    82                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    83                                                   // RSP / Done handshake register
    84                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    85              1                       7032         always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    86                                                       if (i_reset)
    87              1                         48                 done_ack <= 0;
    88                                                       else if (i_sb_rx_done)
    89              1                       2904                 done_ack <= 1;
    90                                                       else if (i_sb_rx_req)
    91              1                       2540                 done_ack <= 0;
    92                                                   end
    93                                               
    94                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    95                                                   // Next-state / output combinational logic
    96                                                   //
    97                                                   // Encoding map:
    98                                                   //   INIT_HANDSHAKE    : 0x28
    99                                                   //   PATTERN_DETECTION : 0x29
    100                                                  //   WAIT_RESULT_REQ   : 0x2A
    101                                                  //   SEND_RESP         : 0x2A  (result in o_rx_info[1:0] â€” 2 data lanes)
    102                                                  //   DONE_HANDSHAKE    : 0x2B
    103                                                  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    104             1                       9409         always_comb begin
    105             1                       9409             o_rx_encoding              = 9'h28;
    106             1                       9409             o_rx_data                  = '0;
    107             1                       9409             o_rx_info                  = '0;
    108             1                       9409             o_rx_sb_req                = 0;
    109             1                       9409             o_rx_sb_rsp                = 0;
    110             1                       9409             o_rx_sb_done               = 0;
    111             1                       9409             o_train_error              = 0;
    112             1                       9409             o_done_mbinit_repairval_rx = 0;
    113             1                       9409             next_substate              = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    114                                              
    115                                                      if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    116             1                         10                 o_train_error = 1;
    117             1                         10                 next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    118                                                      end
    119                                                      else if (i_current_state == MBINIT_REPAIRVAL) begin
    120                                                          case (current_substate)
    121                                              
    122                                                              INIT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    123             1                        144                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h28;
    124                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    125             1                        144                             o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    126                                              
    127                                                                      if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h28)
    128             1                         24                                 next_substate = PATTERN_DETECTION;
    129                                                                      else
    130             1                        120                                 next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    131                                                                  end
    132                                                              end
    133                                              
    134                                                              PATTERN_DETECTION: begin
    135             1                         72                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h29;
    136                                              
    137                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    138                                                                      if (i_rx_done) begin
    139             1                         24                                 next_substate = WAIT_RESULT_REQ;
    140                                                                      end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h29) begin
    141             1                    ***0***                                 o_rx_sb_rsp   = 1;
    142             1                    ***0***                                 next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    143                                                                      end else begin
    144             1                         48                                 next_substate = PATTERN_DETECTION;
    145                                                                      end
    146                                                                  end
    147                                                              end
    148                                              
    149                                                              WAIT_RESULT_REQ: begin
    150             1                         72                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h2A;
    151                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    152             1                         72                             o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    153                                              
    154                                                                      if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h2A)
    155             1                         24                                 next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    156                                                                      else
    157             1                         48                                 next_substate = WAIT_RESULT_REQ;
    158                                                                  end
    159                                                              end
    160                                              
    161                                                              SEND_RESP: begin
    162             1                         72                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h2B;  // error
    163             1                         72                         o_rx_info[0]  = i_rx_valid_results_reg;  // 2 data lanes
    164                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    165             1                         72                             o_rx_sb_rsp = 1;
    166                                              
    167                                                                      if (i_sb_rx_done)
    168             1                         24                                 next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    169                                                                      else
    170             1                         48                                 next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    171             1                    ***0***                         end else next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    172                                                              end
    173                                              
    174                                                              DONE_HANDSHAKE: begin
    175             1                        168                         o_rx_encoding = 9'h2C;  // error
    176                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    177             1                        168                             o_rx_sb_rsp = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    178                                              
    179                                                                      if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h2C) begin  // error
    180             1                         24                                 o_done_mbinit_repairval_rx = 1;
    181             1                         24                                 next_substate              = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    182                                                                      end else begin
    183             1                        144                                 next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    184                                                                      end
    185                                                                  end
    186                                                              end
    187                                              
    188             1                    ***0***                     default: next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;

    1                                                module ucie_ltsm_tx_mbinit_reversal #(
    2                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,
    3                                                    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 64,
    4                                                    parameter INFO_WIDTH = 16
    5                                                ) (
    6                                                
    7                                                    input                           i_clk,
    8                                                    input                           i_reset,
    9                                                    input  [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0]     i_tx_decoding,
    10                                                   input  [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]         i_tx_data,
    11                                                   input  [INFO_WIDTH-1:0]         i_tx_info,
    12                                                   input                           i_sb_tx_req,
    13                                                   input                           i_sb_tx_rsp,
    14                                                   input                           i_sb_tx_done,
    15                                                   input                           i_tx_done,
    16                                                   input                           init_train_en,
    17                                                   input                           o_rx_sb_rsp,
    18                                                   input  [3:0]                    i_current_state,
    19                                                   input                           o_timer_8ms,
    20                                               
    21                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0]  o_tx_encoding,
    22                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]      o_tx_data,
    23                                                   output logic [INFO_WIDTH-1:0]      o_tx_info,
    24                                                   output logic                       o_tx_sb_req,
    25                                                   output logic                       o_tx_sb_rsp,
    26                                                   output logic                       o_tx_sb_done,
    27                                                   output logic                       o_train_error,
    28                                                   output logic                       o_done_mbinit_reversal_tx
    29                                               );
    30                                               
    31                                               logic [2:0] current_substate;
    32                                               logic [2:0] next_substate;
    33                                               logic       done_ack;
    34                                               logic       substates_done;
    35                                               
    36                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    37                                               // Combinational popcount of i_tx_data[15:0]
    38                                               //   Counts the number of '1' bits in the first 16 lanes of the result word
    39                                               //   delivered by the far end in the RESULT_HANDSHAKE RSP.
    40                                               //   5 bits required: maximum value is 16 (all lanes good).
    41                                               //   Threshold: count <= 8 â†’ majority bad â†’ apply reversal
    42                                               //              count >  8 â†’ majority good â†’ proceed to DONE_HANDSHAKE
    43                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44                                               logic [4:0] w_popcount;
    45                                               
    46              1                        489     always_comb begin
    47              1                        489         w_popcount = '0;
    48              1                        489         for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++)
    48              2                       7824     
    49              1                       7824             w_popcount = w_popcount + {4'b0, i_tx_data[i]};
    50                                               end
    51                                               
    52                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53                                               // Local Parameters
    54                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55                                               localparam MBINIT_REVERSAL     = 4'b0110;
    56                                               
    57                                               localparam INIT_HANDSHAKE      = 3'b000;
    58                                               localparam CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE = 3'b001;
    59                                               localparam LANE_ID_GENERATION  = 3'b010;
    60                                               localparam RESULT_HANDSHAKE    = 3'b011;
    61                                               localparam APPLY_REVERSAL      = 3'b100;
    62                                               localparam DONE_HANDSHAKE      = 3'b101;
    63                                               
    64                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    65                                               // State memory
    66                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    67              1                       3516     always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    68                                                   if (i_reset) begin
    69              1                         48             current_substate <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    70              1                         48             substates_done   <= 0;
    71                                                   end else if (i_current_state != MBINIT_REVERSAL) begin
    72              1                       3060             current_substate <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    73              1                       3060             substates_done   <= 0;
    74                                                   end else begin
    75                                                       if (current_substate == DONE_HANDSHAKE &&
    76                                                           i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 9'h35) begin
    77              1                         24                 substates_done   <= 1;
    78              1                         24                 current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    79                                                       end else begin
    80              1                        384                 current_substate <= next_substate;
    81                                                       end
    82                                                   end
    83                                               end
    84                                               
    85                                               // done_ack handshake: set on i_sb_tx_done, clear on i_sb_tx_rsp
    86              1                       6859     always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    87              1                         48         if (i_reset)         done_ack <= 0;
    88              1                       2776         else if (i_sb_tx_done) done_ack <= 1;
    89              1                       2128         else if (i_sb_tx_rsp)  done_ack <= 0;
    90                                               end
    91                                               
    92                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    93                                               // Combinational next-state / output logic
    94                                               // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    95              1                       6950     always_comb begin
    96              1                       6950         o_tx_encoding           = 9'h30;
    97              1                       6950         o_tx_data               = '0;
    98              1                       6950         o_tx_info               = '0;
    99              1                       6950         o_tx_sb_req             = 0;
    100             1                       6950         o_tx_sb_rsp             = 0;
    101             1                       6950         o_tx_sb_done            = 0;
    102             1                       6950         o_train_error           = 0;
    103             1                       6950         o_done_mbinit_reversal_tx = 0;
    104             1                       6950         next_substate           = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    105                                              
    106                                                  if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    107             1                         10             o_train_error = 1;
    108             1                         10             next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    109                                                  end
    110                                                  else if (i_current_state == MBINIT_REVERSAL) begin
    111                                                      case (current_substate)
    112                                              
    113                                                          INIT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    114             1                        120                     o_tx_encoding = 9'h30;
    115                                                              if (!substates_done) begin
    116             1                        120                         o_tx_sb_req = ~done_ack;
    117                                                                  if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 9'h30)
    118             1                         24                             next_substate = CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE;
    119                                                                  else
    120             1                         96                             next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    121                                                              end
    122                                                          end
    123                                              
    124                                                          CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE: begin
    125             1                        120                     o_tx_encoding = 9'h31;
    126                                                              if (!substates_done) begin
    127             1                        120                         o_tx_sb_req = ~done_ack;
    128                                                                  if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 9'h31)
    129             1                         24                             next_substate = LANE_ID_GENERATION;
    130                                                                  else
    131             1                         96                             next_substate = CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE;
    132                                                              end
    133                                                          end
    134                                              
    135                                                          LANE_ID_GENERATION: begin
    136             1                         72                     o_tx_encoding = 9'h32;
    137                                                              if (!substates_done) begin
    138             1                         72                         o_tx_sb_req = ~done_ack;
    139                                                                  if (i_tx_done)
    140             1                         24                             next_substate = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    141                                                                  else
    142             1                         48                             next_substate = LANE_ID_GENERATION;
    143                                                              end
    144                                                          end
    145                                              
    146                                                          RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    147             1                        144                     o_tx_encoding = 9'h33;
    148                                                              if (!substates_done) begin
    149             1                        144                         o_tx_sb_req = ~done_ack;
    150                                                                  // w_popcount is always valid; only use it when RSP arrives
    151                                                                  if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 9'h33) begin
    152                                                                      if (w_popcount <= 5'd8)
    153             1                    ***0***                                 next_substate = APPLY_REVERSAL;
    154                                                                      else
    155             1                         48                                 next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    156                                                                  end else begin
    157             1                         96                             next_substate = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    158                                                                  end
    159                                                              end
    160                                                          end
    161                                              
    162                                                          APPLY_REVERSAL: begin
    163             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_encoding = 9'h34;
    164                                                              if (!substates_done) begin
    165             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_req = ~done_ack;
    166                                                                  if (i_tx_done)
    167             1                    ***0***                             next_substate = CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE;
    168                                                                  else
    169             1                    ***0***                             next_substate = APPLY_REVERSAL;
    170                                                              end
    171                                                          end
    172                                              
    173                                                          DONE_HANDSHAKE: begin
    174             1                        144                     o_tx_encoding = 9'h35;
    175                                                              if (!substates_done) begin
    176             1                        144                         o_tx_sb_req = ~done_ack;
    177                                                                  if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 9'h35) begin
    178             1                         24                             o_done_mbinit_reversal_tx = 1;
    179             1                         24                             next_substate             = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    180                                                                  end else begin
    181             1                        120                             next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    182                                                                  end
    183                                                              end
    184                                                          end
    185                                              
    186             1                    ***0***                 default: next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;

  File ../rtl/ucie_ltsm_rx_mbinit_reversal.sv
    2                                                module ucie_ltsm_rx_mbinit_reversal #(
    3                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,
    4                                                    parameter DATA_WIDTH     = 64,
    5                                                    parameter INFO_WIDTH     = 16
    6                                                ) (
    7                                                    input                      i_clk,
    8                                                    input                      i_reset,
    9                                                    input [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_decoding,
    10                                                   input [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_data,
    11                                                   input [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_info,
    12                                                   input                      i_sb_rx_req,
    13                                                   input                      i_sb_rx_rsp,
    14                                                   input                      i_sb_rx_done,
    15                                                   input                      i_rx_done,
    16                                                   input                      init_train_en,

    18                                                   input                      o_timer_8ms,
    19                                                   input [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_data_results, // from pattern detector
    20                                               
    21                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_encoding,
    22                                                   output logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_data,
    23                                                   output logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_rx_info,
    24                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_req,
    25                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_rsp,
    26                                                   output logic                      o_rx_sb_done,
    27                                                   output logic                      o_train_error,
    28                                                   output logic                      o_done_mbinit_reversal_rx
    29                                               );
    30                                               
    31                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                 // Local parameters
    33                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34                                                 localparam logic [3:0] MBINIT_REVERSAL = 4'b0110;
    35                                               
    36                                                 localparam logic [2:0] INIT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;
    37                                                 localparam logic [2:0] CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE = 3'b001;
    38                                                 localparam logic [2:0] LANE_ID_DETECTION = 3'b010;
    39                                                 localparam logic [2:0] WAIT_RESULT_REQ = 3'b011;
    40                                                 localparam logic [2:0] SEND_RESP = 3'b100;
    41                                                 localparam logic [2:0] DONE_HANDSHAKE = 3'b101;
    42                                               
    43                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44                                                 // Internal signals
    45                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46                                                 logic [           2:0] current_substate;
    47                                                 logic [           2:0] next_substate;
    48                                                 logic                  done_ack;
    49                                                 logic                  substates_done;
    50                                               
    51                                                 logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_rx_data_results_reg;
    52                                               
    53                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    54                                                 // Combinational popcount of i_rx_data_results_reg[15:0]
    55                                                 //   5 bits â€” maximum value 16.
    56                                                 //   count <= 8: majority of lanes bad â†’ TX will apply reversal â†’ loop to CLEAR_LOG
    57                                                 //   count >  8: majority good        â†’ TX proceeds to done    â†’ go to DONE_HANDSHAKE
    58                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59                                                 logic [           4:0] w_popcount;
    60                                               
    61              1                         50       always_comb begin
    62              1                         50         w_popcount = '0;
    63              1                         50         for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++) w_popcount = w_popcount + {4'b0, i_rx_data_results_reg[i]};
    63              2                        800     
    63              3                        800     
    64                                                 end
    65                                               
    66                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    67                                                 // State memory + result latch
    68                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    69              1                       3720       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    70                                                   if (i_reset) begin
    71              1                         48           current_substate      <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    72              1                         48           substates_done        <= 0;
    73              1                         48           i_rx_data_results_reg <= '0;
    74                                                   end else if (i_current_state != MBINIT_REVERSAL) begin
    75              1                       3288           current_substate      <= INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    76              1                       3288           substates_done        <= 0;
    77              1                       3288           i_rx_data_results_reg <= '0;
    78                                                   end else begin
    79                                                     if (current_substate == DONE_HANDSHAKE && i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h35) begin
    80              1                         24             substates_done   <= 1;
    81              1                         24             current_substate <= DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    82                                                     end else begin
    83              1                        360             current_substate <= next_substate;
    84                                               
    85                                                       // Latch detection results at the end of LANE_ID_DETECTION
    86                                                       if (current_substate == WAIT_RESULT_REQ && i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h33)
    87              1                         24               i_rx_data_results_reg <= i_rx_data_results;
    88                                                     end
    89                                                   end
    90                                                 end
    91                                               
    92                                                 // done_ack: set when sideband confirms our RSP was sent; clear on new REQ
    93              1                       7032       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    94              1                         48         if (i_reset) done_ack <= 0;
    95              1                       2904         else if (i_sb_rx_done) done_ack <= 1;
    96              1                       2540         else if (i_sb_rx_req) done_ack <= 0;
    97                                                 end
    98                                               
    99                                                 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    100                                                // Next-state / output combinational logic
    101                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    102             1                       9410       always_comb begin
    103             1                       9410         o_rx_encoding             = 9'h30;
    104             1                       9410         o_rx_data                 = '0;
    105             1                       9410         o_rx_info                 = '0;
    106             1                       9410         o_rx_sb_req               = 0;
    107             1                       9410         o_rx_sb_rsp               = 0;
    108             1                       9410         o_rx_sb_done              = 0;
    109             1                       9410         o_train_error             = 0;
    110             1                       9410         o_done_mbinit_reversal_rx = 0;
    111             1                       9410         next_substate             = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    112                                              
    113                                                  if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    114             1                         10           o_train_error = 1;
    115             1                         10           next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    116                                                  end else if (i_current_state == MBINIT_REVERSAL) begin
    117                                                    case (current_substate)
    118                                              
    119                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    120                                                      // INIT_HANDSHAKE (0x30)
    121                                                      // Wait for TX REQ 0x30; send RSP immediately (done_ack controls
    122                                                      // when RSP drops after sideband confirms delivery).
    123                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    124                                                      INIT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    125             1                        144               o_rx_encoding = 9'h30;
    126                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    127             1                        144                 o_rx_sb_rsp = ~done_ack;
    128             1                         24                 if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h30) next_substate = CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE;
    129             1                        120                 else next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    130                                                        end
    131                                                      end
    132                                              
    133                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    134                                                      // CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE (0x31)
    135                                                      // Re-entered after reversal is applied by TX.
    136                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    137                                                      CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE: begin
    138             1                        144               o_rx_encoding = 9'h31;
    139                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    140             1                        144                 o_rx_sb_rsp = ~done_ack;
    141             1                         24                 if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h31) next_substate = LANE_ID_DETECTION;
    142             1                        120                 else next_substate = CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE;
    143                                                        end
    144                                                      end
    145                                              
    146                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    147                                                      // LANE_ID_DETECTION (0x32)
    148                                                      // RX performs lane ID detection. Advance when hardware signals done.
    149                                                      // Results are latched into i_rx_data_results_reg in always_ff.
    150                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    151                                                      LANE_ID_DETECTION: begin
    152             1                         72               o_rx_encoding = 9'h32;
    153                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    154             1                         24                 if (i_rx_done) next_substate = WAIT_RESULT_REQ;
    155             1                         48                 else next_substate = LANE_ID_DETECTION;
    156                                                        end
    157                                                      end
    158                                              
    159                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    160                                                      // WAIT_RESULT_REQ (0x33)
    161                                                      // Hold results until TX enters RESULT_HANDSHAKE and sends REQ 0x33.
    162                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    163                                                      WAIT_RESULT_REQ: begin
    164             1                         72               o_rx_encoding = 9'h33;
    165                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    166             1                         24                 if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h33) next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    167             1                         48                 else next_substate = WAIT_RESULT_REQ;
    168                                                        end
    169                                                      end
    170                                              
    171                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    172                                                      // SEND_RESP (0x33)
    173                                                      // Send lane detection results to TX via o_rx_data.
    174                                                      // When i_sb_rx_done confirms the RSP was sent, evaluate w_popcount
    175                                                      // to mirror TX's decision:
    176                                                      //   count <= 8: TX applies reversal â†’ loop back to CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE
    177                                                      //   count >  8: TX proceeds        â†’ advance to DONE_HANDSHAKE
    178                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    179                                                      SEND_RESP: begin
    180             1                         72               o_rx_encoding = 9'h34;
    181             1                         72               o_rx_data     = i_rx_data_results_reg;
    182                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    183             1                         72                 o_rx_sb_rsp = ~done_ack;
    184                                              
    185                                                          if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    186             1                    ***0***                   if (w_popcount <= 5'd8) next_substate = CLEAR_LOG_HANDSHAKE;
    187             1                         24                   else next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    188                                                          end else begin
    189             1                         48                   next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    190                                                          end
    191             1                    ***0***               end else next_substate = SEND_RESP;
    192                                                      end
    193                                              
    194                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    195                                                      // DONE_HANDSHAKE (0x35)
    196                                                      // Wait for TX REQ 0x35; send RSP and assert done.
    197                                                      // --------------------------------------------------------------
    198                                                      DONE_HANDSHAKE: begin
    199             1                        120               o_rx_encoding = 9'h35;
    200                                                        if (!substates_done) begin
    201             1                        120                 o_rx_sb_rsp = ~done_ack;
    202                                                          if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 9'h35) begin
    203             1                         24                   o_done_mbinit_reversal_rx = 1;
    204             1                         24                   next_substate             = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
    205                                                          end else begin
    206             1                         96                   next_substate = DONE_HANDSHAKE;
    207                                                          end
    208                                                        end
    209                                                      end
    210                                              
    211             1                    ***0***             default: next_substate = INIT_HANDSHAKE;
