    8                                                module ucie_TX_Data_to_Clock_eye_sweep # (
    9                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,   // Width of command decoding input
    10                                                   parameter DATA_WIDTH = 64,       // Width of data input/output
    11                                                   parameter INFO_WIDTH = 16,      // Width of info/control output
    12                                                   parameter MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS = 4,      // Maximum number of test retry iterations
    13                                               
    14                                                   parameter logic [63:0] data_DATA_FIELD = {
    15                                                       4'b0000,       // [63:60] Reserved
    16                                                       1'b0,          // [59]    Comparison Mode (Per Lane)
    17                                                       16'd1,         // [58:43] Iteration Count
    18                                                       16'd0,         // [42:27] Idle Count
    19                                                       16'd4000,      // [26:11] Burst Count
    20                                                       1'b0,          // [10]    Pattern Mode (Continuous)
    21                                                       4'h0,          // [9:6]   Clock Phase (Clock PI Center)
    22                                                       3'h0,          // [5:3]   Valid Pattern (Functional)
    23                                                       3'h0           // [2:0]   Data Pattern (LFSR)
    24                                                   },
    25                                               
    26                                                   parameter logic [63:0] valid_DATA_FIELD = {
    27                                                       4'b0000,       // [63:60] Reserved
    28                                                       1'b0,          // [59]    Comparison Mode (Per Lane)
    29                                                       16'd1,         // [58:43] Iteration Count
    30                                                       16'd0,         // [42:27] Idle Count
    31                                                       16'd128,       // [26:11] Burst Count
    32                                                       1'b0,          // [10]    Pattern Mode (Continuous)
    33                                                       4'h0,          // [9:6]   Clock Phase (Clock PI Center)
    34                                                       3'h0,          // [5:3]   Valid Pattern (Functional)
    35                                                       3'h0           // [2:0]   Data Pattern (LFSR)
    36                                                   },
    37                                               
    38                                                   parameter ERROR_THRESHOLD = 1   // Error threshold for test pass/fail
    39                                               ) (
    40                                                   // Clock and reset
    41                                                   input i_clk,
    42                                                   input i_reset,
    43                                                   
    44                                                   // Interface inputs - from remote side
    45                                                   input [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_decoding,  // Decoded command from remote
    46                                                   input [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_data,          // Data from remote
    47                                                   input [INFO_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_info,          // Data from remote
    48                                                   input [7:0] i_xx_sweep_result,             // Eye sweep results from remote
    49                                                   
    50                                                   // Sideband control inputs
    51                                                   input i_sb_xx_req,     // Sideband request from remote
    52                                                   input i_sb_xx_rsp,     // Sideband response from remote
    53                                                   input i_sb_xx_done,    // Sideband done from remote
    54                                                   input i_xx_done,       // Operation complete
    55                                                   
    56                                                   // Control inputs
    57                                                   input done_ack,        // Acknowledgement of done signal
    58                                                   input init,            // Initialize mode flag
    59                                                   input no_retry,        // Disable retry on test failure
    60                                                   input comparison_type,        // 0:data, 1:valid
    61                                                   
    62                                                   // Interface outputs - to remote side
    63                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_encoding,  // Encoded command to send
    64                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_data,          // Data to send
    65                                                   output logic [INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_info,          // Info/control to send
    66                                                   
    67                                                   // Sideband control outputs
    68                                                   output logic o_xx_sb_req,   // Sideband request to remote
    69                                                   output logic o_xx_sb_rsp,   // Sideband response to remote
    70                                                   
    71                                                   // Status outputs
    72                                                   output logic train_error,   // Training error occurred
    73                                                   output logic failed_test,   // Current test failed
    74                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] per_lane_result,   // Current test failed
    75                                                   output logic done           // Eye sweep test complete
    76                                               );
    77                                               
    78                                               //================================================================================
    79                                               // State Machine Definitions
    80                                               //================================================================================
    81                                               
    82                                               // State encoding for eye sweep sequence
    83                                               localparam REQ_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;            // Initial request handshake
    84                                               localparam LFSR_HANDSHAKE = 3'b001;           // LFSR (pseudo-random) setup handshake
    85                                               localparam DATA_GENERATE = 3'b010;            // Data pattern generation state
    86                                               localparam RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b011;         // Result collection handshake
    87                                               localparam SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b100;   // Sweep parameter result handshake
    88                                               localparam END_HANDSHAKE = 3'b101;            // Final completion handshake
    89                                               
    90                                               // State registers
    91                                               logic [2:0] CS;  // Current state
    92                                               logic [2:0] NS;  // Next state
    93                                               
    94                                               logic [2:0] count;
    95                                               logic [2:0] count_reg;
    96                                               
    97                                               logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] per_lane_result_old;
    98                                               logic failed_test_old;
    99                                               
    100                                              //================================================================================
    101                                              // State Machine Sequential Logic
    102                                              //================================================================================
    103                                              
    104                                              // State register update
    105             1                       5115     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    106                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    107             1                       4899             CS <= REQ_HANDSHAKE;  // Reset to initial state
    108             1                       4899             count <= 0;
    109                                                  end else begin
    110             1                        216             CS <= NS;             // Advance to next state
    111             1                        216             count <= count_reg;   // Update count register
    112                                                  end
    113                                              end
    114                                              
    115             1                          3     always @(posedge i_clk) begin
    116             1                          3         per_lane_result_old <= per_lane_result;  // Capture previous per-lane result for reporting
    117             1                          3         failed_test_old <= failed_test;          // Capture previous test result for reporting
    118                                              end
    119                                              
    120                                              
    121                                              //================================================================================
    122                                              // Main State Machine Combinational Logic
    123                                              //================================================================================
    124             1                      11285     always @(*) begin
    125             1                      11285             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    126             1                      11285             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    127             1                      11285             done = 0;
    128             1                      11285             train_error = 0;
    129             1                      11285             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    130             1                      11285             o_xx_info = 0;
    131             1                      11285             o_xx_data = 0;
    132             1                      11285             per_lane_result = per_lane_result_old;
    133             1                      11285             count_reg = count;
    134             1                      11285             failed_test = failed_test_old;
    135             1                      11285             NS = CS;
    136             1                      11285             o_xx_encoding = 0;
    137                                                      // Two different sequences based on init flag
    138                                                      if (init) begin
    139                                                          //====================================================================
    140                                                          // INITIALIZATION MODE - TX initiates the test
    141                                                          //====================================================================
    142                                                          case (CS)
    143                                                              // State 0: Send initial test request
    144                                                              REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    145             1                        144                         o_xx_encoding = 'h180;  // Request encoding
    146             1                        144                         done = 0;
    147             1                        144                         count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    148             1                        144                         train_error = 0;
    149             1                        144                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    150                                              
    151                                                                  // Request handshake with acknowledge
    152             1                         72                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    153             1                         72                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    154                                              
    155             1                        144                         o_xx_info = ERROR_THRESHOLD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    156                                              
    157                                                                  if (comparison_type) begin
    158                                                                      o_xx_data = valid_DATA_FIELD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    159                                                                  end else begin
    160             1                        144                             o_xx_data = data_DATA_FIELD;  // Send data pattern parameters
    161                                                                  end
    162                                              
    163                                                                  // Wait for matching response
    164                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h180) begin
    165             1                         24                             o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    166             1                         24                             NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    167             1                         24                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    168             1                         24                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    169                                                                  end 
    170             1                        120                         else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    171                                                              end 
    172                                              
    173                                                              // State 1: Setup LFSR (Linear Feedback Shift Register) for pattern generation
    174                                                              LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    175             1                        192                         o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    176             1                        192                         done = 0;
    177                                              
    178             1                        120                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    179             1                         72                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    180                                              
    181                                                                  // Wait for LFSR setup confirmation
    182                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h181) begin
    183             1                         24                             o_xx_encoding = 'h182;  // Data generation encoding
    184             1                         24                             count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    185             1                         24                             NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    186             1                         24                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    187             1                         24                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    188                                                                  end 
    189             1                        168                         else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    190                                                              end 
    191                                              
    192                                                              // State 2: Generate test data patterns
    193                                                              DATA_GENERATE: begin
    194             1                        144                         o_xx_encoding = 'h182;  // Data generation encoding
    195             1                        144                         done = 0;
    196                                              
    197                                                                  // Wait for data generation to complete
    198                                                                  if (i_xx_done) begin
    199             1                         24                             o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // Result collection encoding
    200             1                         24                             NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    201             1                         24                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    202             1                         24                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    203                                                                  end
    204             1                        120                         else NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    205                                                              end 
    206                                              
    207                                                              // State 3: Collect test results from RX
    208                                                              RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    209             1                        168                         o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // Result collection encoding
    210             1                        168                         done = 0;
    211                                              
    212                                                                  if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    213             1                         96                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    214                                              
    215                                                                  // Check result and decide on retry
    216                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h183) begin
    217             1                         24                             failed_test = !(&i_xx_data);  // Test fails if any bit is 0
    218             1                         24                             per_lane_result = i_xx_data;  // Capture per-lane results for reporting
    219                                                                      // Retry if failed and retries allowed, otherwise complete
    220                                                                      if (failed_test && !no_retry) begin
    221                                                                          if (count == MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS) begin
    222                                                                              train_error = 1;  // Mark training error if max retries reached
    223                                                                          end else begin
    224                                                                              o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    225                                                                              NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    226                                                                              o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    227                                                                              o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    228                                                                              train_error = 0;  // Clear training error for retry
    229                                                                          end 
    230                                                                      end else begin
    231             1                         24                                 o_xx_encoding = 'h184;  // End encoding
    232             1                         24                                 NS = END_HANDSHAKE;
    233             1                         24                                 o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    234             1                         24                                 o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    235                                                                      end
    236             1                        144                         end else NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    237                                              
    238                                                              end 
    239                                              
    240                                                              // State 4: Final handshake to complete test
    241                                                              END_HANDSHAKE: begin
    242             1                        168                         o_xx_encoding = 'h184;  // End encoding
    243                                              
    244             1                         72                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    245             1                         96                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    246                                              
    247                                                                  // Signal completion when acknowledged
    248             1                         48                         if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h184) done = 1;
    249             1                        120                         else done = 0;
    250                                                              end 
    251                                                          endcase
    252                                                      end else begin
    253                                                          //====================================================================
    254                                                          // NON-INITIALIZATION MODE - TX responds to RX-initiated test
    255                                                          //====================================================================
    256                                                          case (CS)
    257                                                              // State 0: Respond to initial test request
    258                                                              REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    259             1                      10419                         o_xx_encoding = 'h188;  // Response encoding
    260             1                      10419                         done = 0;
    261             1                      10419                         count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    262             1                      10419                         train_error = 0;
    263                                              
    264                                                                  // Response handshake
    265             1                       3363                         if (i_sb_xx_done) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    266             1                       7056                         else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    267                                              
    268                                                                  // Wait for done signal
    269                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_done) begin
    270             1                       3363                             o_xx_info = i_xx_info;  // Send error threshold parameter
    271             1                       3363                             o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    272             1                       3363                             NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    273             1                       3363                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    274             1                       3363                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    275                                                                  end
    276             1                       7056                         else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    277                                                              end 
    278                                              
    279                                                              // State 1: Setup LFSR for pattern generation
    280                                                              LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    281             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    282             1                    ***0***                         done = 0;
    283                                              
    284             1                    ***0***                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    285             1                    ***0***                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    286                                              
    287                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h189) begin
    288             1                    ***0***                             o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data generation encoding
    289             1                    ***0***                             count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    290             1                    ***0***                             NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    291             1                    ***0***                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    292             1                    ***0***                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    293                                                                  end 
    294             1                    ***0***                         else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    295                                                              end 
    296                                              
    297                                                              // State 2: Generate test data patterns
    298                                                              DATA_GENERATE: begin
    299             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data generation encoding
    300             1                    ***0***                         done = 0;
    301                                              
    302                                                                  if (i_xx_done) begin
    303             1                    ***0***                             o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result collection encoding
    304             1                    ***0***                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    305             1                    ***0***                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    306             1                    ***0***                             NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    307                                                                  end
    308             1                    ***0***                         else NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    309                                                              end
    310                                              
    311                                                              // State 3: Collect test results
    312                                                              RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    313             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result collection encoding
    314             1                    ***0***                         done = 0;
    315                                              
    316             1                    ***0***                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    317             1                    ***0***                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    318                                                                  
    319                                              
    320                                                                  // Check result and decide on retry
    321                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h18B) begin

    323                                                                      // Retry if failed and retries allowed, otherwise get sweep result
    324                                                                      if (failed_test && !no_retry) begin
    325                                                                          if (count == MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS) begin

    333                                                                          end
    334                                                                      end else begin
    335             1                    ***0***                                 o_xx_encoding = 'h18C;  // Sweep result encoding
    336             1                    ***0***                                 o_xx_sb_req = 0;

    338             1                    ***0***                                 NS = SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE;

    341                                                              end 
    342                                              
    343                                                              // State 4: Send sweep parameter results
    344                                                              SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin

    348

    351

    54                                                 // r_lane_map: current accepted lane configuration register.

    115                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    116                                                // w_extracted_lane_map — combinational from registered r_per_lane_result
    117                                                //   Bits [15:0]: 1 = lane good, 0 = lane bad
    118                                                //   ALL_LANES_FUNCTIONAL : all 16 bits set
    119                                                //   LANES_0_TO_7         : some good in [7:0], none in [15:8]
    120                                                //   LANES_8_TO_15        : none in [7:0], some good in [15:8]
    121                                                //   DEGRADE_NOT_POSSIBLE : both halves mixed, or all bad
    122                                                // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    123             1                         49       always_comb begin
    124             1                         24         if (&r_per_lane_result[15:0]) w_extracted_lane_map = ALL_LANES_FUNCTIONAL;
    125                                                  else if (&r_per_lane_result[7:0] && !(&r_per_lane_result[15:8]))
    126             1                    ***0***           w_extracted_lane_map = LANES_0_TO_7;
    127                                                  else if (!(&r_per_lane_result[7:0]) && &r_per_lane_result[15:8])
    128             1                    ***0***           w_extracted_lane_map = LANES_8_TO_15;
    129             1                         25         else w_extracted_lane_map = DEGRADE_NOT_POSSIBLE;
    130                                                end

    271                                                      end

    17                                                       16'd1,         // [58:43] Iteration Count
    18                                                       16'd0,         // [42:27] Idle Count
    19                                                       16'd4000,      // [26:11] Burst Count
    20                                                       1'b0,          // [10]    Pattern Mode (Continuous)
    21                                                       4'h0,          // [9:6]   Clock Phase (Clock PI Center)
    22                                                       3'h0,          // [5:3]   Valid Pattern (Functional)
    23                                                       3'h0           // [2:0]   Data Pattern (LFSR)
    24                                                   },
    25                                               
    26                                                   parameter logic [63:0] valid_DATA_FIELD = {
    27                                                       4'b0000,       // [63:60] Reserved
    28                                                       1'b0,          // [59]    Comparison Mode (Per Lane)
    29                                                       16'd1,         // [58:43] Iteration Count
    30                                                       16'd0,         // [42:27] Idle Count
    31                                                       16'd128,       // [26:11] Burst Count
    32                                                       1'b0,          // [10]    Pattern Mode (Continuous)
    33                                                       4'h0,          // [9:6]   Clock Phase (Clock PI Center)
    34                                                       3'h0,          // [5:3]   Valid Pattern (Functional)
    35                                                       3'h0           // [2:0]   Data Pattern (LFSR)
    36                                                   },
    37                                               
    38                                                   parameter MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS = 4 // Maximum retry attempts before train_error
    39                                               ) (
    40                                                   // Clock and reset
    41                                                   input i_clk,
    42                                                   input i_reset,
    43                                                   
    44                                                   // Interface inputs - from remote TX
    45                                                   input [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_decoding,  // Decoded command from TX
    46                                                   input [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_data,          // Data from TX
    47                                                   input [INFO_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_info,          // Data from TX
    48                                                   
    49                                                   // Sideband control inputs
    50                                                   input i_sb_xx_req,     // Sideband request from TX
    51                                                   input i_sb_xx_rsp,     // Sideband response from TX
    52                                                   input i_sb_xx_done,    // Sideband done from TX
    53                                                   input i_xx_done,       // Operation complete
    54                                                   
    55                                                   // Control inputs
    56                                                   input done_ack,        // Acknowledgement of done signal
    57                                                   input init,            // Initialize mode flag
    58                                                   input no_retry,        // Disable retry on test failure
    59                                                   input comparison_type,        // 0:data, 1:valid
    60                                                   input [DATA_WIDTH-1 : 0] data_result,          // Test data_result from pattern detector
    61                                                   input valid_result,          // Test data_result from pattern detector
    62                                                   
    63                                                   // Interface outputs - to remote TX
    64                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_encoding,  // Encoded command to send
    65                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_data,          // Data to send
    66                                                   output logic [INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_info,          // Info/control to send
    67                                                   output logic [7:0] o_xx_sweep_result,             // Eye sweep results to send
    68                                                   
    69                                                   // Sideband control outputs
    70                                                   output logic o_xx_sb_req,   // Sideband request to TX
    71                                                   output logic o_xx_sb_rsp,   // Sideband response to TX
    72                                                   
    73                                                   // Status outputs
    74                                                   output logic train_error,   // Training error occurred
    75                                                   output logic failed_test,   // Current test failed
    76                                                   output logic done           // Eye sweep test complete
    77                                               );
    78                                               
    79                                               //================================================================================
    80                                               // State Machine Definitions
    81                                               //================================================================================
    82                                               
    83                                               // State encoding for eye sweep sequence
    84                                               localparam REQ_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;            // Initial request handshake
    85                                               localparam LFSR_HANDSHAKE = 3'b001;           // LFSR (pseudo-random) setup handshake
    86                                               localparam DATA_DETECTION = 3'b010;           // Data pattern detection state
    87                                               localparam RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b011;         // Result reporting handshake
    88                                               localparam SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b100;   // Sweep parameter data_result handshake
    89                                               localparam END_HANDSHAKE = 3'b101;            // Final completion handshake
    90                                               
    91                                               // State registers
    92                                               logic [2:0] CS;  // Current state
    93                                               logic [2:0] NS;  // Next state
    94                                               
    95                                               logic [1:0] count;
    96                                               logic [1:0] count_reg;
    97                                               
    98                                               //================================================================================
    99                                               // Combinational Logic
    100                                              //================================================================================
    101                                              
    102                                              // Test fails if any bit in data_result is 0 (all bits should be 1 for pass)
    103             1                          2     assign failed_test = !(&data_result);
    104                                              
    105                                              //================================================================================
    106                                              // State Machine Sequential Logic
    107                                              //================================================================================
    108                                              
    109                                              // State register update
    110             1                        293     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    111                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    112             1                         77             CS <= REQ_HANDSHAKE;  // Reset to initial state
    113             1                         77             count <= 0;
    114                                                  end else begin
    115             1                        216             CS <= NS;             // Advance to next state
    116             1                        216             count <= count_reg;
    117                                                  end
    118                                              end
    119                                              
    120                                              //================================================================================
    121                                              // Main State Machine Combinational Logic
    122                                              //================================================================================
    123             1                       8737     always @(*) begin
    124             1                       8737             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    125             1                       8737             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    126             1                       8737             done = 0;
    127             1                       8737             train_error = 0;
    128             1                       8737             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    129             1                       8737             o_xx_info = 0;
    130             1                       8737             o_xx_data = 0;
    131             1                       8737             o_xx_sweep_result = 0;
    132             1                       8737             count_reg = count;
    133             1                       8737             NS = CS;
    134             1                       8737             o_xx_encoding = 0;
    135                                                  if (init) begin
    136                                                      //====================================================================
    137                                                      // INITIALIZATION MODE - RX initiates the test
    138                                                      //====================================================================
    139                                                      case (CS)
    140                                                          // State 0: Send initial test request
    141                                                          REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    142             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_encoding = 'h188;  // Request encoding
    143             1                    ***0***                     done = 0;
    144             1                    ***0***                     count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    145             1                    ***0***                     train_error = 0;
    146                                              
    147                                                              // Request handshake with acknowledge
    148                                                              if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    149             1                    ***0***                     else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    150                                              
    151             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_info = ERROR_THRESHOLD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    152                                              
    153                                                              if (comparison_type) begin
    154             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_data = valid_DATA_FIELD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    155                                                              end else begin
    156             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_data = data_DATA_FIELD;  // Send data pattern parameters
    157                                                              end
    158                                                              
    159                                                              // Wait for matching response
    160                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h189) begin
    161             1                    ***0***                         NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    162             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    163             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    164             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    165                                                              end 
    166             1                    ***0***                     else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    167                                                          end 
    168                                              
    169                                                          // State 1: Setup LFSR (Linear Feedback Shift Register) for pattern detection
    170                                                          LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    171             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    172             1                    ***0***                     done = 0;
    173             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_info = 0;
    174                                              
    175                                                              // Response handshake
    176             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    177             1                    ***0***                     else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    178                                              
    179                                                              // Wait for LFSR setup done signal
    180                                                              if (i_sb_xx_done) begin
    181             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data detection encoding
    182             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    183             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    184             1                    ***0***                         count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    185             1                    ***0***                         NS = DATA_DETECTION;
    186                                                              end
    187             1                    ***0***                     else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    188                                                          end 
    189                                              
    190                                                          // State 2: Detect incoming test data patterns
    191                                                          DATA_DETECTION: begin
    192             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data detection encoding
    193             1                    ***0***                     done = 0;
    194                                              
    195                                                              // Wait for data detection to complete
    196                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h18B) begin
    197             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result reporting encoding
    198             1                    ***0***                         NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    199             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    200             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    201                                                              end
    202             1                    ***0***                     else NS = DATA_DETECTION;
    203                                                          end 
    204                                              
    205                                                          // State 3: Report test results back to TX
    206                                                          RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    207             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result reporting encoding
    208             1                    ***0***                     done = 0;
    209             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_data = data_result;     // Send detection data_result
    210             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_info = {'b0,valid_result,!failed_test,4'b0000};     // Send detection data_result
    211                                              
    212                                                              // Response handshake
    213             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    214             1                    ***0***                     else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    215                                              
    216                                                              // Check if we need to retry or send sweep results
    217                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h189) begin
    218             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    219             1                    ***0***                         NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    220             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    221             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    222             1                    ***0***                         train_error = 0;  // Clear training error for retry
    223                                                              end else if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h18C)  begin
    224             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18C;  // Sweep data_result encoding
    225             1                    ***0***                         NS = SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    226             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    227             1                    ***0***                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    228                                                              end
    229             1                    ***0***                     else NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    230                                                          end 
    231                                              
    232                                                          // State 4: Receive sweep parameter results from TX
    233                                                          SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    234             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18D;  // Sweep data_result encoding
    235             1                    ***0***                     done = 0;
    236             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_sweep_result = i_xx_data[7:0];  // Extract sweep measurement data
    237             1                    ***0***                     NS = END_HANDSHAKE;
    238             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    239             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    240                                                          end
    241                                              
    242                                                          // State 5: Final handshake to complete test
    243                                                          END_HANDSHAKE: begin
    244             1                    ***0***                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18D;  // End encoding
    245                                              
    246             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    247             1                    ***0***                     else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    248                                              
    249                                                              // Signal completion when acknowledged
    250                                                              if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h18D) done = 1;
    251             1                    ***0***                     else done = 0;
    252                                                          end 
    253                                                      endcase
    254                                                  end else begin
    255                                                      //====================================================================
    256                                                      // NON-INITIALIZATION MODE - RX responds to TX-initiated test
    257                                                      //====================================================================
    258                                                      case (CS)
    259                                                          // State 0: Respond to initial test request
    260                                                          REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    261             1                       8135                     o_xx_encoding = 'h180;  // Response encoding
    262             1                       8135                     done = 0;
    263             1                       8135                     count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    264             1                       8135                     train_error = 0;
    265                                              
    266                                                              // Response handshake
    267             1                       4301                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    268             1                       3834                     else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    269                                              
    270                                                              // Wait for done signal
    271                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h181) begin

    273             1                         42                         NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    274             1                         42                         o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    275             1                         42                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    276             1                         42                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    277                                                              end 
    278             1                       8093                     else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    279                                                          end 
    280                                                  
    281                                                          // State 1: Setup LFSR for pattern detection
    282                                                          LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    283             1                         72                     o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    284             1                         72                     done = 0;
    285                                              
    286                                                              // Response handshake
    287             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;

    289                                              
    290                                                              // Wait for done signal
    291                                                              if (i_sb_xx_done) begin
    292             1                         24                         count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    293             1                         24                         NS = DATA_DETECTION;
    294             1                         24                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    295             1                         24                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    296             1                         24                         o_xx_encoding = 'h182;  // LFSR setup encoding
    297                                                              end
    298             1                         48                     else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    299                                                          end 
    300                                                  
    301                                                          // State 2: Detect incoming test data patterns
    302                                                          DATA_DETECTION: begin
    303             1                        216                     o_xx_encoding = 'h182;  // Data detection encoding
    304             1                        216                     done = 0;
    305                                              
    306                                                              // Wait for data detection to complete
    307                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h183) begin

    309             1                         24                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    310             1                         24                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    311             1                         24                         o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // LFSR setup encoding
    312                                                              end 
    313             1                        192                     else NS = DATA_DETECTION;
    314                                                          end
    315                                                  
    316                                                          // State 3: Report test results back to TX
    317                                                          RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    318             1                        192                     o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // Result reporting encoding
    319             1                        192                     done = 0;
    320             1                        192                     o_xx_data = data_result;     // Send detection data_result

    236                                                // =========================================================================

    259                                                  end else begin

    261                                                    if (current_state != RESET) begin
    262             1                        693             done_tx_reset <= 0;
    263             1                        693             done_rx_reset <= 0;
