    265             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_reset) done_tx_reset <= 1;
    266             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_reset) done_rx_reset <= 1;
    267                                                    end
    268                                              
    269                                                    // ---- SBINIT ----
    270                                                    if (current_state != SBINIT) begin
    271             1                        715             done_tx_sbinit <= 0;
    272             1                        715             done_rx_sbinit <= 0;
    273                                                    end else begin
    274             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_sbinit) done_tx_sbinit <= 1;
    275             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_sbinit) done_rx_sbinit <= 1;
    276                                                    end
    277                                              
    278                                                    // ---- MBINIT_PARAM ----
    279                                                    if (current_state != MBINIT_PARAM) begin
    280             1                        667             done_tx_param <= 0;
    281             1                        667             done_rx_param <= 0;
    282                                                    end else begin
    283             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_param) done_tx_param <= 1;
    284             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_param) done_rx_param <= 1;
    285                                                    end
    286                                              
    287                                                    // ---- MBINIT_CAL ----
    288                                                    if (current_state != MBINIT_CAL) begin
    289             1                        715             done_tx_cal <= 0;
    290             1                        715             done_rx_cal <= 0;
    291                                                    end else begin
    292             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_cal) done_tx_cal <= 1;
    293             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_cal) done_rx_cal <= 1;
    294                                                    end
    295                                              
    296                                                    // ---- MBINIT_REPAIRCLK ----
    297                                                    if (current_state != MBINIT_REPAIRCLK) begin
    298             1                        715             done_tx_repairclk <= 0;
    299             1                        715             done_rx_repairclk <= 0;
    300                                                    end else begin
    301             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_repairclk) done_tx_repairclk <= 1;
    302             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_repairclk) done_rx_repairclk <= 1;
    303                                                    end
    304                                              
    305                                                    // ---- MBINIT_REPAIRVAL ----
    306                                                    if (current_state != MBINIT_REPAIRVAL) begin
    307             1                        715             done_tx_repairval <= 0;
    308             1                        715             done_rx_repairval <= 0;
    309                                                    end else begin
    310             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_repairval) done_tx_repairval <= 1;
    311             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_repairval) done_rx_repairval <= 1;
    312                                                    end
    313                                              
    314                                                    // ---- MBINIT_REVERSAL ----
    315                                                    if (current_state != MBINIT_REVERSAL) begin
    316             1                        715             done_tx_reversal <= 0;
    317             1                        715             done_rx_reversal <= 0;
    318                                                    end else begin
    319             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_reversal) done_tx_reversal <= 1;
    320             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_reversal) done_rx_reversal <= 1;
    321                                                    end
    322                                              
    323                                                    // ---- MBINIT_REPAIRMB ----
    324                                                    if (current_state != MBINIT_REPAIRMB) begin
    325             1                        643             done_tx_repairmb <= 0;
    326             1                        643             done_rx_repairmb <= 0;
    327                                                    end else begin
    328             1                         24             if (raw_done_tx_repairmb) done_tx_repairmb <= 1;
    329             1                         24             if (raw_done_rx_repairmb) done_rx_repairmb <= 1;
    330                                                    end
    331                                              
    332                                                    // ---- TRAINERROR ----
    333                                                    if (current_state != TRAINERROR) begin
    334             1                        718             done_tx_trainerror <= 0;
    335             1                        718             done_rx_trainerror <= 0;
    336                                                    end else begin
    337             1                         23             if (raw_done_tx_trainerror) done_tx_trainerror <= 1;
    338             1                         23             if (raw_done_rx_trainerror) done_rx_trainerror <= 1;
    339                                                    end
    340                                                  end
    341                                                end
    342                                                logic repair_done; // tracks whether we've completed REPAIRMB (both TX & RX done) and thus should assert o_init_train_en
    343                                                // =========================================================================
    344                                                // init_train_en latch
    345                                                // =========================================================================
    346             1                       3636       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    347             1                         48         if (i_reset) init_train_en_reg <= 0;
    348                                                  else if (current_state == MBINIT_REPAIRMB && repair_done &&
    349                                                               i_rx_decoding == 'h80 && i_sb_rx_req)
    350             1                         24           init_train_en_reg <= 1;
    351             1                       1054         else if (current_state != MBINIT_REPAIRMB) init_train_en_reg <= 0;
    352                                                end
    353                                              
    354             1                       3684       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    355             1                         48         if (i_reset) repair_done <= 0;
    356                                                  else if (current_state == MBINIT_REPAIRMB && i_rx_decoding == 'h80 && i_sb_rx_req)
    357             1                         48           repair_done <= 0;
    358             1                       2005         else if (done_tx_repairmb && done_rx_repairmb) repair_done <= 1;
    359             1                       1583         else repair_done <= 0;
    360                                                end
    361                                              
    362                                                // =========================================================================
    363                                                // Main FSM  — sequential
    364                                                // =========================================================================
    365                                                // always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    366                                                //   if (i_reset) current_state <= RESET;
    367                                                //   else current_state <= next_state;
    368                                                // end
    369                                              
    370                                                // always_comb begin
    371                                                //   if (i_reset) current_state = RESET;
    372                                                //   else current_state = next_state;
    373                                                // end
    374                                              
    375                                                // =========================================================================
    376                                                // Main FSM  — combinational next-state logic
    377                                                // Priority (highest first):
    378                                                //   1. SBINIT train error       ? RESET
    379                                                //   2. Any other train error    ? TRAINERROR
    380                                                //   3. Active-training error while init_train_en is high ? TRAINERROR
    381                                                //   4. Both TX & RX done        ? advance
    382                                                //   5. Stay
    383                                                // =========================================================================
    384                                                // The original code creates a combinational loop by updating current_state 
    385                                                // within an always_comb block, but also using current_state as the selector in the case. 
    386                                                // The proper approach is to introduce a next_state signal, perform all logic/writes 
    387                                                // to next_state in always_comb, and update current_state on the clock edge. 
    388                                                // Below is the safe, systematic way to rewrite this FSM logic 
    389                                                // (keeping current_state as a flop, next_state as combinational):
    390                                              
    391                                                logic [3:0] next_state;  // Set STATE_WIDTH appropriately, or `typedef` your enum
    392                                              
    393             1                       1017       always_comb begin
    394                                                  // Default hold value
    395             1                       1017         next_state = current_state;
    396                                              
    397                                                  // ---- Global error overrides ----
    398                                                  if (any_sbinit_error && current_state == SBINIT) begin
    399             1                    ***0***           next_state = RESET;
    400                                                  end else if (any_other_error) begin
    401             1                         30           next_state = TRAINERROR;
    402                                                  end else if (init_train_en_reg && i_train_active_error) begin
    403             1                         46           next_state = TRAINERROR;
    404                                                  end else begin
    405                                                    // Normal sequencing — only override next_state if transition
    406                                                    case (current_state)
    407                                                      RESET: begin
    408                                                        // Next state if:
    409                                                        // (done_tx_reset && raw_done_rx_reset) OR (done_rx_reset && raw_done_tx_reset)
    410                                                        // OR (done_tx_reset && done_rx_reset) OR (raw_done_tx_reset && raw_done_rx_reset)
    411                                                        if ((done_tx_reset && raw_done_rx_reset) ||
    412                                                            (done_rx_reset && raw_done_tx_reset) ||
    413                                                            (done_tx_reset && done_rx_reset) ||
    414                                                            (raw_done_tx_reset && raw_done_rx_reset))
    415             1                         24                 next_state = SBINIT;
    416                                                      end
    417                                              
    418                                                      SBINIT: begin
    419                                                        if ((done_tx_sbinit && raw_done_rx_sbinit) ||
    420                                                            (done_rx_sbinit && raw_done_tx_sbinit) ||
    421                                                            (done_tx_sbinit && done_rx_sbinit) ||
    422                                                            (raw_done_tx_sbinit && raw_done_rx_sbinit))
    423             1                         24                 next_state = MBINIT_PARAM;
    424                                                      end
    425                                              
    426                                                      MBINIT_PARAM: begin
    427                                                        if ((done_tx_param && raw_done_rx_param) ||
    428                                                            (done_rx_param && raw_done_tx_param) ||
    429                                                            (done_tx_param && done_rx_param) ||
    430                                                            (raw_done_tx_param && raw_done_rx_param))
    431             1                         24                 next_state = MBINIT_CAL;
    432                                                      end
    433                                              
    434                                                      MBINIT_CAL: begin
    435                                                        if ((done_tx_cal && raw_done_rx_cal) ||
    436                                                            (done_rx_cal && raw_done_tx_cal) ||
    437                                                            (done_tx_cal && done_rx_cal) ||
    438                                                            (raw_done_tx_cal && raw_done_rx_cal))
    439             1                         24                 next_state = MBINIT_REPAIRCLK;
    440                                                      end
    441                                              
    442                                                      MBINIT_REPAIRCLK: begin
    443                                                        if ((done_tx_repairclk && raw_done_rx_repairclk) ||
    444                                                            (done_rx_repairclk && raw_done_tx_repairclk) ||
    445                                                            (done_tx_repairclk && done_rx_repairclk) ||
    446                                                            (raw_done_tx_repairclk && raw_done_rx_repairclk))
    447             1                         24                 next_state = MBINIT_REPAIRVAL;
    448                                                      end
    449                                              
    450                                                      MBINIT_REPAIRVAL: begin
    451                                                        if ((done_tx_repairval && raw_done_rx_repairval) ||
    452                                                            (done_rx_repairval && raw_done_tx_repairval) ||
    453                                                            (done_tx_repairval && done_rx_repairval) ||
    454                                                            (raw_done_tx_repairval && raw_done_rx_repairval))
    455             1                         24                 next_state = MBINIT_REVERSAL;
    456                                                      end
    457                                              
    458                                                      MBINIT_REVERSAL: begin
    459                                                        if ((done_tx_reversal && raw_done_rx_reversal) ||
    460                                                            (done_rx_reversal && raw_done_tx_reversal) ||
    461                                                            (done_tx_reversal && done_rx_reversal) ||
    462                                                            (raw_done_tx_reversal && raw_done_rx_reversal))
    463             1                         24                 next_state = MBINIT_REPAIRMB;
    464                                                      end
    465                                              
    466                                                      MBINIT_REPAIRMB: begin
    467                                                        // Stay here once both done; init_train_en will be asserted
    468                                                        // Active-training error handled in the global override above
    469             1                         96               next_state = MBINIT_REPAIRMB;
    470                                                      end
    471                                              
    472                                                      TRAINERROR: begin
    473                                                        if ((done_tx_trainerror && raw_done_rx_trainerror) ||
    474                                                            (done_rx_trainerror && raw_done_tx_trainerror) ||
    475                                                            (done_tx_trainerror && done_rx_trainerror) ||
    476                                                            (raw_done_tx_trainerror && raw_done_rx_trainerror))
    477             1                         23                 next_state = RESET;
    478                                                      end
    479                                              
    480             1                          2             default: next_state = RESET;
    481                                                    endcase
    482                                                  end
    483                                                end
    484                                              
    485                                                // Add a registered always_ff process to update current_state
    486             1                        500       always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    487             1                         48         if (i_reset) current_state <= RESET;
    488             1                        452         else current_state <= next_state;
    489                                                end
    490                                              
    491                                                // =========================================================================
    492                                                // Sub-FSM outputs  (per-state wires)
    493                                                // =========================================================================
    494                                              
    495                                                // ---- RESET ----
    496                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_reset;
    497                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_reset;
    498                                              
    499                                                // ---- SBINIT ----
    500                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_sbinit;
    501                                                logic tx_sb_req_sbinit, tx_sb_rsp_sbinit, tx_sb_done_sbinit;
    502                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_sbinit;
    503                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_sbinit;
    504                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_sbinit;
    505                                                logic rx_sb_req_sbinit, rx_sb_rsp_sbinit, rx_sb_done_sbinit;
    506                                              
    507                                                // ---- MBINIT_PARAM ----
    508                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_param;
    509                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_param;
    510                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_param;
    511                                                logic tx_sb_req_param, tx_sb_rsp_param, tx_sb_done_param;
    512                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_param;
    513                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_param;
    514                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_param;
    515                                                logic rx_sb_req_param, rx_sb_rsp_param, rx_sb_done_param;
    516                                              
    517                                                // ---- MBINIT_CAL ----
    518                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_cal;
    519                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_cal;
    520                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_cal;
    521                                                logic tx_sb_req_cal, tx_sb_rsp_cal, tx_sb_done_cal;
    522                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_cal;
    523                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_cal;
    524                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_cal;
    525                                                logic rx_sb_req_cal, rx_sb_rsp_cal, rx_sb_done_cal;
    526                                              
    527                                                // ---- MBINIT_REPAIRCLK ----
    528                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_repairclk;
    529                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_repairclk;
    530                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_repairclk;
    531                                                logic tx_sb_req_repairclk, tx_sb_rsp_repairclk, tx_sb_done_repairclk;
    532                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_repairclk;
    533                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_repairclk;
    534                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_repairclk;
    535                                                logic rx_sb_req_repairclk, rx_sb_rsp_repairclk, rx_sb_done_repairclk;
    536                                              
    537                                                // ---- MBINIT_REPAIRVAL ----
    538                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_repairval;
    539                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_repairval;
    540                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_repairval;
    541                                                logic tx_sb_req_repairval, tx_sb_rsp_repairval, tx_sb_done_repairval;
    542                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_repairval;
    543                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_repairval;
    544                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_repairval;
    545                                                logic rx_sb_req_repairval, rx_sb_rsp_repairval, rx_sb_done_repairval;
    546                                              
    547                                                // ---- MBINIT_REVERSAL ----
    548                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_reversal;
    549                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_reversal;
    550                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_reversal;
    551                                                logic tx_sb_req_reversal, tx_sb_rsp_reversal, tx_sb_done_reversal;
    552                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_reversal;
    553                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_reversal;
    554                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_reversal;
    555                                                logic rx_sb_req_reversal, rx_sb_rsp_reversal, rx_sb_done_reversal;
    556                                              
    557                                                // ---- MBINIT_REPAIRMB ----
    558                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_repairmb;
    559                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_repairmb;
    560                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_repairmb;
    561                                                logic tx_sb_req_repairmb, tx_sb_rsp_repairmb, tx_sb_done_repairmb;
    562                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_repairmb;
    563                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_repairmb;
    564                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_repairmb;
    565                                                logic rx_sb_req_repairmb, rx_sb_rsp_repairmb, rx_sb_done_repairmb;
    566                                              
    567                                                // ---- TRAINERROR ----
    568                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] tx_enc_trainerror;
    569                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_data_trainerror;
    570                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] tx_info_trainerror;
    571                                                logic tx_sb_req_trainerror, tx_sb_rsp_trainerror, tx_sb_done_trainerror;
    572                                                logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] rx_enc_trainerror;
    573                                                logic [    DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rx_data_trainerror;
    574                                                logic [    INFO_WIDTH-1:0] rx_info_trainerror;
    575                                                logic rx_sb_req_trainerror, rx_sb_rsp_trainerror, rx_sb_done_trainerror;
    576                                              
    577                                                //================================================================================
    578                                                // Sideband Done Signal Logic
    579                                                //================================================================================
    580                                                // Generates done pulse for sideband protocol
    581             1                       5107       always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    582                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    583             1                         48           o_tx_sb_done <= 0;
    584                                                  end else begin
    585                                                    if (o_tx_sb_done && !(i_sb_tx_rsp || i_sb_tx_req)) begin
    586             1                       1043             o_tx_sb_done <= 0;  // Self-clearing pulse
    587                                                    end else if (i_sb_tx_rsp || i_sb_tx_req) begin
    588             1                       2422             o_tx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    589                                                    end
    590                                                  end
    591                                                end
    592                                              
    593             1                       5056       always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    594                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    595             1                         48           o_rx_sb_done <= 0;
    596                                                  end else begin
    597                                                    if (o_rx_sb_done && !(i_sb_rx_rsp || i_sb_rx_req)) begin
    598             1                       1006             o_rx_sb_done <= 0;  // Self-clearing pulse
    599                                                    end else if (i_sb_rx_rsp || i_sb_rx_req) begin
    600             1                       2348             o_rx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    601                                                    end
    602                                                  end
    603                                                end
    604                                              
    605                                              
    606                                              
    607                                                // =========================================================================
    608                                                // Sub-FSM Instantiations
    609                                                // =========================================================================
    610                                              
    611                                                // ----- TX RESET -----
    612                                                ucie_ltsm_tx_reset #(
    613                                                    .DECODING_WIDTH(DECODING_WIDTH)
    614                                                ) u_tx_reset (
    615                                                    .i_clk          (i_clk),
    616                                                    .i_reset        (i_reset),
    617                                                    .i_pll_stable   (i_pll_stable),
    618                                                    .i_supply_stable(i_supply_stable),
    619                                                    .i_timer_4ms    (i_timer_4ms),
    620                                                    .i_current_state(current_state),
    621                                                    .o_tx_encoding  (tx_enc_reset),
    622                                                    .o_done_reset_tx(raw_done_tx_reset)
    623                                                );
    624                                              
    625                                                // ----- RX RESET -----
    626                                                ucie_ltsm_rx_reset #(
    627                                                    .DECODING_WIDTH(DECODING_WIDTH)
    628                                                ) u_rx_reset (
    629                                                    .i_clk          (i_clk),
    630                                                    .i_reset        (i_reset),
    631                                                    .init_train_en  (init_train_en_reg),
    632                                                    .i_pll_stable   (i_pll_stable),
    633                                                    .i_supply_stable(i_supply_stable),
    634                                                    .i_timer_4ms    (i_timer_4ms),
    635                                                    .i_current_state(current_state),
    636                                                    .o_rx_encoding  (rx_enc_reset),
    637                                                    .o_done_reset_rx(raw_done_rx_reset)
    638                                                );
    639                                              
    640                                                // ----- TX SBINIT -----
    641                                                ucie_ltsm_tx_sbinit #(
    642                                                    .DECODING_WIDTH(DECODING_WIDTH),
    643                                                    .DATA_WIDTH    (DATA_WIDTH)
    644                                                ) u_tx_sbinit (
    645                                                    .i_clk           (i_clk),
    646                                                    .i_reset         (i_reset),
    647                                                    .i_tx_decoding   (i_tx_decoding),
    648                                                    .i_sb_tx_req     (i_sb_tx_req),
    649                                                    .i_sb_tx_rsp     (i_sb_tx_rsp),
    650                                                    .i_sb_tx_done    (i_sb_tx_done),
    651                                                    .i_sb_ready      (i_sb_ready),
    652                                                    .i_current_state (current_state),
    653                                                    .o_timer_8ms     (o_timer_8ms),
    654                                                    .o_tx_encoding   (tx_enc_sbinit),
    655                                                    .o_tx_sb_req     (tx_sb_req_sbinit),
    656                                                    .o_tx_sb_rsp     (tx_sb_rsp_sbinit),
    657                                                    .o_tx_sb_done    (tx_sb_done_sbinit),
    658                                                    .o_train_error   (te_tx_sbinit),
    659                                                    .o_sb_init_start (sb_init_start_tx),
    660                                                    .o_done_sbinit_tx(raw_done_tx_sbinit)
    661                                                );
    662                                                assign o_sb_init_start = sb_init_start_tx;
    663                                              
    664                                                // ----- RX SBINIT -----
    665                                                ucie_ltsm_rx_sbinit #(
    666                                                    .DECODING_WIDTH(DECODING_WIDTH),
    667                                                    .DATA_WIDTH    (DATA_WIDTH),
    668                                                    .INFO_WIDTH    (INFO_WIDTH)
    669                                                ) u_rx_sbinit (
    670                                                    .i_clk           (i_clk),
    671                                                    .i_reset         (i_reset),
    672                                                    .i_rx_decoding   (i_rx_decoding),
    673                                                    .i_rx_data       (i_rx_data),
    674                                                    .i_rx_info       (i_rx_info),
    675                                                    .i_sb_rx_req     (i_sb_rx_req),
    676                                                    .i_sb_rx_rsp     (i_sb_rx_rsp),
    677                                                    .i_sb_rx_done    (i_sb_rx_done),
    678                                                    .i_rx_done       (i_rx_done),
    679                                                    .init_train_en   (init_train_en_reg),
    680                                                    .i_sb_ready      (i_sb_ready),
    681                                                    .i_current_state (current_state),
    682                                                    .o_timer_8ms     (o_timer_8ms),
    683                                                    .o_rx_encoding   (rx_enc_sbinit),
    684                                                    .o_rx_data       (rx_data_sbinit),
    685                                                    .o_rx_info       (rx_info_sbinit),
    686                                                    .o_rx_sb_req     (rx_sb_req_sbinit),
    687                                                    .o_rx_sb_rsp     (rx_sb_rsp_sbinit),
    688                                                    .o_rx_sb_done    (rx_sb_done_sbinit),
    689                                                    .o_train_error   (te_rx_sbinit),
    690                                                    .o_sb_init_start (  /* open — TX drives this */),
    691                                                    .o_done_sbinit_rx(raw_done_rx_sbinit)
    692                                                );
    693                                              
    694                                                // ----- TX MBINIT_PARAM -----
    695                                                ucie_ltsm_tx_mbinit_param #(
    696                                                    .DECODING_WIDTH(DECODING_WIDTH),
    697                                                    .DATA_WIDTH    (DATA_WIDTH),
    698                                                    .INFO_WIDTH    (INFO_WIDTH)
    699                                                ) u_tx_param (
    700                                                    .i_clk                 (i_clk),

    73                                                   output logic failed_test,   // Current test failed
    74                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] per_lane_result,   // Current test failed
    75                                                   output logic done           // Eye sweep test complete
    76                                               );
    77                                               
    78                                               //================================================================================
    79                                               // State Machine Definitions
    80                                               //================================================================================
    81                                               
    82                                               // State encoding for eye sweep sequence
    83                                               localparam REQ_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;            // Initial request handshake
    84                                               localparam LFSR_HANDSHAKE = 3'b001;           // LFSR (pseudo-random) setup handshake
    85                                               localparam DATA_GENERATE = 3'b010;            // Data pattern generation state
    86                                               localparam RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b011;         // Result collection handshake
    87                                               localparam SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b100;   // Sweep parameter result handshake
    88                                               localparam END_HANDSHAKE = 3'b101;            // Final completion handshake
    89                                               
    90                                               // State registers
    91                                               logic [2:0] CS;  // Current state
    92                                               logic [2:0] NS;  // Next state
    93                                               
    94                                               logic [2:0] count;
    95                                               logic [2:0] count_reg;
    96                                               
    97                                               logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] per_lane_result_old;
    98                                               logic failed_test_old;
    99                                               
    100                                              //================================================================================
    101                                              // State Machine Sequential Logic
    102                                              //================================================================================
    103                                              
    104                                              // State register update
    105             1                       3969     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    106                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    107             1                       2411             CS <= REQ_HANDSHAKE;  // Reset to initial state
    108             1                       2411             count <= 0;
    109                                                  end else begin
    110             1                       1558             CS <= NS;             // Advance to next state
    111             1                       1558             count <= count_reg;   // Update count register
    112                                                  end
    113                                              end
    114                                              
    115             1                         53     always @(posedge i_clk) begin
    116             1                         53         per_lane_result_old <= per_lane_result;  // Capture previous per-lane result for reporting
    117             1                         53         failed_test_old <= failed_test;          // Capture previous test result for reporting
    118                                              end
    119                                              
    120                                              
    121                                              //================================================================================
    122                                              // Main State Machine Combinational Logic
    123                                              //================================================================================
    124             1                      10833     always @(*) begin
    125             1                      10833             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    126             1                      10833             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    127             1                      10833             done = 0;
    128             1                      10833             train_error = 0;
    129             1                      10833             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    130             1                      10833             o_xx_info = 0;
    131             1                      10833             o_xx_data = 0;
    132             1                      10833             per_lane_result = per_lane_result_old;
    133             1                      10833             count_reg = count;
    134             1                      10833             failed_test = failed_test_old;
    135             1                      10833             NS = CS;
    136             1                      10833             o_xx_encoding = 0;
    137                                                      // Two different sequences based on init flag
    138                                                      if (init) begin
    139                                                          //====================================================================
    140                                                          // INITIALIZATION MODE - TX initiates the test
    141                                                          //====================================================================
    142                                                          case (CS)
    143                                                              // State 0: Send initial test request
    144                                                              REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    145             1                         63                         o_xx_encoding = 'h180;  // Request encoding
    146             1                         63                         done = 0;
    147             1                         63                         count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    148             1                         63                         train_error = 0;
    149             1                         63                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    150                                              
    151                                                                  // Request handshake with acknowledge
    152             1                         27                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    153             1                         36                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    154                                              
    155             1                         63                         o_xx_info = ERROR_THRESHOLD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    156                                              
    157                                                                  if (comparison_type) begin
    158                                                                      o_xx_data = valid_DATA_FIELD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    159                                                                  end else begin
    160             1                         63                             o_xx_data = data_DATA_FIELD;  // Send data pattern parameters
    161                                                                  end
    162                                              
    163                                                                  // Wait for matching response
    164                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h180) begin
    165             1                         18                             o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    166             1                         18                             NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    167             1                         18                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    168             1                         18                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    169                                                                  end 
    170             1                         45                         else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    171                                                              end 
    172                                              
    173                                                              // State 1: Setup LFSR (Linear Feedback Shift Register) for pattern generation
    174                                                              LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    175             1                         63                         o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    176             1                         63                         done = 0;
    177                                              
    178             1                         27                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    179             1                         36                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    180                                              
    181                                                                  // Wait for LFSR setup confirmation
    182                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h181) begin
    183             1                         18                             o_xx_encoding = 'h182;  // Data generation encoding
    184             1                         18                             count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    185             1                         18                             NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    186             1                         18                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    187             1                         18                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    188                                                                  end 
    189             1                         45                         else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    190                                                              end 
    191                                              
    192                                                              // State 2: Generate test data patterns
    193                                                              DATA_GENERATE: begin
    194             1                         27                         o_xx_encoding = 'h182;  // Data generation encoding
    195             1                         27                         done = 0;
    196                                              
    197                                                                  // Wait for data generation to complete
    198                                                                  if (i_xx_done) begin
    199             1                          9                             o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // Result collection encoding
    200             1                          9                             NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    201             1                          9                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    202             1                          9                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    203                                                                  end
    204             1                         18                         else NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    205                                                              end 
    206                                              
    207                                                              // State 3: Collect test results from RX
    208                                                              RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    209             1                         27                         o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // Result collection encoding
    210             1                         27                         done = 0;
    211                                              
    212                                                                  if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    213             1                         27                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    214                                              
    215                                                                  // Check result and decide on retry
    216                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h183) begin
    217             1                          9                             failed_test = !(&i_xx_data);  // Test fails if any bit is 0
    218             1                          9                             per_lane_result = i_xx_data;  // Capture per-lane results for reporting
    219                                                                      // Retry if failed and retries allowed, otherwise complete
    220                                                                      if (failed_test && !no_retry) begin
    221                                                                          if (count == MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS) begin
    222                                                                              train_error = 1;  // Mark training error if max retries reached
    223                                                                          end else begin
    224                                                                              o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    225                                                                              NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    226                                                                              o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    227                                                                              o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    228                                                                              train_error = 0;  // Clear training error for retry
    229                                                                          end 
    230                                                                      end else begin
    231             1                          9                                 o_xx_encoding = 'h184;  // End encoding
    232             1                          9                                 NS = END_HANDSHAKE;
    233             1                          9                                 o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    234             1                          9                                 o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    235                                                                      end
    236             1                         18                         end else NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    237                                              
    238                                                              end 
    239                                              
    240                                                              // State 4: Final handshake to complete test
    241                                                              END_HANDSHAKE: begin
    242             1                         63                         o_xx_encoding = 'h184;  // End encoding
    243                                              
    244             1                         27                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    245             1                         36                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    246                                              
    247                                                                  // Signal completion when acknowledged
    248             1                         18                         if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h184) done = 1;
    249             1                         45                         else done = 0;
    250                                                              end 
    251                                                          endcase
    252                                                      end else begin
    253                                                          //====================================================================
    254                                                          // NON-INITIALIZATION MODE - TX responds to RX-initiated test
    255                                                          //====================================================================
    256                                                          case (CS)
    257                                                              // State 0: Respond to initial test request
    258                                                              REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    259             1                       5633                         o_xx_encoding = 'h188;  // Response encoding
    260             1                       5633                         done = 0;
    261             1                       5633                         count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    262             1                       5633                         train_error = 0;
    263                                              
    264                                                                  // Response handshake
    265             1                       1682                         if (i_sb_xx_done) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    266             1                       3951                         else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    267                                              
    268                                                                  // Wait for done signal
    269                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_done) begin
    270             1                       1682                             o_xx_info = i_xx_info;  // Send error threshold parameter
    271             1                       1682                             o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    272             1                       1682                             NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    273             1                       1682                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    274             1                       1682                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    275                                                                  end
    276             1                       3951                         else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    277                                                              end 
    278                                              
    279                                                              // State 1: Setup LFSR for pattern generation
    280                                                              LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    281             1                       1275                         o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    282             1                       1275                         done = 0;
    283                                              
    284             1                        580                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    285             1                        695                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    286                                              
    287                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h189) begin
    288             1                        278                             o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data generation encoding
    289             1                        278                             count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    290             1                        278                             NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    291             1                        278                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    292             1                        278                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    293                                                                  end 
    294             1                        997                         else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    295                                                              end 
    296                                              
    297                                                              // State 2: Generate test data patterns
    298                                                              DATA_GENERATE: begin
    299             1                        834                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data generation encoding
    300             1                        834                         done = 0;
    301                                              
    302                                                                  if (i_xx_done) begin
    303             1                        139                             o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result collection encoding
    304             1                        139                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    305             1                        139                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    306             1                        139                             NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    307                                                                  end
    308             1                        695                         else NS = DATA_GENERATE;
    309                                                              end
    310                                              
    311                                                              // State 3: Collect test results
    312                                                              RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    313             1                       1237                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result collection encoding
    314             1                       1237                         done = 0;
    315                                              
    316             1                        556                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    317             1                        681                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    318                                                                  
    319                                              
    320                                                                  // Check result and decide on retry
    321                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h18B) begin
    322             1                        280                             failed_test = !(&i_xx_data);  // Test fails if any bit is 0
    323                                                                      // Retry if failed and retries allowed, otherwise get sweep result
    324                                                                      if (failed_test && !no_retry) begin
    325                                                                          if (count == MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS) begin
    326             1                         10                                     train_error = 1;  // Mark training error if max retries reached
    327                                                                          end else begin
    328             1                         24                                     o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    329             1                         24                                     NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    330             1                         24                                     o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    331             1                         24                                     o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    332             1                         24                                     train_error = 0;  // Clear training error for retry
    333                                                                          end
    334                                                                      end else begin
    335             1                        246                                 o_xx_encoding = 'h18C;  // Sweep result encoding
    336             1                        246                                 o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    337             1                        246                                 o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    338             1                        246                                 NS = SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    339                                                                      end
    340             1                        957                         end else NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    341                                                              end 
    342                                              
    343                                                              // State 4: Send sweep parameter results
    344                                                              SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    345             1                        861                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18C;  // Sweep result encoding
    346             1                        861                         done = 0;
    347             1                        861                         o_xx_data = i_xx_sweep_result;  // Send sweep measurement data
    348                                              
    349             1                        369                         if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    350             1                        492                         else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    351                                              
    352                                                                  // Wait for acknowledgement
    353                                                                  if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h18D) begin
    354             1                        123                             o_xx_encoding = 'h18D;  // End encoding
    355             1                        123                             NS = END_HANDSHAKE;
    356             1                        123                             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    357             1                        123                             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    358                                                                  end
    359             1                        738                         else NS = SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    360                                                              end 
    361                                              
    362                                                              // State 5: Final handshake to complete test
    363                                                              END_HANDSHAKE: begin
    364             1                        747                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18D;  // End encoding
    365             1                        747                         o_xx_data = 0;          // Clear data
    366                                              
    367                                                                  // Response handshake
    368             1                        369                         if (i_sb_xx_done) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;

    179                                              // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    180                                              // o_lane_map_tx â€” combinational from registered r_per_lane_result
    181                                              //   Bits [15:0]: 1 = lane good, 0 = lane bad
    182                                              //   ALL_LANES_FUNCTIONAL : all 16 bits set
    183                                              //   LANES_0_TO_7         : some good in [7:0], none in [15:8]
    184                                              //   LANES_8_TO_15        : none in [7:0], some good in [15:8]
    185                                              //   DEGRADE_NOT_POSSIBLE : both halves mixed, or all bad
    186                                              // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    187             1                          5     always_comb begin
    188                                                  if (&per_lane_result[15:0])
    189             1                          1             o_lane_map_tx = 3'b011;  // ALL_LANES_FUNCTIONAL
    190                                                  else if (&per_lane_result[7:0] && !(&per_lane_result[15:8]))
    191             1                          1             o_lane_map_tx = 3'b001;
    192                                                  else if (!(&per_lane_result[7:0]) && &per_lane_result[15:8])
    193             1                          1             o_lane_map_tx = 3'b010;
    194                                                  else
    195             1                          2             o_lane_map_tx = 3'b000;
    196                                              end
    197

    253             1                       5113     assign r_eye_sweep_reset = !clock_to_test_enable && !i_reset;
    254                                              
    255                                              //================================================================================
    256                                              // Done Acknowledgement Logic
    257                                              //================================================================================
    258                                              // Tracks when done signal has been acknowledged in handshake protocol.
    259                                              // done_ack is cleared whenever the encoding changes (new state/substate),
    260                                              // ensuring the handshake re-arms for each distinct transaction.
    261             1                       9384     always @(*) begin
    262             1                       9384         done_ack = done_ack_old;
    263             1                       2380         if (!init_train_en) done_ack = 0;
    264             1                       1944         else if (o_tx_encoding[2:0] != o_tx_encoding_old[2:0]) done_ack = 0;  // New encoding â†’ reset ack
    265                                                  else if (i_sb_tx_done) begin
    266             1                       2223             done_ack = 1;  // Set when done received
    267                                                  end else if (i_sb_tx_rsp) begin
    268             1                        619             done_ack = 0;  // Clear on response to allow next transaction
    269                                                  end

    291                                              // Sideband Done Signal Logic

    297                                                  end else begin

    300                                                      end else if (i_sb_tx_rsp || i_sb_tx_req) begin
    301             1                       2422                 o_tx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    302                                                      end

    304                                              end

    306             1                        318     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
