    311                                                  end
    312                                              end
    313                                              
    314                                              //================================================================================
    315                                              // Main State Machine Combinational Logic
    316                                              //================================================================================
    317                                              // Each MBTRAIN state follows the same 3-substate pattern:
    318                                              //   Substate 0 â€” Initial handshake: assert sideband request / wait for peer response.
    319                                              //   Substate 1 â€” Eye sweep: enable clock_to_test module; pipe its outputs to TX outputs.
    320                                              //   Substate 2 â€” Completion handshake: de-assert eye sweep; confirm with peer before
    321                                              //                advancing to the next major state via previous_state_done.
    322                                              // States without an embedded eye sweep (e.g. RXCLKCAL, RXDESKEW) skip substate 1.
    323                                              //================================================================================
    324             1                      12763     always @(*) begin
    325             1                      12763         L1_access = 0;
    326             1                      12763         comparison_type = 0;
    327             1                      12763         o_tx_data_reg = 0;
    328             1                      12763         o_tx_info_reg = 0;
    329             1                      12763         NS = CS;
    330             1                      12763         next_substate = current_substate;
    331             1                      12763         substates_done = substates_done_old;  // Default to retaining previous value
    332             1                      12763         o_speedreg = o_speedreg_old;
    333             1                      12763         o_pl_speedmode = o_pl_speedmode_old;
    334             1                      12763         train_link_init_en_reg = train_link_init_en;
    335             1                      12763         train_phyretrain_en_reg = train_phyretrain_en;
    336             1                      12763         train_phyretrain_en_reg = train_phyretrain_en;
    337             1                      12763         phyretrain_linkspeed_transition = phyretrain_linkspeed_transition_old;
    338             1                      12763         trainerror = 0;
    339             1                      12763         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    340             1                      12763         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    341             1                      12763         o_tx_encoding_reg = 0;
    342             1                      12763         o_tx_encoding_reg = 0;
    343             1                      12763         clock_to_test_enable = 0;  // Default to eye sweep disabled
    344             1                      12763         init = 0;        // Default to not initialization mode
    345             1                      12763         comparison_type = 0;        // Default to data signal training
    346             1                      12763         no_retry = 0;    // Default to allowing retries
    347                                                  if (!init_train_en) begin
    348             1                       4246             substates_done = 0;
    349                                                  end else
    350                                                      // On training error (timeout, eye sweep failure, or speed negotiation error),
    351                                                      // abort immediately back to VALVREF so the full calibration sequence restarts.
    352                                                  if (train_error_pip) begin
    353             1                         32             NS = VALVREF;
    354             1                         32             substates_done = 0;
    355             1                         32             clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    356                                                  end else begin
    357                                                          case (CS)
    358                                                              //====================================================================
    359                                                              // VALVREF State: Valid Signal Reference Voltage Calibration
    360                                                              //====================================================================
    361                                                              VALVREF: begin
    362                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    363                                                                      case (current_substate)
    364                                                                          // Substate 0: Send initial handshake request
    365                                                                          0: begin
    366             1                        144                                     NS = VALVREF;
    367             1                        144                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h80;  // VALVREF request encoding
    368             1                        144                                     next_substate = 0;
    369                                              
    370             1                        144                                     substates_done = 0;
    371             1                        144                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    372             1                        144                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    373             1                        144                                     trainerror = 0;
    374                                              
    375                                                                              // Request/acknowledge handshake
    376             1                         72                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    377             1                         72                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    378                                              
    379                                                                              // Wait for matching response
    380                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_req && i_tx_decoding == 'h188) begin
    381             1                         23                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h188;
    382             1                         23                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    383             1                         23                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    384             1                         23                                         next_substate = 1;
    385             1                        121                                     end else next_substate = 0;
    386                                                                          end  
    387                                                                          // Substate 1: Run eye sweep test
    388                                                                          1:begin
    389             1                        858                                     clock_to_test_enable = 1;  // Enable eye sweep module
    390                                                                              // Connect eye sweep outputs to TX outputs
    391             1                        858                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = o_tx_encoding_data_to_clock_test;
    392             1                        858                                     o_tx_data_reg = o_tx_data_data_to_clock_test;
    393             1                        858                                     o_tx_info_reg = o_tx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    394             1                        858                                     o_tx_sb_req_reg = o_tx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    395             1                        858                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = o_tx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    396                                                                              
    397             1                        858                                     init = 0;        // Not initialization mode
    398             1                        858                                     comparison_type = 1;        // Valid signal training        // Not initialization mode
    399             1                        858                                     no_retry = 0;    // Allow retries
    400             1                        858                                     substates_done = 0;
    401                                              
    402                                                                              // Wait for eye sweep completion
    403                                                                              if (clock_to_test_done) begin
    404             1                         22                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h82;
    405             1                         22                                         next_substate = 2;
    406             1                         22                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    407             1                         22                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    408             1                        836                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    409                                                                          end
    410                                              
    411                                                                          // Substate 2: Send completion handshake
    412                                                                          2: begin
    413             1                        171                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    414             1                        171                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    415                                              
    416             1                        171                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h82;  // VALVREF complete encoding
    417             1                        171                                     NS = VALVREF;
    418                                              
    419                                                                              // Request/acknowledge handshake
    420                                                                              if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    421             1                        171                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    422                                              
    423                                                                              // Wait for matching response to complete substates
    424                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'h82) begin
    425             1                         42                                         substates_done = 1;
    426             1                         42                                         next_substate = 0;
    427                                                                              end else begin
    428             1                        129                                         substates_done = 0;
    429             1                        129                                         next_substate = 2;
    430                                                                              end 
    431                                                                          end  
    432                                                                          default:begin
    433                                                                              
    434                                                                          end
    435                                                                      endcase
    436                                                                  end
    437                                                                  // Check if both sides completed the state (handshake complete)
    438                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'h82 && encoding_rsp_received == 'h82) begin
    439             1                         21                             NS = DATAVREF;  // Move to next training state
    440             1                         21                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h88;
    441             1                         21                             substates_done = 0;
    442             1                         21                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    443             1                         21                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    444                                                                  end else begin
    445             1                       1152                             NS = VALVREF;
    446                                                                  end 
    447                                                              end
    448                                              
    449                                                              //====================================================================
    450                                                              // DATAVREF State: Data Signal Reference Voltage Calibration
    451                                                              //====================================================================
    452                                                              DATAVREF: begin
    453                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    454                                                                      case (current_substate)
    455                                                                          0: begin
    456             1                        126                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h88;
    457             1                        126                                     NS = DATAVREF;
    458             1                        126                                     substates_done = 0;
    459                                              
    460             1                         63                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    461             1                         63                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    462                                              
    463                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_req && i_tx_decoding == 'h188) begin
    464             1                         20                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h188;
    465             1                         20                                         next_substate = 1;
    466             1                         20                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    467             1                         20                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    468             1                        106                                     end else next_substate = 0;
    469                                                                          end  
    470                                              
    471                                                                          1: begin
    472             1                        753                                     clock_to_test_enable = 1;
    473             1                        753                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = o_tx_encoding_data_to_clock_test;
    474             1                        753                                     o_tx_data_reg = o_tx_data_data_to_clock_test;
    475             1                        753                                     o_tx_info_reg = o_tx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    476             1                        753                                     o_tx_sb_req_reg = o_tx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    477             1                        753                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = o_tx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    478                                                                              
    479             1                        753                                     init = 0;        // Not initialization mode
    480             1                        753                                     comparison_type = 0;        // Valid signal training
    481             1                        753                                     no_retry = 0;
    482             1                        753                                     substates_done = 0;
    483                                              
    484                                                                              if (clock_to_test_done) begin
    485             1                         19                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h8A;
    486             1                         19                                         next_substate = 2;
    487             1                         19                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    488             1                         19                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    489             1                        734                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    490                                                                          end  
    491                                              
    492                                                                          2: begin
    493             1                        237                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    494             1                        237                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    495             1                        237                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h8A;
    496             1                        237                                     NS = DATAVREF; 
    497                                              
    498             1                        144                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    499             1                         93                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    500                                              
    501                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'h8A) begin
    502             1                         36                                         substates_done = 1;
    503             1                         36                                         next_substate = 0;
    504                                                                              end else begin
    505             1                        201                                         substates_done = 0;
    506             1                        201                                         next_substate = 2;
    507                                                                              end 
    508                                                                          end  
    509                                                                          default:begin
    510                                                                              
    511                                                                          end
    512                                                                      endcase
    513                                                                  end
    514                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'h8A && encoding_rsp_received == 'h8A) begin
    515             1                         18                             NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    516             1                         18                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    517             1                         18                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    518             1                         18                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    519             1                         18                             substates_done = 0;
    520                                                                  end else begin
    521             1                       1098                             NS = DATAVREF;
    522                                                                  end 
    523                                                              end
    524                                              
    525                                                              //====================================================================
    526                                                              // SPEEDIDLE State: Speed and Idle Configuration
    527                                                              //====================================================================
    528                                                              SPEEDIDLE: begin
    529                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    530                                                                      case (current_substate)
    531                                                                          0: begin
    532             1                        186                                     NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    533             1                        186                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    534             1                        186                                     substates_done = 0;
    535                                              
    536                                                                              if (i_tx_done) begin
    537                                                                                  if (i_speedreg) begin
    538                                                                                      // Decrement speed register by 1 (step down to next lower rate)
    539                                                                                      // and broadcast the agreed speed mode to the PL interface.
    540             1                         45                                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hCA;
    541             1                         45                                             next_substate = 1;
    542             1                         45                                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    543             1                         45                                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    544                                                                                      if (first_attempt) begin
    545             1                         35                                                 o_speedreg = 'h5;
    546             1                         35                                                 o_pl_speedmode = 'h5;
    547                                                                                      end else if (!L1_access) begin
    548             1                         10                                                 o_pl_speedmode = i_speedreg - 1;
    549             1                         10                                                 o_speedreg = i_speedreg - 1;
    550                                                                                      end else if (L1_access) begin
    551                                                                                          o_pl_speedmode = i_speedreg;
    552                                                                                          o_speedreg = i_speedreg;
    553                                                                                          L1_access = 0;
    554                                                                                      end else begin
    555                                                                                          o_pl_speedmode = i_speedreg;
    556                                                                                          o_speedreg = i_speedreg;
    557                                                                                      end
    558                                                                                  end else begin
    559                                                                                      // Speed mismatch error
    560             1                          1                                             trainerror = 1;
    561                                                                                  end
    562                                                                              end
    563                                                                          end  
    564                                              
    565                                                                          1: begin
    566             1                        115                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hCA;
    567             1                        115                                     NS = SPEEDIDLE; 
    568                                              
    569                                                                              if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    570             1                        115                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    571                                              
    572                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'hCA) begin
    573             1                         46                                         substates_done = 1;
    574             1                         46                                         next_substate = 0;
    575                                                                              end else begin
    576             1                         69                                         substates_done = 0;
    577             1                         69                                         next_substate = 1;
    578                                                                              end 
    579                                                                          end  
    580                                                                          default:begin
    581                                                                              
    582                                                                          end
    583                                                                      endcase
    584                                                                  end
    585                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hCA && encoding_rsp_received == 'hCA) begin
    586             1                         23                             NS = TXSELFCAL;
    587             1                         23                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    588             1                         23                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    589             1                         23                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    590             1                         23                             substates_done = 0;
    591                                                                  end else begin
    592             1                        278                             NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    593                                                                  end 
    594                                                              end
    595                                              
    596                                                              //====================================================================
    597                                                              // TXSELFCAL State: TX Self-Calibration
    598                                                              //====================================================================
    599                                                              TXSELFCAL: begin
    600                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    601                                                                      case (current_substate)
    602                                                                          0: begin
    603             1                        159                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    604             1                        159                                     NS = TXSELFCAL;
    605             1                        159                                     substates_done = 0;
    606                                              
    607                                                                              if (i_tx_done) begin
    608             1                         47                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD1;
    609             1                         47                                         next_substate = 1;
    610             1                         47                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    611             1                         47                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    612             1                        112                                     end else next_substate = 0;
    613                                                                          end  
    614                                              
    615                                                                          1: begin
    616             1                        131                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD1;
    617             1                        131                                     NS = TXSELFCAL; 
    618                                              
    619             1                          6                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    620             1                        125                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    621                                              
    622                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'hD0) begin
    623             1                         50                                         substates_done = 1;
    624             1                         50                                         next_substate = 0;
    625                                                                              end else begin
    626             1                         81                                         substates_done = 0;
    627             1                         81                                         next_substate = 1;
    628                                                                              end 
    629                                                                          end  
    630                                                                          default:begin
    631                                                                              
    632                                                                          end
    633                                                                      endcase
    634                                                                  end
    635                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hD0 && encoding_rsp_received == 'hD0) begin
    636             1                         25                             NS = RXCLKCAL;
    637             1                         25                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    638             1                         25                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    639             1                         25                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h98;
    640             1                         25                             substates_done = 0;
    641                                                                  end else begin
    642             1                        265                             NS = TXSELFCAL;
    643                                                                  end 
    644                                                              end
    645                                              
    646                                                              //====================================================================
    647                                                              // RXCLKCAL State: RX Clock Calibration
    648                                                              //====================================================================
    649                                                              RXCLKCAL: begin
    650                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    651                                                                      case (current_substate)
    652                                                                          0: begin
    653             1                        172                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h98;
    654             1                        172                                     NS = RXCLKCAL;
    655             1                        172                                     substates_done = 0;
    656                                              
    657             1                         51                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    658             1                        121                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    659                                              
    660                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'h98) begin
    661             1                         46                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h9A;
    662             1                         46                                         next_substate = 1;
    663             1                         46                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    664             1                         46                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    665             1                        126                                     end else next_substate = 0;
    666                                                                          end   
    667                                                                          
    668                                                                          1: begin
    669             1                        207                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    670             1                        207                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    671             1                        207                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h9A;
    672             1                        207                                     NS = RXCLKCAL; 
    673                                              
    674             1                         46                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    675             1                        161                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    676                                              
    677                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'h9A) begin
    678             1                         46                                         substates_done = 1;
    679             1                         46                                         next_substate = 0;
    680                                                                              end else begin
    681             1                        161                                         substates_done = 0;
    682             1                        161                                         next_substate = 1;
    683                                                                              end 
    684                                                                          end  
    685                                                                          default:begin
    686                                                                              
    687                                                                          end
    688                                                                      endcase
    689                                                                  end
    690                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'h9A && encoding_rsp_received == 'h9A) begin
    691             1                         23                             NS = VALTRAINCENTER;
    692             1                         23                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hA0;
    693             1                         23                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    694             1                         23                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    695             1                         23                             substates_done = 0;
    696                                                                  end else begin
    697             1                        356                             NS = RXCLKCAL;
    698                                                                  end 
    699                                                              end
    700                                              
    701                                                              //====================================================================
    702                                                              // VALTRAINCENTER State: Valid Signal Training - Center Position
    703                                                              //====================================================================
    704                                                              VALTRAINCENTER: begin
    705                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    706                                                                      case (current_substate)
    707                                                                          0: begin
    708             1                        138                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hA0;
    709             1                        138                                     NS = VALTRAINCENTER;
    710             1                        138                                     substates_done = 0;
    711                                              
    712             1                         69                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    713             1                         69                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    714                                              
    715                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_req && i_tx_decoding == 'h188) begin
    716             1                         22                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h188;
    717             1                         22                                         next_substate = 1;
    718             1                         22                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    719             1                         22                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    720             1                        116                                     end else next_substate = 0;
    721                                                                          end  
    722                                              
    723                                                                          1: begin
    724             1                        770                                     clock_to_test_enable = 1;
    725             1                        770                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = o_tx_encoding_data_to_clock_test;
    726             1                        770                                     o_tx_data_reg = o_tx_data_data_to_clock_test;
    727             1                        770                                     o_tx_info_reg = o_tx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    728             1                        770                                     o_tx_sb_req_reg = o_tx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    729             1                        770                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = o_tx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    730                                                                              
    731             1                        770                                     init = 0;        // Not initialization mode
    732             1                        770                                     comparison_type = 1;        // Valid signal training
    733             1                        770                                     no_retry = 0;
    734             1                        770                                     substates_done = 0;
    735                                              
    736                                                                              if (clock_to_test_done) begin
    737             1                         22                                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hA2;
    738             1                         22                                         next_substate = 2;
    739             1                         22                                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    740             1                         22                                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    741             1                        748                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    742                                                                          end  
    743                                              
    744                                                                          2: begin
    745             1                        276                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    746             1                        276                                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    747                                              
    748             1                        276                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hA2;
    749             1                        276                                     NS = VALTRAINCENTER; 
    750                                              
    751             1                        168                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    752             1                        108                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    753                                              
    754                                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'hA2) begin
    755             1                         42                                         substates_done = 1;
    756             1                         42                                         next_substate = 0;
    757                                                                              end else begin

    759             1                        234                                         next_substate = 2;
    760                                                                              end 
    761                                                                          end  
    762                                                                          default:begin
    763                                                                              
    764                                                                          end
    765                                                                      endcase
    766                                                                  end
    767                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hA2 && encoding_rsp_received == 'hA2) begin
    768             1                         21                             NS = VALTRAINVREF;
    769             1                         21                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hE8;
    770             1                         21                             substates_done = 0;
    771             1                         21                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    772             1                         21                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    773                                                                  end else begin
    774             1                       1163                             NS = VALTRAINCENTER;
    775                                                                  end 
    776                                                              end
    777                                              
    778                                                              //====================================================================
    779                                                              // VALTRAINVREF State: Valid Signal Training - Voltage Reference
    780                                                              //====================================================================
    781                                                              VALTRAINVREF: begin
    782                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    783                                                                      case (current_substate)
    784                                                                          0: begin
    785             1                        126                                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hE8;
    786             1                        126                                     NS = VALTRAINVREF;
    787             1                        126                                     substates_done = 0;
    788                                              
    789             1                         63                                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    790             1                         63                                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    791

    8                                                module ucie_RX_Data_to_Clock_eye_sweep #(
    9                                                    parameter DECODING_WIDTH = 9,   // Width of command decoding input
    10                                                   parameter DATA_WIDTH = 64,       // Width of data input/output
    11                                                   parameter INFO_WIDTH = 16,      // Width of info/control output
    12                                                   parameter ERROR_THRESHOLD = 1,   // Error threshold for test pass/fail
    13                                               
    14                                                   parameter logic [63:0] data_DATA_FIELD = {
    15                                                       4'b0000,       // [63:60] Reserved
    16                                                       1'b0,          // [59]    Comparison Mode (Per Lane)
    17                                                       16'd1,         // [58:43] Iteration Count
    18                                                       16'd0,         // [42:27] Idle Count
    19                                                       16'd4000,      // [26:11] Burst Count
    20                                                       1'b0,          // [10]    Pattern Mode (Continuous)
    21                                                       4'h0,          // [9:6]   Clock Phase (Clock PI Center)
    22                                                       3'h0,          // [5:3]   Valid Pattern (Functional)
    23                                                       3'h0           // [2:0]   Data Pattern (LFSR)
    24                                                   },
    25                                               
    26                                                   parameter logic [63:0] valid_DATA_FIELD = {
    27                                                       4'b0000,       // [63:60] Reserved
    28                                                       1'b0,          // [59]    Comparison Mode (Per Lane)
    29                                                       16'd1,         // [58:43] Iteration Count
    30                                                       16'd0,         // [42:27] Idle Count
    31                                                       16'd128,       // [26:11] Burst Count
    32                                                       1'b0,          // [10]    Pattern Mode (Continuous)
    33                                                       4'h0,          // [9:6]   Clock Phase (Clock PI Center)
    34                                                       3'h0,          // [5:3]   Valid Pattern (Functional)
    35                                                       3'h0           // [2:0]   Data Pattern (LFSR)
    36                                                   },
    37                                               
    38                                                   parameter MAXIMUM_ITERATIONS = 4 // Maximum retry attempts before train_error
    39                                               ) (
    40                                                   // Clock and reset
    41                                                   input i_clk,
    42                                                   input i_reset,
    43                                                   
    44                                                   // Interface inputs - from remote TX
    45                                                   input [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_decoding,  // Decoded command from TX
    46                                                   input [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_data,          // Data from TX
    47                                                   input [INFO_WIDTH-1:0] i_xx_info,          // Data from TX
    48                                                   
    49                                                   // Sideband control inputs
    50                                                   input i_sb_xx_req,     // Sideband request from TX
    51                                                   input i_sb_xx_rsp,     // Sideband response from TX
    52                                                   input i_sb_xx_done,    // Sideband done from TX
    53                                                   input i_xx_done,       // Operation complete
    54                                                   
    55                                                   // Control inputs
    56                                                   input done_ack,        // Acknowledgement of done signal
    57                                                   input init,            // Initialize mode flag
    58                                                   input no_retry,        // Disable retry on test failure
    59                                                   input comparison_type,        // 0:data, 1:valid
    60                                                   input [DATA_WIDTH-1 : 0] data_result,          // Test data_result from pattern detector
    61                                                   input valid_result,          // Test data_result from pattern detector
    62                                                   
    63                                                   // Interface outputs - to remote TX
    64                                                   output logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_encoding,  // Encoded command to send
    65                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_data,          // Data to send
    66                                                   output logic [INFO_WIDTH-1:0] o_xx_info,          // Info/control to send
    67                                                   output logic [7:0] o_xx_sweep_result,             // Eye sweep results to send
    68                                                   
    69                                                   // Sideband control outputs
    70                                                   output logic o_xx_sb_req,   // Sideband request to TX
    71                                                   output logic o_xx_sb_rsp,   // Sideband response to TX
    72                                                   
    73                                                   // Status outputs
    74                                                   output logic train_error,   // Training error occurred
    75                                                   output logic failed_test,   // Current test failed
    76                                                   output logic done           // Eye sweep test complete
    77                                               );
    78                                               
    79                                               //================================================================================
    80                                               // State Machine Definitions
    81                                               //================================================================================
    82                                               
    83                                               // State encoding for eye sweep sequence
    84                                               localparam REQ_HANDSHAKE = 3'b000;            // Initial request handshake
    85                                               localparam LFSR_HANDSHAKE = 3'b001;           // LFSR (pseudo-random) setup handshake
    86                                               localparam DATA_DETECTION = 3'b010;           // Data pattern detection state
    87                                               localparam RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b011;         // Result reporting handshake
    88                                               localparam SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE = 3'b100;   // Sweep parameter data_result handshake
    89                                               localparam END_HANDSHAKE = 3'b101;            // Final completion handshake
    90                                               
    91                                               // State registers
    92                                               logic [2:0] CS;  // Current state
    93                                               logic [2:0] NS;  // Next state
    94                                               
    95                                               logic [1:0] count;
    96                                               logic [1:0] count_reg;
    97                                               
    98                                               //================================================================================
    99                                               // Combinational Logic
    100                                              //================================================================================
    101                                              
    102                                              // Test fails if any bit in data_result is 0 (all bits should be 1 for pass)
    103             1                         97     assign failed_test = !(&data_result);
    104                                              
    105                                              //================================================================================
    106                                              // State Machine Sequential Logic
    107                                              //================================================================================
    108                                              
    109                                              // State register update
    110             1                       1824     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    111                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    112             1                        382             CS <= REQ_HANDSHAKE;  // Reset to initial state
    113             1                        382             count <= 0;
    114                                                  end else begin
    115             1                       1442             CS <= NS;             // Advance to next state
    116             1                       1442             count <= count_reg;
    117                                                  end
    118                                              end
    119                                              
    120                                              //================================================================================
    121                                              // Main State Machine Combinational Logic
    122                                              //================================================================================
    123             1                       9140     always @(*) begin
    124             1                       9140             o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    125             1                       9140             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    126             1                       9140             done = 0;
    127             1                       9140             train_error = 0;
    128             1                       9140             o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    129             1                       9140             o_xx_info = 0;
    130             1                       9140             o_xx_data = 0;
    131             1                       9140             o_xx_sweep_result = 0;
    132             1                       9140             count_reg = count;
    133             1                       9140             NS = CS;
    134             1                       9140             o_xx_encoding = 0;
    135                                                  if (init) begin
    136                                                      //====================================================================
    137                                                      // INITIALIZATION MODE - RX initiates the test
    138                                                      //====================================================================
    139                                                      case (CS)
    140                                                          // State 0: Send initial test request
    141                                                          REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    142             1                        395                     o_xx_encoding = 'h188;  // Request encoding
    143             1                        395                     done = 0;
    144             1                        395                     count_reg = 0;  // Reset retry count
    145             1                        395                     train_error = 0;
    146                                              
    147                                                              // Request handshake with acknowledge
    148                                                              if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    149             1                        395                     else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    150                                              
    151             1                        395                     o_xx_info = ERROR_THRESHOLD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    152                                              
    153                                                              if (comparison_type) begin
    154             1                        201                         o_xx_data = valid_DATA_FIELD;  // Send error threshold parameter
    155                                                              end else begin
    156             1                        194                         o_xx_data = data_DATA_FIELD;  // Send data pattern parameters
    157                                                              end
    158                                                              
    159                                                              // Wait for matching response
    160                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h189) begin
    161             1                        127                         NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    162             1                        127                         o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    163             1                        127                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    164             1                        127                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    165                                                              end 
    166             1                        268                     else NS = REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    167                                                          end 
    168                                              
    169                                                          // State 1: Setup LFSR (Linear Feedback Shift Register) for pattern detection
    170                                                          LFSR_HANDSHAKE: begin
    171             1                        568                     o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    172             1                        568                     done = 0;
    173             1                        568                     o_xx_info = 0;
    174                                              
    175                                                              // Response handshake
    176             1                        151                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    177             1                        417                     else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    178                                              
    179                                                              // Wait for LFSR setup done signal
    180                                                              if (i_sb_xx_done) begin
    181             1                        278                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data detection encoding
    182             1                        278                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    183             1                        278                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    184             1                        278                         count_reg = count + 1;  // Increment count for retries
    185             1                        278                         NS = DATA_DETECTION;
    186                                                              end
    187             1                        290                     else NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    188                                                          end 
    189                                              
    190                                                          // State 2: Detect incoming test data patterns
    191                                                          DATA_DETECTION: begin
    192             1                        973                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18A;  // Data detection encoding
    193             1                        973                     done = 0;
    194                                              
    195                                                              // Wait for data detection to complete
    196                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h18B) begin
    197             1                        139                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result reporting encoding
    198             1                        139                         NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    199             1                        139                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    200             1                        139                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    201                                                              end
    202             1                        834                     else NS = DATA_DETECTION;
    203                                                          end 
    204                                              
    205                                                          // State 3: Report test results back to TX
    206                                                          RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    207             1                        969                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18B;  // Result reporting encoding
    208             1                        969                     done = 0;
    209             1                        969                     o_xx_data = data_result;     // Send detection data_result
    210             1                        969                     o_xx_info = {'b0,valid_result,!failed_test,4'b0000};     // Send detection data_result
    211                                              
    212                                                              // Response handshake
    213             1                        552                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    214             1                        417                     else o_xx_sb_rsp = 1;
    215                                              
    216                                                              // Check if we need to retry or send sweep results
    217                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h189) begin
    218             1                         12                         o_xx_encoding = 'h189;  // LFSR setup encoding
    219             1                         12                         NS = LFSR_HANDSHAKE;
    220             1                         12                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    221             1                         12                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    222             1                         12                         train_error = 0;  // Clear training error for retry
    223                                                              end else if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h18C)  begin
    224             1                        123                         o_xx_encoding = 'h18C;  // Sweep data_result encoding
    225             1                        123                         NS = SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    226             1                        123                         o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    227             1                        123                         o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    228                                                              end
    229             1                        834                     else NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;
    230                                                          end 
    231                                              
    232                                                          // State 4: Receive sweep parameter results from TX
    233                                                          SWEEP_RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    234             1                        369                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18D;  // Sweep data_result encoding
    235             1                        369                     done = 0;
    236             1                        369                     o_xx_sweep_result = i_xx_data[7:0];  // Extract sweep measurement data
    237             1                        369                     NS = END_HANDSHAKE;
    238             1                        369                     o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    239             1                        369                     o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;
    240                                                          end
    241                                              
    242                                                          // State 5: Final handshake to complete test
    243                                                          END_HANDSHAKE: begin
    244             1                        738                     o_xx_encoding = 'h18D;  // End encoding
    245                                              
    246             1                        492                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_req = 0;
    247             1                        246                     else o_xx_sb_req = 1;
    248                                              
    249                                                              // Signal completion when acknowledged
    250                                                              if (i_sb_xx_rsp && i_xx_decoding == 'h18D) done = 1;
    251             1                        738                     else done = 0;
    252                                                          end 
    253                                                      endcase
    254                                                  end else begin
    255                                                      //====================================================================
    256                                                      // NON-INITIALIZATION MODE - RX responds to TX-initiated test
    257                                                      //====================================================================
    258                                                      case (CS)
    259                                                          // State 0: Respond to initial test request
    260                                                          REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin

    262             1                       4756                     done = 0;

    264             1                       4756                     train_error = 0;
    265                                              
    266                                                              // Response handshake
    267             1                        954                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;

    269                                              
    270                                                              // Wait for done signal
    271                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h181) begin

    277                                                              end

    281                                                          // State 1: Setup LFSR for pattern detection

    283             1                         45                     o_xx_encoding = 'h181;  // LFSR setup encoding
    284             1                         45                     done = 0;
    285                                              
    286                                                              // Response handshake
    287             1                         18                     if (done_ack) o_xx_sb_rsp = 0;

    289

    297                                                              end

    301                                                          // State 2: Detect incoming test data patterns

    304             1                         63                     done = 0;
    305                                              
    306                                                              // Wait for data detection to complete
    307                                                              if (i_sb_xx_req && i_xx_decoding == 'h183) begin
    308             1                          9                         NS = RESULT_HANDSHAKE;

    315                                                  
    316                                                          // State 3: Report test results back to TX
    317                                                          RESULT_HANDSHAKE: begin
    318             1                         67                     o_xx_encoding = 'h183;  // Result reporting encoding
    319             1                         67                     done = 0;
