    139                                              //================================================================================
    140                                              // This module performs data-to-clock eye diagram sweeping for signal integrity
    141                                              ucie_RX_Data_to_Clock_eye_sweep ucie_RX_Data_to_Clock_eye_sweep_inst (
    142                                                  .i_clk(i_clk),
    143                                                  .i_reset(r_eye_sweep_reset),  // Reset when enabled (inverted logic vs TX)
    144                                                  .i_xx_decoding(i_rx_decoding),
    145                                                  .i_xx_data(i_rx_data),
    146                                                  .i_xx_info(i_rx_info),
    147                                                  .i_sb_xx_req(i_sb_rx_req),
    148                                                  .i_sb_xx_rsp(i_sb_rx_rsp),
    149                                                  .i_sb_xx_done(i_sb_rx_done),
    150                                                  .i_xx_done(i_rx_done),
    151                                                  .done_ack(done_ack),
    152                                                  .init(init),
    153                                                  .no_retry(no_retry),
    154                                                  .comparison_type(comparison_type),
    155                                                  .data_result(i_rx_data_results),
    156                                                  .valid_result(i_rx_valid_results),
    157                                                  .o_xx_encoding(o_rx_encoding_data_to_clock_test),
    158                                                  .o_xx_data(o_rx_data_data_to_clock_test),
    159                                                  .o_xx_info(o_rx_info_data_to_clock_test),
    160                                                  .o_xx_sweep_result(o_rx_sweep_result_data_to_clock_test),  // Routed to internal wire; sweep result not forwarded upstream from this module
    161                                                  .o_xx_sb_req(o_rx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test), 
    162                                                  .o_xx_sb_rsp(o_rx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test),
    163                                                  .train_error(train_error_data_to_clock_test),
    164                                                  .failed_test(failed_test),
    165                                                  .done(clock_to_test_done)
    166                                              );
    167                                              
    168                                              //================================================================================
    169                                              // Combinational Logic
    170                                              //================================================================================
    171                                              
    172                                              // Previous state completion logic - checks if handshake is complete
    173                                              // Note: RX side only checks sent/received, not both like TX
    174             1                         73     assign previous_state_done = (rsp_sent & rsp_received);
    175                                              
    176                                              // Training error aggregation - timeout, eye sweep error, or speed idle error
    177             1                       3794     assign train_error = (timeout || train_error_data_to_clock_test || trainerror || (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h40));
    178                                              
    179             1                        197     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    180                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    181             1                         48             train_error_pip <= 0;
    182                                                  end else begin
    183             1                        149             train_error_pip <= train_error;
    184                                                  end
    185                                              end
    186                                              
    187                                              //================================================================================
    188                                              // State Machine Sequential Logic
    189                                              //================================================================================
    190                                              
    191                                              // Main state machine and substate registers
    192             1                       4743     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    193                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    194             1                         48             CS <= VALVREF;           // Reset to initial training state
    195             1                         48             current_substate <= 0;   // Reset substate
    196             1                         48             o_rx_encoding <= 0;
    197             1                         48             o_rx_data <= 0;
    198             1                         48             o_rx_info <= 0;
    199             1                         48             o_rx_sb_req <= 0;
    200             1                         48             o_rx_sb_rsp <= 0;
    201             1                         48             train_link_init_en <= 0;
    202             1                         48             train_phyretrain_en <= 0;
    203                                                  end else if (!init_train_en) begin
    204             1                         94             CS <= VALVREF;           // Reset to initial training state
    205             1                         94             current_substate <= 0;   // Reset substate
    206             1                         94             o_rx_encoding <= 'h80;
    207             1                         94             o_rx_data <= 0;
    208             1                         94             o_rx_info <= 0;
    209             1                         94             o_rx_sb_req <= 0;
    210             1                         94             o_rx_sb_rsp <= 0;
    211             1                         94             train_link_init_en <= train_link_init_en_reg;
    212             1                         94             train_phyretrain_en <= train_phyretrain_en_reg;
    213                                                  end else begin
    214             1                       4601             CS <= NS;                // Advance to next state
    215             1                       4601             current_substate <= next_substate;
    216             1                       4601             o_rx_encoding <= o_rx_encoding_reg;
    217             1                       4601             o_rx_data <= o_rx_data_reg;
    218             1                       4601             o_rx_info <= o_rx_info_reg;
    219             1                       4601             o_rx_sb_req <= o_rx_sb_req_reg;
    220             1                       4601             o_rx_sb_rsp <= o_rx_sb_rsp_reg;
    221             1                       4601             train_link_init_en <= train_link_init_en_reg;
    222             1                       4601             train_phyretrain_en <= train_phyretrain_en_reg;
    223                                                  end 
    224                                              end
    225                                              
    226                                              
    227             1                       6727     assign r_eye_sweep_reset = !clock_to_test_enable && !i_reset;
    228                                              
    229                                              //================================================================================
    230                                              // Done Acknowledgement Logic
    231                                              //================================================================================
    232                                              // Tracks when done signal has been acknowledged in handshake protocol.
    233                                              // done_ack is cleared whenever the encoding changes (new state/substate),
    234                                              // ensuring the handshake re-arms for each distinct transaction.
    235             1                       7678     always @(*) begin
    236             1                       7678         done_ack = done_ack_old;
    237             1                       2610         if (!init_train_en) done_ack = 0;
    238             1                       1526         else if (o_rx_encoding != o_rx_encoding_old) done_ack = 0;  // New encoding â†’ reset ack
    239                                                  else if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    240             1                       1692             done_ack = 1;  // Set when done received
    241                                                  end else if (i_sb_rx_rsp) begin
    242                                                      done_ack = 0;  // Clear on response to allow next transaction
    243                                                  end
    244                                              end
    245                                              
    246             1                       4266     always @(posedge i_clk) begin
    247             1                       4266         o_rx_encoding_old <= o_rx_encoding;  // Register to track previous encoding for done_ack logic
    248             1                       4266         substates_done_old <= substates_done;  // Register to track previous substates_done for state transition logic
    249             1                       4266         done_ack_old <= done_ack;  // Register to track previous substates_done for state transition logic
    250                                              end
    251                                              
    252                                              //================================================================================
    253                                              // Sideband Done Signal Logic
    254                                              //================================================================================
    255                                              // Generates a one-cycle done pulse in response to any sideband request or response.
    256                                              // The pulse self-clears the next cycle, so done is always a single-cycle strobe.
    257             1                       4386     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    258                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    259             1                         48             o_rx_sb_done <= 0;;
    260                                                  end else begin
    261                                                      if (o_rx_sb_done) begin
    262             1                       1342                 o_rx_sb_done <= 0;  // Self-clearing pulse
    263                                                      end else if (i_sb_rx_rsp || i_sb_rx_req) begin
    264             1                       1342                 o_rx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    265                                                      end
    266                                                  end
    267                                              end
    268                                              
    269                                              //================================================================================
    270                                              // Request Reception Tracking
    271                                              //================================================================================
    272                                              // Latches the most-recently-seen sideband request and its decoding value.
    273                                              // The combinational FSM uses req_received + encoding_req_received to decide
    274                                              // when to advance to the next major training state, decoupling the advance
    275                                              // check from the exact clock cycle the request arrived.
    276             1                       3770     always @(*) begin
    277             1                       3770         req_received = 0;
    278             1                       3770         encoding_req_received = 0;
    279                                                  // Capture request when received
    280                                                  if (i_sb_rx_req) begin
    281             1                       1342             req_received = 1;
    282             1                       1342             encoding_req_received = i_rx_decoding;
    283                                                  end
    284                                              end
    285                                              
    286                                              //================================================================================
    287                                              // Main State Machine Combinational Logic
    288                                              //================================================================================
    289                                              // Each MBTRAIN state follows the same 3-substate pattern (RX mirror of TX):
    290                                              //   Substate 0 â€” Initial handshake: assert sideband response; wait for TX done.
    291                                              //   Substate 1 â€” Eye sweep: enable clock_to_test module (init=1); pipe outputs.
    292                                              //   Substate 2 â€” Completion handshake: de-assert eye sweep; wait for TX done
    293                                              //                before advancing via req_received / previous_state_done.
    294                                              // States without an embedded eye sweep (e.g. TXSELFCAL, RXCLKCAL) skip substate 1.
    295                                              //================================================================================
    296             1                      14749     always @(*) begin
    297             1                      14749         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    298             1                      14749         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    299             1                      14749         o_rx_info_reg = 0;
    300             1                      14749         o_rx_data_reg = 0;
    301             1                      14749         comparison_type = 0;
    302             1                      14749         o_rx_data_reg = 0;
    303             1                      14749         o_rx_info_reg = 0;
    304             1                      14749         init = 0;
    305             1                      14749         no_retry = 0;
    306             1                      14749         trainerror = 0;
    307             1                      14749         o_lane_map_rx = 0;
    308             1                      14749         clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    309             1                      14749         train_link_init_en_reg = train_link_init_en;
    310             1                      14749         train_phyretrain_en_reg = train_phyretrain_en;
    311             1                      14749         o_rx_encoding_reg = o_rx_encoding;
    312             1                      14749         NS = CS;
    313             1                      14749         substates_done = substates_done_old;
    314             1                      14749         next_substate = current_substate;
    315                                                  if (!init_train_en) begin
    316             1                       3754             substates_done = 0;
    317                                                  end else 
    318                                                      // On training error (timeout, eye sweep failure, or speed mismatch),
    319                                                      // abort immediately back to VALVREF so the full calibration sequence restarts.
    320                                                      if (train_error_pip) begin
    321             1                         48                 NS = VALVREF;
    322             1                         48                 substates_done = 0;
    323                                                      end else begin
    324                                                          case (CS)
    325                                                              //====================================================================
    326                                                              // VALVREF State: Valid Signal Reference Voltage Calibration
    327                                                              //====================================================================
    328                                                              VALVREF: begin
    329                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    330                                                                      case (current_substate)
    331                                                                          // Substate 0: Wait for and respond to initial handshake request
    332                                                                          0: begin
    333             1                        144                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h80;  // VALVREF response encoding
    334             1                        144                                     NS = VALVREF;
    335             1                        144                                     substates_done = 0;
    336             1                        144                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    337             1                        144                                     trainerror = 0;
    338                                              
    339                                                                              // Response handshake - wait for both TX and RX done
    340             1                         48                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    341             1                         96                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    342                                              
    343                                                                              // Wait for matching done signal
    344                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    345             1                         48                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h188;
    346             1                         48                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    347             1                         48                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    348             1                         48                                         next_substate = 1;
    349                                                                              end 
    350             1                         96                                     else next_substate = 0;
    351                                                                          end  
    352                                              
    353                                                                          // Substate 1: Run eye sweep test
    354                                                                          1:begin
    355             1                       1119                                     clock_to_test_enable = 1;  // Enable eye sweep module
    356                                                                              // Connect eye sweep outputs to RX outputs
    357             1                       1119                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = o_rx_encoding_data_to_clock_test;
    358             1                       1119                                     o_rx_data_reg = o_rx_data_data_to_clock_test;
    359             1                       1119                                     o_rx_info_reg = o_rx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    360             1                       1119                                     o_rx_sb_req_reg = o_rx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    361             1                       1119                                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    362                                              
    363                                                                              
    364             1                       1119                                     init = 1;        // Not initialization mode
    365             1                       1119                                     comparison_type = 1;        // Valid signal training         // Initialization mode (different from TX)
    366             1                       1119                                     no_retry = 0;    // Allow retries
    367             1                       1119                                     substates_done = 0;
    368                                              
    369                                                                              // Wait for eye sweep completion
    370                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h82) begin
    371             1                         21                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h82;
    372             1                         21                                         next_substate = 2;
    373             1                         21                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    374             1                         21                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    375             1                       1098                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    376                                                                          end
    377                                              
    378                                                                          // Substate 2: Send completion response
    379                                                                          2: begin
    380             1                        210                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    381             1                        210                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h82;  // VALVREF complete encoding
    382             1                        210                                     NS = VALVREF;
    383                                              
    384                                                                              // Response handshake
    385             1                         42                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    386             1                        105                                     else if (i_tx_done && i_rx_done) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    387             1                         63                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp;
    388                                              
    389                                                                              // Wait for matching done signal to complete substates
    390                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    391             1                         42                                         substates_done = 1;
    392             1                         42                                         next_substate = 0;
    393                                                                              end else begin
    394             1                        168                                         substates_done = 0;
    395             1                        168                                         next_substate = 2;
    396                                                                              end 
    397                                                                          end  
    398                                                                      default:begin
    399                                                                              
    400                                                                          end
    401                                                                      endcase
    402                                                                  end
    403                                                                  // Check if request with correct encoding received
    404                                                                  if (req_received && encoding_req_received == 'h88) begin
    405             1                         42                             NS = DATAVREF;  // Move to next training state
    406             1                         42                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h88;
    407             1                         42                             substates_done = 0;
    408             1                         42                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    409             1                         42                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    410                                                                  end else begin
    411             1                       1515                             NS = VALVREF;
    412                                                                  end 
    413                                                              end
    414                                              
    415                                                              //====================================================================
    416                                                              // DATAVREF State: Data Signal Reference Voltage Calibration
    417                                                              //====================================================================
    418                                                              DATAVREF: begin
    419                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    420                                                                      case (current_substate)
    421                                                                          0: begin
    422             1                        147                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h88;
    423             1                        147                                     NS = DATAVREF;
    424             1                        147                                     substates_done = 0;
    425                                              
    426             1                         42                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    427             1                        105                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    428                                              
    429                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    430             1                         42                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h188;
    431             1                         42                                         next_substate = 1;
    432             1                         42                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    433             1                         42                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    434             1                        105                                     end else next_substate = 0;
    435                                                                          end  
    436                                              
    437                                                                          1: begin
    438             1                        984                                     clock_to_test_enable = 1;
    439             1                        984                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = o_rx_encoding_data_to_clock_test;
    440             1                        984                                     o_rx_data_reg = o_rx_data_data_to_clock_test;
    441             1                        984                                     o_rx_info_reg = o_rx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    442             1                        984                                     o_rx_sb_req_reg = o_rx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    443             1                        984                                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    444                                              
    445             1                        984                                     init = 1;        // Not initialization mode
    446             1                        984                                     comparison_type = 0;        // Valid signal training 
    447             1                        984                                     no_retry = 0;
    448             1                        984                                     substates_done = 0;
    449                                              
    450                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h8A) begin
    451             1                         18                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h8A;
    452             1                         18                                         next_substate = 2;
    453             1                         18                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    454             1                         18                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    455             1                        966                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    456                                                                          end  
    457                                              
    458                                                                          2: begin
    459             1                        180                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    460                                                                              
    461                                              
    462             1                        180                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h8A;
    463             1                        180                                     NS = DATAVREF; 
    464                                              
    465             1                         36                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    466             1                         90                                     else if (i_tx_done && i_rx_done) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    467             1                         54                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp;
    468                                              
    469                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    470             1                         36                                         substates_done = 1;
    471             1                         36                                         next_substate = 0;
    472                                                                              end else begin
    473             1                        144                                         substates_done = 0;
    474             1                        144                                         next_substate = 2;
    475                                                                              end 
    476                                                                          end  
    477                                                                      default:begin
    478                                                                              
    479                                                                          end
    480                                                                      endcase
    481                                                                  end
    482                                              
    483                                                                  if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'h8A && encoding_rsp_received == 'h8A) begin
    484             1                         18                             NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    485             1                         18                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    486             1                         18                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    487             1                         18                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    488             1                         18                             substates_done = 0;
    489                                                                  end else begin
    490             1                       1347                             NS = DATAVREF;
    491                                                                  end 
    492                                                              end
    493                                              
    494                                                              //====================================================================
    495                                                              // SPEEDIDLE State: Speed and Idle Configuration
    496                                                              //====================================================================
    497                                                              SPEEDIDLE: begin
    498                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    499                                                                      
    500                                                                      case (current_substate)
    501                                                                          0: begin
    502             1                         73                                     NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    503             1                         73                                     substates_done = 0;
    504             1                         73                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    505                                              
    506                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hCA) begin
    507             1                         23                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hCA;
    508             1                         23                                         next_substate = 1;
    509             1                         23                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    510             1                         23                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    511                                                                              end
    512                                                                          end  
    513                                              
    514                                                                          1: begin
    515             1                        184                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hCA;
    516             1                        184                                     NS = SPEEDIDLE; 
    517                                              
    518             1                         46                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    519             1                         92                                     else if (i_tx_done && i_rx_done) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    520             1                         46                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp;
    521                                              
    522                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    523             1                         46                                         substates_done = 1;
    524             1                         46                                         next_substate = 0;
    525                                                                              end else begin
    526             1                        138                                         substates_done = 0;
    527             1                        138                                         next_substate = 1;
    528                                                                              end 
    529                                                                          end  
    530                                                                      default:begin
    531                                                                              
    532                                                                          end
    533                                                                      endcase
    534                                                                  end
    535                                                                  if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hD1) begin
    536             1                         23                             NS = TXSELFCAL;
    537             1                         23                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    538             1                         23                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    539             1                         23                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    540             1                         23                             substates_done = 0;
    541                                                                  end else begin
    542             1                        326                             NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    543                                                                  end 
    544                                                              end
    545                                              
    546                                                              //====================================================================
    547                                                              // TXSELFCAL State: TX Self-Calibration
    548                                                              //====================================================================
    549                                                              TXSELFCAL: begin
    550                                                                  if (!substates_done) begin
    551                                                                      case (current_substate)
    552                                                                          0: begin
    553             1                        223                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    554             1                        223                                     NS = TXSELFCAL;
    555             1                        223                                     substates_done = 0;
    556                                              
    557             1                         50                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    558             1                        102                                     else if (i_tx_done && i_rx_done) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    559             1                         71                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp;
    560                                              
    561                                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    562             1                         50                                         substates_done = 1;
    563             1                         50                                         next_substate = 0;
    564                                                                              end else begin
    565             1                        173                                         substates_done = 0;
    566                                                                              end
    567                                                                          end  
    568                                                                      default:begin
    569                                                                              
    570                                                                          end
    571                                                                      endcase
    572                                                                  end
    573                                                                  if (req_received && encoding_req_received == 'h98) begin
    574             1                         50                             NS = RXCLKCAL;
    575             1                         50                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    576             1                         50                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    577             1                         50                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h98;
    578             1                         50                             substates_done = 0;
    579                                                                  end else begin
    580             1                        273                             NS = TXSELFCAL;
    581                                                                  end 
    582                                                              end
    583
