    1037            1                        453                                     o_rx_info_reg = o_rx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    1038            1                        453                                     o_rx_sb_req_reg = o_rx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    1039            1                        453                                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    1040                                             
    1041            1                        453                                     init = 1;        // Not initialization mode
    1042            1                        453                                     comparison_type = 0;
    1043            1                        453                                     no_retry = 1;
    1044            1                        453                                     substates_done = 0;
    1045                                             
    1046                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hB2) begin
    1047            1                          9                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hB2;
    1048            1                          9                                         next_substate = 2;
    1049            1                          9                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1050            1                          9                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1051            1                        444                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    1052                                                                         end  
    1053                                             
    1054                                                                         2: begin
    1055            1                         90                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1056            1                         90                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hB2; 
    1057            1                         90                                     NS = DATATRAINCENTER2;
    1058                                             
    1059            1                         18                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1060            1                         45                                     else if (i_tx_done && i_rx_done) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1061            1                         27                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp;
    1062                                             
    1063                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    1064            1                         18                                         substates_done = 1;
    1065            1                         18                                         next_substate = 0;
    1066                                                                             end else begin
    1067            1                         72                                         substates_done = 0;
    1068            1                         72                                         next_substate = 2;
    1069                                                                             end 
    1070                                                                         end  
    1071                                                                     default:begin
    1072                                                                             
    1073                                                                         end
    1074                                                                     endcase
    1075                                                                 end
    1076                                                                 if (req_received && encoding_req_received == 'hB8) begin
    1077            1                         18                             NS = LINKSPEED;
    1078            1                         18                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hB8;
    1079            1                         18                             substates_done = 0;
    1080            1                         18                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1081            1                         18                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1082                                                                 end else begin
    1083            1                        638                             NS = DATATRAINCENTER2;
    1084                                                                 end 
    1085                                                             end
    1086                                             
    1087                                                             //====================================================================
    1088                                                             // LINKSPEED State: Final Speed Negotiation and Link-Up Handshake
    1089                                                             // This is the most complex state. After the eye sweep (substate 1),
    1090                                                             // the outcome branches into one of four substates:
    1091                                                             //   2 â†’ DONE       : TX and RX both passed â†’ assert train_link_init_en
    1092                                                             //   3 â†’ PHYRETRAIN : TX or RX initiated retrain â†’ assert train_phyretrain_en
    1093                                                             //   4 â†’ ERROR RESP : Both TX and RX errored â†’ wait for SPEEDDEGRADE or REPAIR
    1094                                                             //   5 â†’ SPEEDDEGRADE: Re-enter SPEEDIDLE at a lower speed
    1095                                                             //   6 â†’ REPAIR     : Lane repair handshake before re-entering REPAIR state
    1096                                                             //====================================================================
    1097                                                             LINKSPEED: begin
    1098                                                                 if (!substates_done) begin
    1099                                                                     case (current_substate)
    1100                                                                         0: begin
    1101            1                        108                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hB8;
    1102            1                        108                                     NS = LINKSPEED;
    1103            1                        108                                     substates_done = 0;
    1104                                             
    1105                                                                             // should'nt I wait a REQ ??
    1106            1                         63                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1107            1                         45                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1108                                             
    1109                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h180) begin
    1110            1                         18                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h180;
    1111            1                         18                                         next_substate = 1;
    1112            1                         18                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1113            1                         18                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1114                                                                             end
    1115            1                         90                                     else next_substate = 0;
    1116                                                                         end  
    1117                                             
    1118                                                                         1: begin
    1119            1                        474                                     clock_to_test_enable = 1;
    1120            1                        474                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = o_rx_encoding_data_to_clock_test;
    1121            1                        474                                     o_rx_data_reg = o_rx_data_data_to_clock_test;
    1122            1                        474                                     o_rx_info_reg = o_rx_info_data_to_clock_test;
    1123            1                        474                                     o_rx_sb_req_reg = o_rx_sb_req_data_to_clock_test;
    1124            1                        474                                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = o_rx_sb_rsp_data_to_clock_test;
    1125                                             
    1126            1                        474                                     init = 0;        // Not initialization mode
    1127            1                        474                                     comparison_type = 0;
    1128            1                        474                                     no_retry = 1;
    1129            1                        474                                     substates_done = 0;
    1130                                             
    1131                                                                             // Branch 1: TX reports DONE ('hBA) and no local TX error â†’ link-up path
    1132                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hBA && !i_tx_error) begin 
    1133            1                          1                                         next_substate = 2;  // DONE path
    1134            1                          1                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1135            1                          1                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1136            1                          1                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBA; 
    1137                                             
    1138                                                                             // Branch 2: TX reports ERROR ('hBB) with no local TX error,
    1139                                                                             // or TX reports DONE but local TX path has an error â†’ phyretrain
    1140                                                                             end else if ((i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hBB && !i_tx_error) || (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hBA && i_tx_error)) begin 
    1141                                                                                 next_substate = 3;  // PHYRETRAIN REQ path
    1142                                                                                 o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1143                                                                                 o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1144                                                                                 o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBC; 
    1145                                             
    1146                                                                             // Branch 3: TX reports ERROR and local TX path also has an error
    1147                                                                             // â†’ full error response, then await SPEEDDEGRADE or REPAIR decision
    1148                                                                             end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hBB && i_tx_error) begin 
    1149            1                         10                                         next_substate = 4;  // ERROR RESP path
    1150            1                         10                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1151            1                         10                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1152            1                         10                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBF; 
    1153                                             
    1154            1                        463                                     end else next_substate = 1;
    1155                                                                         end  
    1156                                             
    1157                                                                         2: begin  // DONE path: confirm link-up and hand off to ACTIVE state
    1158            1                         13                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1159            1                         13                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBA; 
    1160            1                         13                                     NS = LINKSPEED;
    1161                                             
    1162            1                          5                                    if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1163            1                          8                                    else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1164                                             
    1165                                                                             // Both sides confirmed 'hBA: assert train_link_init_en to enable
    1166                                                                             // the ACTIVE state handoff in the top-level LTSM.
    1167                                                                             if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hBA && encoding_rsp_received == 'hBA) begin
    1168            1                          1                                         substates_done = 1;
    1169            1                          1                                         train_link_init_en_reg = 1;
    1170            1                          1                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1171            1                          1                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1172                                                                             end else begin
    1173            1                         12                                         substates_done = 0;
    1174            1                         12                                         next_substate = 2;
    1175            1                         12                                         train_link_init_en_reg = 0;
    1176                                                                             end 
    1177                                                                         end  
    1178                                             
    1179                                                                         3: begin  // PHYRETRAIN path: assert train_phyretrain_en to trigger retrain
    1180                                                                             clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1181                                                                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBC; 
    1182                                                                             NS = LINKSPEED;
    1183                                             
    1184                                                                            if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1185                                                                            else o_rx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    1186                                             
    1187                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_rsp && i_rx_decoding == 'hBC) begin
    1188                                                                                 substates_done = 1;
    1189                                                                                 train_phyretrain_en_reg = 1;
    1190                                                                                 o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1191                                                                                 o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1192                                                                             end else begin
    1193                                                                                 substates_done = 0;
    1194                                                                                 next_substate = 3;
    1195                                                                                 train_phyretrain_en_reg = 0;
    1196                                                                             end 
    1197                                                                         end
    1198                                             
    1199                                                                         4: begin  // ERROR RESP path: await TX decision on recovery action
    1200            1                         94                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBF;
    1201            1                         94                                     NS = LINKSPEED;
    1202            1                         94                                     substates_done = 0;
    1203                                             
    1204            1                         46                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1205            1                         48                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1206                                             
    1207                                                                             // TX selects SPEEDDEGRADE ('hBE) â†’ drop to next lower link speed
    1208                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hBE) begin 
    1209            1                          6                                         next_substate = 5;  // SPEEDDEGRADE
    1210            1                          6                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBE; 
    1211            1                          6                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1212            1                          6                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1213                                                                             // TX selects REPAIR ('hBD) with a valid lane-map â†’ request lane repair
    1214                                                                             end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hBD) begin 
    1215                                                                                 if (i_lane_map) begin
    1216            1                          2                                             next_substate = 6;  // REPAIR
    1217            1                          2                                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBD; 
    1218            1                          2                                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1219            1                          2                                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1220                                                                                 end else begin
    1221                                                                                     next_substate = 5;  // SPEEDDEGRADE
    1222                                                                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBE; 
    1223                                                                                     o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1224                                                                                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1225                                                                                 end
    1226            1                         86                                     end else next_substate = 4;
    1227                                                                         end
    1228                                             
    1229                                                                         5: begin
    1230            1                         60                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1231            1                         60                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBE; 
    1232            1                         60                                     NS = LINKSPEED;
    1233                                             
    1234            1                         30                                    if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1235            1                         30                                    else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1236                                             
    1237                                                                             if ((previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hBE && encoding_rsp_received == 'hBE) || (i_rx_decoding == 'hBD && encoding_rsp_received == 'hBE)) begin
    1238            1                          6                                         NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    1239            1                          6                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1240            1                          6                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1241            1                          6                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    1242            1                          6                                         substates_done = 0;
    1243            1                          6                                         next_substate = 0;
    1244                                                                             end else begin
    1245            1                         54                                         substates_done = 0;
    1246            1                         54                                         next_substate = 5;
    1247                                                                             end 
    1248                                                                         end
    1249                                             
    1250                                                                         6: begin
    1251            1                         22                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1252            1                         22                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hBD; 
    1253            1                         22                                     NS = LINKSPEED;
    1254                                             
    1255            1                         12                                    if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1256            1                         10                                    else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1257                                             
    1258                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hC0) begin
    1259            1                          4                                         NS = REPAIR;
    1260            1                          4                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1261            1                          4                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1262            1                          4                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC0;
    1263            1                          4                                         substates_done = 0;
    1264            1                          4                                         next_substate = 0;
    1265                                                                              end else begin
    1266            1                         18                                         substates_done = 0;
    1267            1                         18                                         next_substate = 6;
    1268                                                                             end 
    1269                                                                         end
    1270                                                                         default:begin
    1271                                                                             
    1272                                                                         end
    1273                                                                     endcase
    1274                                                                 end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hC0) begin
    1275                                                                         // Phyretrain module asserted repair while link was active â†’ re-enter REPAIR
    1276                                                                         NS = REPAIR;
    1277                                                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1278                                                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1279                                                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC0;
    1280                                                                         train_phyretrain_en_reg = 0;
    1281                                                                         train_link_init_en_reg = 0;
    1282                                                                         substates_done = 0;
    1283                                                                         next_substate = 0;
    1284                                                                      end else if (speed_idle_state_enable) begin
    1285                                                                         // Phyretrain module selected speed-change path â†’ re-enter SPEEDIDLE
    1286                                                                         NS = SPEEDIDLE;
    1287                                                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1288                                                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1289                                                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    1290                                                                         train_phyretrain_en_reg = 0;
    1291                                                                         train_link_init_en_reg = 0;
    1292                                                                         substates_done = 0;
    1293                                                                         next_substate = 0;
    1294                                                                      end else if (tx_self_cal_state_enable && i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hD1) begin
    1295                                                                         // Phyretrain module selected TX self-cal path â†’ re-enter TXSELFCAL
    1296                                                                         NS = TXSELFCAL;
    1297                                                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1298                                                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1299                                                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    1300                                                                         train_phyretrain_en_reg = 0;
    1301                                                                         train_link_init_en_reg = 0;
    1302                                                                         substates_done = 0;
    1303                                                                         next_substate = 0;
    1304                                                                      end else begin
    1305            1                          1                                 o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1306            1                          1                                 o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1307            1                          1                                 substates_done = 1;
    1308            1                          1                                 train_phyretrain_en_reg = train_phyretrain_en;
    1309            1                          1                                 train_link_init_en_reg = train_link_init_en;
    1310                                                                     end 
    1311                                                             end
    1312                                                             
    1313                                                             //====================================================================
    1314                                                             // REPAIR State: Lane Repair Handshake
    1315                                                             // TX drives the repair sequence; RX responds and waits for the
    1316                                                             // outcome. Encoding 'h40 from TX signals an unrecoverable error
    1317                                                             // (all lanes failed repair) â†’ abort to VALVREF via trainerror.
    1318                                                             //====================================================================
    1319                                                             REPAIR: begin
    1320                                                                 if (!substates_done) begin
    1321                                                                     case (current_substate)
    1322                                                                         0: begin
    1323            1                         22                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC0;
    1324            1                         22                                     NS = REPAIR;
    1325            1                         22                                     substates_done = 0;
    1326                                             
    1327            1                         12                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1328            1                         10                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1329                                             
    1330                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h40) begin
    1331                                                                                 trainerror = 1;
    1332                                                                                 substates_done = 1;
    1333                                                                                 next_substate = 0;
    1334                                                                             end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hC1 && i_rx_info[2:0]) begin
    1335            1                          4                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC1;
    1336            1                          4                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1337            1                          4                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1338            1                          4                                         next_substate = 1;
    1339                                                                             end
    1340            1                         18                                     else next_substate = 0;
    1341                                                                         end  
    1342                                             
    1343                                                                         1: begin
    1344            1                         22                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1345            1                         22                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC1;
    1346            1                         22                                     NS = REPAIR;
    1347                                             
    1348            1                         22                                     o_lane_map_rx = i_rx_info[2:0];  // Capture repaired lane map from RX info field
    1349                                             
    1350            1                         12                                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1351            1                         10                                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1352                                             
    1353                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hC2) begin
    1354            1                          4                                         o_rx_info_reg = 0;
    1355            1                          4                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC2;
    1356            1                          4                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1357            1                          4                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1358            1                          4                                         substates_done = 0;
    1359            1                          4                                         next_substate = 2;
    1360                                                                             end else begin
    1361            1                         18                                         substates_done = 0;
    1362            1                         18                                         next_substate = 1;
    1363                                                                             end 
    1364                                                                         end  
    1365                                             
    1366                                                                         2: begin
    1367            1                         22                                     clock_to_test_enable = 0;
    1368            1                         22                                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC2; 
    1369            1                         22                                     NS = REPAIR;
    1370                                             
    1371            1                         12                                    if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1372            1                         10                                    else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    1373                                             
    1374                                                                             if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hD1) begin
    1375            1                          2                                         NS = TXSELFCAL;
    1376            1                          2                                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1377            1                          2                                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    1378            1                          2                                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    1379            1                          2                                         substates_done = 0;
    1380            1                          2                                         next_substate = 0;
    1381                                                                             end else begin
    1382            1                         20                                         substates_done = 0;
    1383            1                         20                                         next_substate = 2;
    1384                                                                             end 
    1385                                                                         end  
    1386                                                                         default:begin
    1387                                                                             
    1388                                                                         end
    1389                                                                     endcase
    1390                                                                 end
    1391                                                             end
    1392                                             
    1393                                                             default: begin
    1394            1                          3                         train_link_init_en_reg = 0;
    1395            1                          3                         train_phyretrain_en_reg = 0;
    1396            1                          3                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 0;
    1397            1                          3                         o_rx_data_reg = 0;

    1399            1                          3                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    1400            1                          3                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;

    1406            1                          3                         NS = VALVREF;

    155             1                       8423         o_tx_sb_rsp        = 1'b0;
    156             1                       8423         o_tx_sb_done       = 1'b0;
    157             1                       8423         o_pl_clk_req       = 1'b0;
    158             1                       8423         o_pl_inband_pres   = 1'b0;
    159             1                       8423         o_pl_wake_ack      = 1'b0;
    160             1                       8423         o_train_error      = 1'b0;
    161             1                       8423         o_done_linkinit_tx = 1'b0;
    162                                              
    163                                                  if (i_current_state == LINKINIT) begin
    164                                              
    165                                                    if (!substates_done && o_timer_8ms) begin
    166                                                      // 8ms timeout â€” assert train error, restart from CLK_REQ_HS
    167             1                    ***0***             o_train_error = 1'b1;
    168             1                    ***0***             next_substate = CLK_REQ_HS;
    169                                              
    170                                                    end else begin
    171                                                      case (current_substate)
    172                                              
    173                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    174                                                        // CLK_REQ_HS (0x100)
    175                                                        //   Assert pl_clk_req and pl_inband_pres to initiate the
    176                                                        //   pl_clk_req/lp_clk_ack handshake with the Adapter.
    177                                                        //   Phase 1 : pl_clk_req = 1, wait for lp_clk_ack to rise
    178                                                        //             (clk_ack_seen latches this in always_ff).
    179                                                        //   Phase 2 : pl_clk_req = 0 (de-assert), wait for lp_clk_ack
    180                                                        //             to fall, then advance to WAKE_REQ_HS.
    181                                                        //   pl_inband_pres stays 1 from here for the lifetime of the link.
    182                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    183                                                        CLK_REQ_HS: begin
    184             1                          3                 o_tx_encoding    = 9'h100;
    185             1                          3                 o_pl_inband_pres = 1'b1;
    186                                                          if (!substates_done) begin
    187                                                            // Assert pl_clk_req only until ack has been observed
    188             1                          3                   o_pl_clk_req = ~clk_ack_seen;
    189                                                            // Advance once ack has risen then fallen (full 4-way HS done)
    190             1                    ***0***                   if (clk_ack_seen && !i_lp_clk_ack) next_substate = WAKE_REQ_HS;
    191                                                          end
    192                                                        end
    193                                              
    194                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    195                                                        // WAKE_REQ_HS (0x101)
    196                                                        //   Adapter asserts lp_wake_req; PL responds with pl_wake_ack
    197                                                        //   (synchronous to lclk â€” at least one cycle bubble is
    198                                                        //   satisfied by the registered path above).
    199                                                        //   Mirror lp_wake_req â†’ pl_wake_ack so the ack naturally
    200                                                        //   de-asserts after the req de-asserts (spec requirement).
    201                                                        //   Advance when Adapter has set lp_state_req = Active.
    202                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    203                                                        WAKE_REQ_HS: begin
    204             1                    ***0***                 o_tx_encoding    = 9'h101;
    205             1                    ***0***                 o_pl_inband_pres = 1'b1;
    206                                                          if (!substates_done) begin
    207             1                    ***0***                   o_pl_wake_ack = i_lp_wake_req_reg;  // mirrors req; deasserts after req
    208                                                            if (i_lp_state_req == LP_STATE_ACTIVE && i_lp_wake_req_reg)
    209             1                    ***0***                     next_substate = STATE_REQ_HS;
    210                                                          end
    211                                                        end
    212                                              
    213                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    214                                                        // STATE_REQ_HS (0x102)
    215                                                        //   TX sends {LinkMgmt.RDI.Req.Active} sideband message.
    216                                                        //   o_tx_sb_req active until done_ack latches (i_sb_tx_done).
    217                                                        //   Done fires when i_sb_tx_rsp arrives with decoding 0x102
    218                                                        //   and done_ack is set (same pattern as all other HS states).
    219                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    220                                                        STATE_REQ_HS: begin
    221             1                    ***0***                 o_tx_encoding    = 9'h102;
    222             1                    ***0***                 o_pl_inband_pres = 1'b1;
    223                                                          if (!substates_done) begin
    224                                                            // TX Sending REQ Handshake
    225                                                            if (done_ack) begin
    226             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_sb_req = 0;
    227                                                            end else begin
    228             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_sb_req = 1;
    229                                                            end
    230                                                            // Pulse done for one cycle on RSP detection.
    231             1                    ***0***                   o_tx_sb_done = i_sb_tx_rsp && !sb_tx_rsp_d;
    232             1                    ***0***                   if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 9'h102) o_done_linkinit_tx = 1'b1;
    233                                                          end
    234                                                        end
    235                                              
    236             1                    ***0***               default: next_substate = CLK_REQ_HS;

    129                                              
    130                                                    end else begin
    131                                                      case (current_substate)
    132                                              
    133                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    134                                                        // CLK_REQ_HS (0x100)
    135                                                        //   Track the pl_clk_req/lp_clk_ack handshake progress via
    136                                                        //   the shared lp_clk_ack input (RDI signal is a single wire;
    137                                                        //   TX drives pl_clk_req).  Advance when ack has risen and
    138                                                        //   then fallen (same condition as TX so both advance together).
    139                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    140                                                        CLK_REQ_HS: begin
    141             1                          1                 o_rx_encoding = 9'h100;
    142                                                          if (!substates_done) begin
    143             1                    ***0***                   if (clk_ack_seen && !i_lp_clk_ack) next_substate = WAKE_REQ_HS;
    144                                                          end
    145                                                        end
    146                                              
    147                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    148                                                        // WAKE_REQ_HS (0x101)
    149                                                        //   Track lp_state_req.  Advance when Adapter has set
    150                                                        //   lp_state_req = Active (same condition as TX).
    151                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    152                                                        WAKE_REQ_HS: begin
    153             1                    ***0***                 o_rx_encoding = 9'h101;
    154                                                          if (!substates_done) begin
    155             1                    ***0***                   if (i_lp_state_req == LP_STATE_ACTIVE) next_substate = STATE_RSP_HS;
    156                                                          end
    157                                                        end
    158                                              
    159                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    160                                                        // STATE_RSP_HS (0x102)
    161                                                        //   RX responds to TX's {LinkMgmt.RDI.Req.Active} with
    162                                                        //   {LinkMgmt.RDI.Rsp.Active} sideband message.
    163                                                        //   Assert o_rx_sb_rsp; done fires when i_sb_rx_done confirms
    164                                                        //   the sideband layer has transmitted the RSP message.
    165                                                        // ----------------------------------------------------------
    166                                                        STATE_RSP_HS: begin
    167             1                    ***0***                 o_rx_encoding = 9'h102;
    168                                                          if (!substates_done) begin
    169             1                    ***0***                   o_rx_sb_rsp  = done_ack ? 0 : 1;
    170                                                            // Pulse done for one cycle on REQ detection.
    171             1                    ***0***                   o_rx_sb_done = i_sb_rx_req && !sb_rx_req_d;
    172             1                    ***0***                   if (i_sb_rx_done) o_done_linkinit_rx = 1'b1;
    173                                                          end
    174                                                        end
    175                                              
    176             1                    ***0***               default: next_substate = CLK_REQ_HS;

    99              1                       4400     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin

    102                                                  end else begin

    107                                                      end

    110                                              
    111             1                       6644     always_comb begin
    112             1                       6644             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h110;
    113             1                       6644             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    114             1                       6644             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    115             1                       6644             L1_rsp_recieved = 0;
    116             1                       6644             speed_idle_state_enable = speed_idle_state_enable_old;
    117             1                       6644             pmnak_enable = pmnak_enable_old;
    118             1                       6644             NS = CS;
    119             1                       6644             o_pl_state_sts = 'b0001;  // Default to IDLE state status
    120                                                  if (!state_enable) begin
    121             1                       6643             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h108;
    122             1                       6643             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    123             1                       6643             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    124             1                       6643             L1_rsp_recieved = 0;
    125             1                       6643             speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    126                                                  end else begin
    127                                                      case (CS)
    128                                                          // START_HANDSHAKE: TX initiates the L1 entry by asserting 'h110.
    129                                                          // If RX responds with 'h113 (PM NAK) the request was rejected;
    130                                                          // pmnak_enable is asserted so the upper layer can retry or abort.
    131                                                          START_HANDSHAKE: begin
    132             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h110;
    133             1                    ***0***                     NS =  START_HANDSHAKE;
    134                                                  
    135             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    136             1                    ***0***                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    137                                                  
    138                                                              if ((i_rsp_sent && i_encoding_rsp_sent == 'h110) || (i_encoding_rsp_sent == 'h111 && i_encoding_rsp_received == 'h110 && i_rsp_received && i_rsp_sent)) begin
    139             1                    ***0***                         NS = L1;
    140             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h111;
    141             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    142             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    143             1                    ***0***                         L1_rsp_recieved = 0;
    144             1                    ***0***                         o_pl_state_sts = 'b0100;
    145                                                              end else if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'h113) begin
    146             1                    ***0***                         pmnak_enable = 1;
    147             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    148             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    149             1                    ***0***                         o_pl_state_sts = 'b0011;
    150                                                              end else begin
    151             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h110;
    152             1                    ***0***                         NS =  START_HANDSHAKE;
    153                                                              end
    154                                                          end 
    155                                                  
    156                                                          // L1: link is in low-power state. Exit is triggered either by a
    157                                                          // local wake request (i_lp_state_req == 0001) or by an RX-driven
    158                                                          // ACTIVE request ('h108). Either path enables SPEEDIDLE.
    159                                                          L1: begin
    160             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'h111;
    161             1                    ***0***                     NS = L1;
    162             1                    ***0***                     o_pl_state_sts = 'b0100;
    163                                                  
    164                                                              if (i_lp_state_req == 'b0001 || (i_sb_tx_req && i_tx_decoding == 'h108)) begin

    91                                               //================================================================================
    92                                               // Done Acknowledgement Logic
    93                                               //================================================================================
    94                                               // Tracks when done signal has been acknowledged in handshake protocol
    95              1                          1     always_comb begin
    96              1                       4517         done_ack = done_ack_old;
    97              1                         48         if ((o_rx_encoding_reg != o_rx_encoding_old)) done_ack = 0;
    98                                                   else if (i_sb_rx_done) begin

    102                                                  end
    103                                              end
    104

    107                                              //================================================================================
    108                                              // Generates done pulse for sideband protocol
    109             1                       4386     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    110                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    111             1                         48             o_rx_sb_done <= 0;;
    112                                                  end else begin
    113                                                      if (o_rx_sb_done) begin

    115                                                      end else if (i_sb_rx_rsp || i_sb_rx_req) begin
    116             1                       1342                 o_rx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    117                                                      end

    132                                                  if (!state_enable) begin
    133             1                       9049             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h108;
    134             1                       9049             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    135             1                       9049             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;

    139             1                       9049             active_state_enable = 0;
    140             1                       9049             wait_1us_en = 0;
    141                                                  end else begin
    142                                                      case (CS)
    143                                                          // WAIT_1US: idle until a sideband L1 request arrives from TX.
    144                                                          // If the local LP_STATE_REQ also requests L1 ('h04) the module
    145                                                          // moves to L1; if 1us has elapsed and L1 was not confirmed it
    146                                                          // signals L1_REQ_END to abort and return to ACTIVE.
    147                                                          WAIT_1US: begin
    148                                                              if (!idle) begin
    149             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h112;
    150             1                    ***0***                         NS =  WAIT_1US;
    151             1                    ***0***                         idle_reg = 0;
    152                                              
    153             1                    ***0***                         wait_1us_en = 1;
    154                                              
    155                                                                  if (i_lp_state_req == 4'b0100) begin
    156             1                    ***0***                             NS =  L1;
    157             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h111;
    158             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    159             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    160             1                    ***0***                             o_pl_state_sts = 4'b0100;
    161                                                                  end else if (i_timer_1us && i_lp_state_req != 4'b0100) begin
    162             1                    ***0***                             NS =  L1_REQ_END;
    163             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h113;
    164             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    165             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    166                                                                  end
    167                                                              end else begin
    168                                                                  if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h110) begin
    169                                                                      if (i_lp_state_req == 4'b0100) begin
    170             1                    ***0***                                 NS = START_HANDSHAKE;
    171             1                    ***0***                                 o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h110;
    172             1                    ***0***                                 idle_reg = 0;
    173             1                    ***0***                                 wait_1us_en = 0;
    174                                                                      end else begin
    175             1                    ***0***                                 NS = WAIT_1US;
    176             1                    ***0***                                 o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h112;
    177             1                    ***0***                                 idle_reg = 0;
    178             1                    ***0***                                 wait_1us_en = 0;
    179                                                                      end
    180                                                                  end else begin
    181             1                    ***0***                             NS = WAIT_1US;  // NOTE: original used '<=' in always_comb; corrected to '=' — behaviour is identical in simulation but '<=' is illegal in synthesis-clean always_comb
    182             1                    ***0***                             idle_reg = 1;
    183             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_encoding_reg = i_rx_decoding_old;
    184                                                                  end 
    185                                                              end
    186                                                          end 
    187                                              
    188                                                          // L1: link is in low-power state. Exit is triggered either by a
    189                                                          // local wake request (i_lp_state_req == 0001) or by a TX-driven
    190                                                          // ACTIVE request ('h108). Either path enables SPEEDIDLE to
    191                                                          // re-negotiate the link speed before resuming data transfer.
    192                                                          L1: begin
    193             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h111;
    194             1                    ***0***                     NS = L1;
    195             1                    ***0***                     o_pl_state_sts = 'b0100;
    196                                              
    197                                                              if (i_lp_state_req == 'b0001 || (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'h108)) begin
    198             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    199             1                    ***0***                         speed_idle_state_enable = 1;
    200             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    201             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    202             1                    ***0***                         o_pl_state_sts = 'b0000;
    203                                                              end
    204                                                          end
    205                                              
    206                                                          // L1_REQ_END: the 1us timer expired before L1 was confirmed.
    207                                                          // Responds with 'h113 to acknowledge the abort, then enables the
    208                                                          // ACTIVE state once the done pulse is received.
    209                                                          L1_REQ_END: begin
    210             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h113;
    211             1                    ***0***                     NS = L1_REQ_END;
    212                                              
    213             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    214             1                    ***0***                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    215                                              
    216                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    217             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h108;
    218             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    219             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    220             1                    ***0***                         active_state_enable = 1;
    221                                                              end
    222                                                          end
    223                                              
    224                                                          // START_HANDSHAKE: initial sideband exchange before entering L1.
    225                                                          // RX responds to TX's 'h110 request and waits for the done pulse
    226                                                          // before transitioning into the L1 low-power state.
    227                                                          START_HANDSHAKE: begin
    228             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h110;
    229             1                    ***0***                     NS = START_HANDSHAKE;
    230                                              
    231             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    232             1                    ***0***                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    233                                              
    234                                                              if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    235             1                    ***0***                         NS = L1;
    236             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'h111;
    237             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    238             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    239             1                    ***0***                         o_pl_state_sts = 'b0100;
