    49                                               );
    50                                               
    51                                               localparam PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE = 2'b00;
    52                                               localparam RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE = 2'b01;
    53                                               localparam START_REQ_HANDSHAKE = 2'b10;
    54                                               
    55                                               logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_tx_encoding_reg;
    56                                               logic o_tx_sb_req_reg;
    57                                               logic o_tx_sb_rsp_reg;
    58                                               logic idle;
    59                                               logic idle_reg;
    60                                               
    61                                               logic done_ack;
    62                                               logic [DECODING_WIDTH-1:0] o_tx_encoding_old;
    63                                               logic tx_self_cal_state_enable_old;
    64                                               logic speed_idle_state_enable_old;
    65                                               logic repair_state_enable_old;
    66                                               
    67                                               logic [1:0] CS, NS;  // Current State, Next State
    68                                               
    69                                               logic previous_state_done;  // High when both rsp_sent and rsp_received are asserted (handshake complete)
    70                                               
    71              1                         72     always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    72                                                   if (i_reset) begin
    73              1                         48             CS <= PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    74              1                         48             o_tx_encoding <= 0;
    75              1                         48             o_tx_sb_req <= 0;
    76              1                         48             o_tx_sb_rsp <= 0;
    77              1                         48             idle <= 1;
    78                                                   end else begin
    79                                                       if (!(state_enable || link_speed_state_enable)) begin
    80              1                         24                 CS <= PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    81              1                         24                 o_tx_encoding <= 0;
    82              1                         24                 o_tx_sb_req <= 0;
    83              1                         24                 o_tx_sb_rsp <= 0;
    84              1                         24                 idle <= 1;
    85                                                       end else begin
    86              1                    ***0***                 CS <= NS;
    87              1                    ***0***                 o_tx_encoding <= o_tx_encoding_reg;
    88              1                    ***0***                 o_tx_sb_req <= o_tx_sb_req_reg;
    89              1                    ***0***                 o_tx_sb_rsp <= o_tx_sb_rsp_reg;
    90              1                    ***0***                 idle <= idle_reg;
    91                                                       end
    92                                                   end
    93                                               end
    94                                               
    95                                               //================================================================================
    96                                               // Done Acknowledgement Logic
    97                                               //================================================================================
    98                                               // Tracks when done signal has been acknowledged in handshake protocol
    99              1                       6099     always_comb begin
    100             1                       6099         done_ack = 0;
    101             1                    ***0***         if (o_tx_encoding[2:0] != o_tx_encoding_old[2:0]) done_ack = 0;
    102                                                  else if (i_sb_tx_done) begin
    103             1                       1776             done_ack = 1;  // Set when done received
    104                                                  end else if (i_sb_tx_rsp) begin
    105             1                       1129             done_ack = 0;  // Clear on response to allow next transaction
    106                                                  end
    107                                              end
    108                                              
    109             1                         72     always_ff @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    110                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    111             1                         48             o_tx_encoding_old <= 0;
    112             1                         48             tx_self_cal_state_enable_old <= 0;
    113             1                         48             speed_idle_state_enable_old <= 0;
    114             1                         48             repair_state_enable_old <= 0;
    115                                                  end else begin
    116             1                         24             o_tx_encoding_old <= o_tx_encoding_reg;  // Register to track previous encoding for done_ack logic
    117             1                         24             tx_self_cal_state_enable_old <= tx_self_cal_state_enable;
    118             1                         24             speed_idle_state_enable_old <= speed_idle_state_enable;
    119             1                         24             repair_state_enable_old <= repair_state_enable;
    120                                                  end
    121                                              end
    122                                              
    123             1                         73     assign previous_state_done = (rsp_sent & rsp_received);
    124                                              
    125                                              //================================================================================
    126                                              // Sideband Done Signal Logic
    127                                              //================================================================================
    128                                              // Generates done pulse for sideband protocol
    129             1                       4400     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    130                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    131             1                         48             o_tx_sb_done <= 0;;
    132                                                  end else begin
    133                                                      if (o_tx_sb_done) begin
    134             1                       1379                 o_tx_sb_done <= 0;  // Self-clearing pulse
    135                                                      end else if (i_sb_tx_rsp || i_sb_tx_req) begin
    136             1                       1379                 o_tx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    137                                                      end
    138                                                  end
    139                                              end
    140                                              
    141                                              assign o_pl_state_sts = 4'b1011;
    142                                              
    143             1                       9088     always @(*) begin
    144             1                       9088             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    145             1                       9088             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    146             1                       9088             o_tx_encoding_reg = 0;
    147             1                       9088             o_pl_stallreq = 0;
    148             1                       9088             o_Runtime_Link_Test_Control_register = 0;
    149             1                       9088             o_Runtime_Link_Test_status_register = 0;
    150             1                       9088             idle_reg = idle;
    151             1                       9088             o_tx_info = 0;
    152             1                       9088             NS = CS;
    153             1                       9088             tx_self_cal_state_enable = tx_self_cal_state_enable_old;
    154             1                       9088             speed_idle_state_enable = speed_idle_state_enable_old;
    155             1                       9088             repair_state_enable = repair_state_enable_old;
    156                                                  if (!(state_enable || link_speed_state_enable)) begin
    157             1                       9087                 o_tx_encoding_reg = 0;
    158             1                       9087                 o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    159             1                       9087                 o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    160             1                       9087                 tx_self_cal_state_enable = 0;
    161             1                       9087                 speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    162             1                       9087                 repair_state_enable = 0;
    163             1                       9087                 idle_reg = 1;
    164             1                       9087                 NS = PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    165                                                  end else begin
    166                                                      case (CS)
    167                                                          // PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE: TX initiates the retrain by asserting o_pl_stallreq
    168                                                          // and encoding 'hD8. Once the PL acknowledges the stall (i_lp_stallack),
    169                                                          // TX advances to RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE to notify RX.
    170                                                          // When link_speed_state_enable is asserted (retrain triggered from LINKSPEED),
    171                                                          // TX skips the stall and jumps directly to START_REQ_HANDSHAKE.
    172                                                          PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE: begin
    173                                              
    174                                                              if (!idle) begin
    175             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD8;
    176             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    177             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    178             1                    ***0***                         o_pl_stallreq = 1;
    179                                              
    180                                                                  if (i_lp_stallack) begin
    181             1                    ***0***                             NS = RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE;
    182             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD9;
    183             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    184             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    185             1                    ***0***                             o_pl_stallreq = 0;
    186             1                    ***0***                         end else NS = PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    187                                                              end else begin
    188                                                                  if (state_enable) begin
    189             1                    ***0***                             NS = PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    190             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD8;
    191             1                    ***0***                             idle_reg = 0;
    192                                                                  end else if (link_speed_state_enable) begin
    193             1                    ***0***                             NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    194             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD9;
    195             1                    ***0***                             idle_reg = 0;
    196                                                                  end
    197                                                              end
    198                                                          end
    199                                              
    200                                                          // RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE: TX announces the retrain to RX with encoding 'hD9.
    201                                                          // Once RX responds with 'hD9, TX advances to START_REQ_HANDSHAKE
    202                                                          // to exchange the retrain type codes.
    203                                                          RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE: begin
    204             1                    ***0***                     NS = RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE;
    205             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD9;
    206             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    207                                              
    208             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    209             1                    ***0***                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    210                                              
    211                                                              if (i_sb_tx_rsp && i_tx_decoding == 'hD9) begin
    212             1                    ***0***                         NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    213             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hDA;
    214             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    215             1                    ***0***                         o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    216             1                    ***0***                     end else NS = RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE;
    217                                                          end
    218                                              
    219                                                          // START_REQ_HANDSHAKE: TX and RX exchange retrain type codes via o_tx_info[2:0].
    220                                                          // TX sets its preference from the runtime test control register, then waits
    221                                                          // for both sides to have confirmed encoding 'hDA before selecting the recovery path:
    222                                                          //   3'b010 â†’ SPEEDIDLE  (speed re-negotiation)
    223                                                          //   3'b100 â†’ REPAIR     (lane repair)  â€” *** see module header warning ***
    224                                                          //   3'b001 â†’ TXSELFCAL  (TX self-calibration, default)
    225                                                          START_REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    226             1                    ***0***                     NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    227             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hDA;
    228             1                    ***0***                     o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    229                                              
    230                                                              // Encode TX retrain preference from the runtime test control register.
    231                                                              // Bit[2] of the control register selects lane-remap (100) vs speed-change (010).
    232                                                              // If the runtime test status is inactive the default is standard retrain (001).
    233                                                              if (i_Runtime_Link_Test_status_register) begin
    234                                                                  if (i_Runtime_Link_Test_Control_register[2]) begin
    235             1                    ***0***                             if (Lane_map_code) o_tx_info[2:0] = 3'b100;
    236             1                    ***0***                             else o_tx_info[2:0] = 3'b010;
    237             1                    ***0***                         end else o_tx_info[2:0] = 3'b001;
    238             1                    ***0***                     end else o_tx_info[2:0] = 3'b001;
    239                                              
    240             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    241             1                    ***0***                     else o_tx_sb_req_reg = 1;
    242                                              
    243                                                              if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hDA && encoding_rsp_received == 'hDA) begin
    244                                                                  if (i_tx_info[2:0] == 3'b010) begin
    245             1                    ***0***                             speed_idle_state_enable = 1;
    246             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    247             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    248             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    249                                                                  end else if (i_tx_info[2:0] == 3'b010) begin  // WARNING: duplicate condition â€” repair_state_enable can never assert here; intended condition is likely 3'b100
    250             1                    ***0***                             repair_state_enable = 1;
    251             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hC0;
    252             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    253             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    254                                                                  end else begin
    255             1                    ***0***                             tx_self_cal_state_enable = 1;
    256             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    257             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    258             1                    ***0***                             o_tx_sb_rsp_reg = 0; 
    259                                                                  end
    260             1                    ***0***                     end else NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    261                                                          end
    262                                                          default: begin
    263             1                          1                     tx_self_cal_state_enable = 0;
    264             1                          1                     speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    265             1                          1                     repair_state_enable = 0;

    90                                               // Done Acknowledgement Logic

    92                                               // Tracks when done signal has been acknowledged in handshake protocol
    93              1                       4421     always_comb begin
    94              1                       4421         done_ack = 0;
    95              1                    ***0***         if (o_rx_encoding[2:0] != o_rx_encoding_old[2:0]) done_ack = 0;
    96                                                   else if (i_sb_rx_done) begin
    97              1                       1682             done_ack = 1;  // Set when done received

    100                                                  end
    101                                              end

    117             1                         73     assign previous_state_done = (rsp_sent & rsp_received);
    118                                              
    119                                              //================================================================================
    120                                              // Sideband Done Signal Logic
    121                                              //================================================================================
    122                                              // Generates done pulse for sideband protocol
    123             1                       4386     always @(posedge i_clk or posedge i_reset) begin
    124                                                  if (i_reset) begin
    125             1                         48             o_rx_sb_done <= 0;;
    126                                                  end else begin
    127                                                      if (o_rx_sb_done) begin
    128             1                       1342                 o_rx_sb_done <= 0;  // Self-clearing pulse
    129                                                      end else if (i_sb_rx_rsp || i_sb_rx_req) begin
    130             1                       1342                 o_rx_sb_done <= 1;  // Assert on request or response
    131                                                      end
    132                                                  end
    133                                              end
    134                                              
    135             1                       8889     always_comb begin
    136             1                       8889             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    137             1                       8889             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    138             1                       8889             o_rx_encoding_reg = 0;
    139             1                       8889             idle_reg = idle;
    140             1                       8889             o_rx_info = 0;
    141             1                       8889             NS = CS;
    142             1                       8889             tx_self_cal_state_enable = tx_self_cal_state_enable_old;
    143             1                       8889             speed_idle_state_enable = speed_idle_state_enable_old;
    144             1                       8889             repair_state_enable = repair_state_enable_old;
    145                                                  if (!(state_enable || link_speed_state_enable)) begin
    146             1                       8887                 o_rx_encoding_reg = 0;
    147             1                       8887                 o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    148             1                       8887                 o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    149             1                       8887                 idle_reg = 1;
    150             1                       8887                 tx_self_cal_state_enable = 0;
    151             1                       8887                 speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    152             1                       8887                 repair_state_enable = 0;
    153             1                       8887                 NS = PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    154                                                  end else begin
    155                                                      case (CS)
    156                                                          // PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE: waits for a PL_STALL request from TX ('hD8 when idle)
    157                                                          // or a direct ACTIVEâ†’RETRAIN jump ('hDA). Once a stall is agreed the FSM
    158                                                          // moves to RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE to negotiate the retrain type.
    159                                                          PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE: begin
    160                                                              if (!idle) begin
    161             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD8;
    162             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    163             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    164                                              
    165                                                                  if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hD9) begin
    166             1                    ***0***                             NS = RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE;
    167             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD9;
    168             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    169             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    170             1                    ***0***                         end else NS = PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    171                                                              end else begin
    172                                                                  if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hD8) begin
    173             1                    ***0***                             NS = PL_STALL_HANDSHAKE;
    174             1                    ***0***                             idle_reg = 0;
    175                                                                  end else if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hDA) begin
    176             1                    ***0***                             NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    177             1                    ***0***                             idle_reg = 0;
    178                                                                  end
    179                                                              end
    180                                                          end
    181                                              
    182                                                          // RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE: RX responds to TX's 'hD9 retrain announcement.
    183                                                          // Once TX advances to 'hDA (retrain type request) the FSM moves to
    184                                                          // START_REQ_HANDSHAKE to agree on the retrain path.
    185                                                          RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE: begin
    186             1                    ***0***                     NS = RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE;
    187             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD9;
    188             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    189                                              
    190             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    191             1                    ***0***                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    192                                              
    193                                                              if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hDA) begin
    194             1                    ***0***                         NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    195             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hDA;
    196             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    197             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    198             1                    ***0***                     end else NS = RETRAIN_HANDSHAKE;
    199                                                          end
    200                                              
    201                                                          // START_REQ_HANDSHAKE: TX and RX exchange retrain type codes via o_rx_info[2:0].
    202                                                          // The agreed code selects the recovery path:
    203                                                          //   3'b010 â†’ SPEEDIDLE  (speed re-negotiation)
    204                                                          //   3'b100 â†’ REPAIR     (lane repair)
    205                                                          //   3'b001 â†’ TXSELFCAL  (TX self-calibration, default)
    206                                                          // The local Retrain_encoding is merged with TX's i_rx_info to pick the
    207                                                          // highest-priority action when both sides have non-default requests.
    208                                                          START_REQ_HANDSHAKE: begin
    209             1                    ***0***                     NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    210             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hDA;
    211             1                    ***0***                     o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    212                                              
    213                                                              // Determine local retrain preference from the runtime test control register.
    214                                                              // If the runtime test status is active, check bit[2] of the control register
    215                                                              // to decide between lane-remap (100) and speed-change (010); otherwise default to
    216                                                              // standard retrain (001).  The result is then merged with TX's preference below.
    217                                                              if (i_Runtime_Link_Test_status_register) begin
    218                                                                  if (i_Runtime_Link_Test_Control_register[2]) begin
    219             1                    ***0***                             if (Lane_map_code)  Retrain_encoding = 3'b100;
    220             1                    ***0***                             else Retrain_encoding = 3'b010;
    221             1                    ***0***                         end else Retrain_encoding = 3'b001;
    222             1                    ***0***                     end Retrain_encoding = 3'b001;
    223                                              
    224                                                              // Merge local and TX retrain preferences: REPAIR (100) > SPEEDIDLE (010) > TXSELFCAL (001).
    225                                                              // The higher-priority path wins when the two sides disagree.
    226                                                              if (i_rx_info == 3'b010 || Retrain_encoding == 3'b010) begin
    227             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_info[2:0] = 3'b010;
    228                                                              end else if (i_rx_info == 3'b100 || Retrain_encoding == 3'b100) begin
    229             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_info[2:0] = 3'b100;
    230                                                              end else begin
    231             1                    ***0***                         o_rx_info[2:0] = 3'b001;
    232                                                              end
    233                                              
    234             1                    ***0***                     if (done_ack) o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;
    235             1                    ***0***                     else o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 1;
    236                                              
    237                                                              if (previous_state_done && encoding_rsp_sent == 'hDA && encoding_rsp_received == 'hDA) begin
    238                                                                  if (i_rx_info[2:0] == 3'b010) begin
    239             1                    ***0***                             speed_idle_state_enable = 1;
    240             1                    ***0***                             repair_state_enable = 0;
    241             1                    ***0***                             tx_self_cal_state_enable = 0;
    242             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC8;
    243             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    244             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0;  
    245                                                                  end else if (i_rx_info[2:0] == 3'b100) begin
    246                                                                      if (i_sb_rx_req && i_rx_decoding == 'hC0 ) begin
    247             1                    ***0***                                 repair_state_enable = 1;
    248             1                    ***0***                                 speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    249             1                    ***0***                                 tx_self_cal_state_enable = 0;
    250             1                    ***0***                                 o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hC0;
    251             1                    ***0***                                 o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    252             1                    ***0***                                 o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0; 
    253                                                                      end     
    254                                                                  end else begin
    255             1                    ***0***                             tx_self_cal_state_enable = 1;
    256             1                    ***0***                             speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    257             1                    ***0***                             repair_state_enable = 0;
    258             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_encoding_reg = 'hD0;
    259             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_req_reg = 0;
    260             1                    ***0***                             o_rx_sb_rsp_reg = 0; 
    261                                                                  end
    262             1                    ***0***                     end else NS = START_REQ_HANDSHAKE;
    263                                                          end
    264                                              
    265                                                          default: begin
    266             1                          2                     tx_self_cal_state_enable = 0;
    267             1                          2                     speed_idle_state_enable = 0;
    268             1                          2                     repair_state_enable = 0;

    145                                                logic [3:0] next_state;

    148             1                         48         if (i_reset) current_state <= IDLE;
    149             1                         24         else if (!(i_train_active_en || phyretrain_linkspeed_transition)) current_state <= IDLE;
    150             1                          2         else current_state <= next_state;
    151                                                end
    152

    160                                                logic raw_done_tx_linkinit, raw_done_rx_linkinit;

    164             1                         48           done_tx_linkinit <= 1'b0;
    165             1                         48           done_rx_linkinit <= 1'b0;

    172

    203                                                // =========================================================================
    204                                                // Next-state logic
    205                                                // =========================================================================
    206                                                logic raw_done_retrain, raw_done_l1_rx, raw_done_l1_tx, raw_done_linkreset, raw_done_linkerror;
    207                                              
    208             1                          7       always_comb begin
    209             1                          7         next_state = current_state;
    210                                              
    211                                                  case (current_state)
    212                                                    IDLE: begin
    213                                                      // Wait for init FSM to signal that link training is complete
    214             1                          1             if (i_train_active_en) next_state = LINKINIT;
    215                                                    end
    216                                              
    217                                                    LINKINIT: begin
    218                                                      // Advance to ACTIVE once both TX and RX have completed their
    219                                                      // bring-up handshake (latch ensures one-at-a-time completion is OK)
    220                                                      if (
    221                                                          (done_tx_linkinit && raw_done_rx_linkinit) ||
    222                                                          (done_rx_linkinit && raw_done_tx_linkinit) ||
    223                                                          (done_tx_linkinit && done_rx_linkinit) ||
    224                                                          (raw_done_tx_linkinit && raw_done_rx_linkinit)
    225                                                      )
    226             1                    ***0***               next_state = ACTIVE;
    227                                                    end
    228                                              
    229                                                    ACTIVE: begin
    230                                                      // Priority: LinkError > L1 > Retrain > LinkReset
    231             1                    ***0***             if (raw_done_linkerror) next_state = IDLE;
    232             1                    ***0***             else if (raw_done_l1_rx || raw_done_l1_tx) next_state = L1;
    233             1                    ***0***             else if (raw_done_retrain || phyretrain_linkspeed_transition) next_state = RETRAIN;
    234             1                    ***0***             else if (raw_done_linkreset) next_state = LINKINIT;
    235                                                    end
    236                                              
    237                                                    ACTIVE_PMNAK: begin
    238                                                      // Same as ACTIVE but L1 is blocked (active module won't fire done_l1)
    239             1                    ***0***             if (raw_done_linkerror) next_state = ACTIVE_PMNAK;
    240             1                    ***0***             else if (raw_done_retrain || phyretrain_linkspeed_transition) next_state = RETRAIN;
    241             1                    ***0***             else if (raw_done_linkreset) next_state = LINKINIT;
    242                                                    end
    243                                              
    244                                                    RETRAIN: begin
    245                                                      if (speed_idle_state_enable || repair_state_enable || tx_self_cal_state_enable) begin
    246             1                    ***0***               next_state = IDLE;
    247                                                      end
    248                                                    end
    249                                              
    250                                                    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    251                                                    // L1   exits to ACTIVE_PMNAK once both TX and RX assert
    252                                                    // active_state_enable (PMNAK response path), or to IDLE if either
    253                                                    // side requests speed change (speed_idle_state_enable).
    254                                                    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    255                                                    L1: begin
    256             1                    ***0***             if (l1_tx_speed_idle_en || l1_rx_speed_idle_en) next_state = IDLE;
    257                                                      else if ((done_tx_l1_active && l1_rx_active_en) ||
    258                                                               (done_rx_l1_active && l1_tx_active_en) ||
    259                                                               (done_tx_l1_active && done_rx_l1_active) ||
    260                                                               (l1_rx_active_en && l1_tx_active_en) || l1_tx_active_en)
    261             1                    ***0***               next_state = ACTIVE_PMNAK;
    262                                                    end
    263                                              
    264                                              
    265             1                          3           default: next_state = IDLE;
    266                                                  endcase
    267                                                end

    549

    555                                                    LINKINIT: begin

    558             1                          2             o_pl_inband_pres = linkinit_tx_pl_inband_pres;

    572                                              
    573                                                    ACTIVE, ACTIVE_PMNAK: begin
